We address this by introducing a differentiable deferred rendering pipeline that integrates multiple importance sampling with targeted regularization. As a result, AEGIR accurately simulates local light transport and achieves more consistent decomposition. Experiments show that explicit area emitters improve illumination reconstruction and enhance downstream tasks, including novel view synthesis, controlled relighting, and virtual object insertion, particularly in scenes with complex local lighting.

</details>


### [37] [Obliviate: Erasing Concepts from Autoregressive Image Generation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28643)
*Hossein Shakibania,Jonas Henry Grebe,Tobias Braun,Ege Aktemur,Saleh Aslani,Mehmet Görkem Yiğit,Marcus Rohrbach*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Obliviate：一种用于自回归图像生成的引导式概念消除方法，通过KL监督、轨迹级更新和对齐视觉前缀，在保持模型效用的同时有效消除有害内容


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着生成式AI模型的广泛应用，对滥用（如创建不安全或令人不安的图像）的担忧日益加剧。虽然已有多种概念消除方法用于多模态生成模型，但自回归图像生成的概念消除仍未被充分探索，而这类模型在统一多模态架构趋势中越来越重要。

Method: Obliviate是一种基于引导的概念消除方法，包含三个关键设计：1）基于KL散度的视觉token分布监督；2）在完整自回归展开上的轨迹级更新；3）用于稳定目标构建的对齐视觉前缀。该方法在三种最先进的自回归文本到图像模型（Liquid、Emu3-Gen、Janus-Pro）上进行了评估。

Result: Obliviate在消除露骨内容、暴力图像和品牌图像方面一致优于现有方法。在防御性RAB基准测试中，将裸露内容从91.58%降低到3.15%，同时保持了模型的整体效用。

Conclusion: Obliviate填补了自回归图像生成中概念消除的空白，通过创新的引导方法有效消除有害内容，为多模态生成模型的安全部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: The widespread adoption of generative AI models has intensified concerns about misuse, including the creation of unsafe or disturbing imagery. To mitigate such issues, several concept erasure approaches have been proposed to remove harmful content from multimodal generative models. Yet concept erasure for autoregressive image generation remains largely unexplored, despite the growing relevance of these models in recent trends toward unified multimodal architectures. In this work, we fill this gap by introducing Obliviate, a guidance-based concept erasure method for autoregressive image generation. Our method builds on three key design choices: KL-based supervision over visual token distributions, trajectory-level updates over full autoregressive rollouts, and aligned visual prefixes for stable target construction. We evaluate Obliviate on three state-of-the-art autoregressive text-to-image models, Liquid, Emu3-Gen, and Janus-Pro, covering the erasure of explicit content, graphic violence, and branded imagery. Obliviate consistently outperforms current alternatives, reducing nudity on the defensive RAB benchmark from 91.58 to 3.15 while preserving overall model utility.

</details>


### [38] [FedLAS: Feature-Modulated Bidirectional Label Smoothing for Neural Network Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28654)
*Thiru Thillai Nadarasar Bahavan,Sachith Seneviratne,Saman Halgamuge*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FedLAS是一种用于深度神经网络分类器的特征调制双向标签平滑算法，通过样本特定的置信度调整来解决模型校准不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统标签平滑方法（包括基于边缘的LS）存在限制：使用预定义的均匀平滑规则，仅处理过度自信问题，而忽略了样本在训练过程中的多样性和动态变化特性。

Method: 提出FedLAS算法，包含特征范数置信度指示器（NCI）来控制平滑程度，以及双向校准门控（BCG）模块来检测过度自信和自信不足两种状态。

Result: 在标准和细粒度高分辨率视觉基准测试中，FedLAS相比现代基线方法持续改善校准性能，降低预期校准误差（ECE）和自适应ECE，同时保持Top-1准确率。

Conclusion: FedLAS是一种即插即用的标签平滑算法，能够根据每个样本的特定置信状态动态调整平滑程度，有效解决深度神经网络分类器的校准问题。

Abstract: Deep Neural Network (DNN) classifiers suffer from poor calibration when their softmax outputs (predictive confidence) deviate from the empirical likelihoods. This manifests itself as either overconfident incorrect predictions or under-confident correct predictions. Label smoothing (LS) enhances model calibration by introducing entropy regularization during training through redistributing probability mass from the ground-truth label to the remaining classes. LS, including Margin-based LS (MbLS), have restrictive assumptions: they rely on predefined, uniform smoothing rules and only tackle overconfidence. In reality, samples exhibit diverse characteristics, such as difficulty/ambiguity, that interact with the evolving nature of the model being trained. In training, samples may have various degrees of under- or overconfidence. To overcome this, a mechanism that identifies the specific confidence state of each sample and determines the appropriate degree of smoothing in each training step is needed, tailoring the adjustment to the individual sample. We propose FedLAS: Feature-Modulated Bidirectional Label Smoothing, a plug-and-play algorithm for label smoothing-based losses. In FedLAS, we introduce a Feature Norm-based Confidence Indicator (NCI) to control smoothing and a Bidirectional Calibration Gating (BCG) module to detect both over and under-confidence. Our algorithm can be integrated with LS and MbLS based losses when applied to standard DNNs, enhancing performance. Extensive experiments on standard and fine-grained high-resolution vision benchmarks show that FedLAS consistently improves calibration compared to modern baselines, reducing Expected Calibration Error (ECE) and Adaptive ECE while maintaining Top-1 accuracy. Code: github.com/nadarasarbahavan/FEDLAS

</details>


### [39] [SemDynReg: Semantics-Guided Deformation Regularization for Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28656)
*Ruitao Chen,Mozhang Guo,Jinge Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出语义引导的动态3D高斯泼溅框架，通过对象级正则化提升变形一致性，解决现有方法缺乏显式对象建模导致变形不一致和对象间耦合的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于变形场的3D高斯泼溅方法缺乏显式对象级建模，导致单个对象内的高斯变形不一致，不同对象间存在不希望的耦合效应，限制了动态场景渲染质量。

Method: 使用Segment Anything Model提取分割掩码和语义特征，通过特征相关性匹配构建对象ID图；基于对象ID图识别每个对象的像素级top-k贡献高斯，对其变形参数（位置、尺度、旋转）施加一致性正则化。

Result: 实验表明语义感知正则化提升了对象级变形一致性，在动态3DGS渲染中优于基线方法，获得更高的PSNR和SSIM，更低的LPIPS，渲染质量显著提升。

Conclusion: 通过语义引导的对象级正则化框架，有效解决动态3D高斯泼溅中的变形不一致问题，为动态场景渲染提供更准确、一致的对象级变形建模。

Abstract: Deformable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as an efficient approach for rendering dynamic scenes in a wide range of 3D applications. However, existing deformation field-based approaches largely lack explicit object-level modeling, often resulting in inconsistent Gaussian deformations within individual objects and unwanted coupling between different objects. To address this limitation, we introduce a semantics-guided framework that enforces dynamic regularization at the object level, aiming to achieve spatially consistent object-wise deformation. Specifically, we first extract segmentation masks using the Segment Anything Model (SAM) and derive semantic features from input images. An object-ID map is then constructed via feature relevance matching with a predefined object dictionary. Guided by this object-ID map, we identify the pixel-wise top-k contributing Gaussians for each object and impose consistency regularization on their deformation parameters, including position, scale, and rotation. Unlike prior methods that learn deformation fields without explicit object-level constraints, our approach incorporates semantic cues to guide deformation behavior at the object level. Experimental results demonstrate that our semantics-aware regularization improves object-level deformation consistency and outperforms baseline methods in rendering quality, achieving higher PSNR and SSIM and lower LPIPS in dynamic 3DGS rendering. Our project page is available at https://dyn-reg-3dgs.github.io/.

</details>


### [40] [BackTranslation2.0 -- A Linguistically Motivated Metric to Assess Sign Language Production](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28673)
*Oliver Cory,Maksym Ivashechkin,Karahan Sahin,Oline Ranum,Jianhe Low,Edward Fish,Anton Pelykh,Ozge Mercanoglu Sincan,Richard Bowden*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: BackTranslation2.0 是一个用于文本到手语翻译的评估指标，它超越了简单的回译方法，通过代理框架协调专门工具来评估语法正确性、音系准确性、动作流畅性和生成保真度，并与人类评估结果高度相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前手语生成系统的评估指标过于简单且与人类判断不一致，无法准确评估手语翻译的质量。需要一种更全面、可解释且基于语言学原理的评估框架。

Method: 采用代理框架，通过确定性流程协调专门工具评估四个维度：语法正确性、音系准确性、动作流畅性和生成保真度。使用基于大语言模型的交叉参考比较模块来检查工具输出的一致性，并通过确定性加权公式计算最终分数。

Result: 在英式手语数据集上进行评估，与六种基线指标对比，BackTranslation2.0 在所有质量维度上都显示出与人类判断的强相关性。

Conclusion: BackTranslation2.0 为手语生成系统提供了一个更全面、可解释且基于语言学原理的评估框架，能够更好地反映人类对翻译质量的判断。

Abstract: Sign Languages (SLs) are the primary means of communication for millions of deaf individuals, yet existing evaluation metrics for generated SL remain simplistic and poorly aligned with human judgements. We introduce BackTranslation2.0, a linguistically grounded evaluation metric for text-to-sign translation that moves beyond naïve backtranslation. Our approach adopts an agentic framework in which a deterministic pipeline orchestrates a suite of specialised tools to assess four scoring dimensions - grammatical correctness, phonological accuracy, motion fluency, and generation fidelity - aligned with human rater assessments. Tool outputs are not treated independently: a set of large language model (LLM)-based cross-referential comparison modules evaluates consistency across tools and checks outputs against linguistic expectations, enabling structured reasoning over grammatical, phonological, and motion-level evidence. Final dimension scores are computed through deterministic weighted formulas over validated tool outputs. To validate BackTranslation2.0, we introduce and evaluate on a British Sign Language (BSL) dataset rated in a human rater study across the same quality dimensions, following a protocol developed in collaboration between linguists and deaf experts, benchmarking against six baseline metrics. Our method demonstrates strong correlation with human judgements across all dimensions, providing a more comprehensive, interpretable, and linguistically principled evaluation framework for sign language production systems.

</details>


### [41] [Predicting Metastatic Risk from Primary Tissue Architecture via Distance-Aware Spatial Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28676)
*Sandesh Pokhrel,Hamid Manoochehri,Bodong Zhang,Beatrice S Knudsen,Tolga Tasdizen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了DTMf-MIL方法，通过融入空间先验来增强多示例学习，显著提升转移风险预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MIL方法将组织斑块视为无序包，忽略了决定转移潜力的空间布局，而转移风险本质上由肿瘤微环境在肿瘤细胞界面的几何排列决定。

Method: 提出距离感知组织建模多示例学习(DTMf-MIL)，通过计算相对于组织表型的signed distance functions(SDF)来强化视觉特征，显式捕捉肿瘤细胞、肿瘤相关成纤维细胞和浸润淋巴细胞之间的空间关系。

Result: DTMf-MIL在原发性肿瘤组织转移预测上显著优于忽略空间布局的SOTA方法，在公共基准测试中验证了空间感知能持续提高跨不同临床任务的诊断准确性。

Conclusion: 空间几何感知对转移风险预测至关重要，DTMf-MIL通过融入空间先验有效提升了临床性能。

Abstract: Predicting the risk of distant metastasis from primary tumor tissue histology is a critical yet challenging task in computational pathology. Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) approaches can attend to subdomains in tumor regions that harbor features of metastatic cancer progression. However MIL models treat tissue patches as unordered bags, discarding the spatial layout that defines the metastatic potential. We propose that metastatic risk is inherently dictated by the geometric arrangement of the tumor microenvironment at the interface with tumor cells. Our model is designed to explicitly capture the spatial relationships between tumor cells, tumor associated fibroblasts and infiltrating lymphocytes. For this purpose, we propose Distance aware Tissue Modeling for Multiple Instance Learning(DTMf-MIL), a novel method that reinforces visual features with explicit spatial priors. By computing signed distance functions (SDF) relative to tissue phenotypes, our model learns to recognize structural signatures of metastatic risk. This geometric awareness translates directly to superior clinical performance as DTMf-MIL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods that ignore spatial layout on metastasis prediction from tissue in the primary tumor. We further validate our approach on public benchmarks, demonstrating that spatial awareness consistently improves diagnostic accuracy across diverse clinical tasks.

</details>


### [42] [SATB-VR: Training Few-Step Video Restoration Diffusion Model using SNR-Aware Trajectory Blending](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28677)
*Haoran Bai,Xiaoxu Chen,Xiaoyu Liu,Zongsheng Yue,Sibin Deng,Wangmeng Zuo,Ying Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SATB-VR是一种用于视频修复的少步扩散模型范式，通过辅助预测器跳过早期低信噪比步骤，结合信噪比感知轨迹混合策略和去噪器驱动一致性损失，在5步内实现高效高质量的修复效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统扩散模型在视频修复中依赖大量迭代步骤导致效率低下，而激进的单步蒸馏方法又往往损害纹理细节恢复。需要找到在效率和恢复质量之间的最佳平衡点。

Method: 提出SATB-VR少步范式：1）使用辅助预测器跳过早期低信噪比步骤；2）采用信噪比感知轨迹混合策略，在训练过程中动态混合预测器输出和真实轨迹；3）引入去噪器驱动一致性损失，利用更新的去噪器作为动态评估器来对齐特征并提升预测器精度。

Result: 在合成、真实世界和AIGC基准测试中，SATB-VR在灵活少步推理（≤5步）下表现优于现有方法，实现了效率和质量的最佳平衡。

Conclusion: SATB-VR通过创新的训练策略解决了少步扩散模型中的训练-推理不一致问题，在保持高质量视频修复的同时显著提升了推理效率。

Abstract: While diffusion models excel in video restoration, their reliance on extensive iterative steps limits efficiency. Conversely, aggressive single-step distillation often compromises fine texture recovery. To achieve an optimal balance, we present SATB-VR, a few-step paradigm that jump-starts the denoising process via an auxiliary predictor, explicitly bypassing early low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) steps. However, naive joint training of the predictor and the denoiser inherently introduces a severe train-inference discrepancy. To resolve this, we propose the SNR-Aware Trajectory Blending (SATB) strategy. During the forward process, SATB constructs the noisy input by dynamically blending the predictor's output with the ground-truth trajectory based on the SNRs. This forces the denoiser to robustly compensate for initial prediction errors while smoothly converging to the clean data manifold. Furthermore, we introduce a Denoiser-Driven Consistency (DDC) loss, leveraging the concurrently updated denoiser as a dynamic evaluator to explicitly align internal features and boost predictor accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, under flexible few-step inference regimes (\eg, $\le 5$ steps), SATB-VR performs favorably against existing approaches on synthetic, real-world, and AIGC benchmarks.

</details>


### [43] [LogiCo: A Unified Framework for Logical and Structural Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28688)
*Ximiao Zhang,Min Xu,Xiuzhuang Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LogiCo是一个统一的逻辑和结构异常检测框架，通过组件级特征重建来同时处理结构异常和逻辑约束违反的异常。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前异常检测方法主要关注结构异常，对违反逻辑约束的异常关注不足；而顶级的逻辑异常检测方法虽然建模全局语义一致性，但对细微结构异常检测效果差，因为检测粒度不足。

Method: 提出LogiCo框架，采用组件级特征重建技术来捕捉组件间的逻辑约束。将预训练图像特征映射到离散的组件级特征空间，在组件和补丁级别进行协同特征重建。针对计数相关的逻辑异常，集成了分割图判别器来识别数量不一致性。

Result: 在MVTec-LOCO、MVTec-AD、VisA和Real-IAD四个基准测试中，LogiCo在逻辑和结构异常检测上都达到了最先进的性能，证明了其优越性和实际可行性。

Conclusion: LogiCo是一个统一框架，通过组件级特征重建有效检测逻辑和结构异常，解决了现有方法在这两个任务上的局限性。

Abstract: Current anomaly detection methods primarily focus on structural anomalies, while paying insufficient attention to anomalies that violate logical constraints. Conversely, top-performing logical anomaly detection approaches address this by modeling global semantic consistency, but perform poorly on subtle structural anomalies due to inadequate detection granularity. In this paper, we propose LogiCo, a unified framework for Logical and structural anomaly detection via Component-level feature reconstruction. Unlike existing methods that rely on explicit global semantic modeling, LogiCo employs a novel component-level feature reconstruction technique to capture inter-component logical constraints. Specifically, LogiCo maps pre-trained image features into a discrete component-level feature space and performs collaborative feature reconstruction at both component and patch levels, enabling it to effectively detect both logical and structural anomalies. Furthermore, to address the specific challenge of count-related logical anomalies, we integrate a segmentation-map discriminator that extends the model's capability to identify quantitative inconsistencies. LogiCo achieves state-of-the-art performance on both logical and structural anomaly detection across four benchmarks, including MVTec-LOCO, MVTec-AD, VisA, and Real-IAD, demonstrating its superiority and practical feasibility. The code is available at https://github.com/cnulab/LogiCo.

</details>


### [44] [Mitigating Batch Effects in Histopathology via Language-Mediated Robust Embedding Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28697)
*Yishu Zhang,Shushan Wu,Zhenzhong Zhang,Didong Li,Huaxiu Yao,Yun Li,Iain Carmichael,Katherine A. Hoadley,Hongtu Zhu,Di Wu,Daiwei Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GLMP是一个新型病理学基础模型框架，通过中间文本表示从组织学图像生成鲁棒数值嵌入，利用预训练多模态大语言模型减少批次效应，提高跨机构泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 病理学基础模型在临床和科学应用中表现出强大潜力，但其性能常受到批次效应（不同机构间的非生物变异）的阻碍，这些效应扭曲特征表示并损害泛化能力。传统方法如染色归一化在解决这些高维复杂伪影方面效果有限。

Method: GLMP通过中间文本表示从组织学图像块生成鲁棒数值嵌入。利用预训练通用多模态大语言模型和文本编码器，优先考虑生物学有意义的信号而非机构特定伪影，从而提高跨机构泛化。

Result: GLMP是首个使用组织学特征文本描述作为中间表示从病理图像生成数值嵌入的病理模型。结果展示了广泛领域非专业多模态大语言模型在计算病理学中的未开发潜力。

Conclusion: GLMP为构建多功能、可泛化和鲁棒的病理模型引入了新范式，通过文本中间表示有效减少批次效应，提高跨机构性能。

Abstract: Pathology foundation models (PFMs) have demonstrated strong potential across clinical and scientific applications, yet their performance is often hindered by batch effects, which are non-biological variations across tissue source institutions (TSIs) that distort learned feature representations and impair generalization. Conventional mitigation strategies, such as stain normalization, offer limited success in addressing these high-dimensional, complex artifacts. We present GLMP (General-purpose LLM-Mediated Pathology model), a novel framework that generates robust numerical embeddings from histology image patches through an intermediate textual representation. By leveraging pretrained general-purpose multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and text encoders, GLMP effectively prioritizes biologically meaningful signals over TSI-specific artifacts, thereby improving cross-institutional generalization. To our knowledge, GLMP is the first pathology model to use text descriptions of histological features as an intermediate representation for generating numerical embeddings from histology images. Our results highlight the untapped potential of broad-domain, non-specialized MLLMs in computational pathology and introduce a new paradigm for building versatile, generalizable, and robust pathology models.

</details>


### [45] [CCRC: A Change-Aware Captioning and Reasoning Chain for Image Change Captioning and Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28724)
*Jinhong Hu,Xiaoping Wang,Shuyin Huang,Guojin Zhong,Kaitai Liu,Kai Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出ICCS新多模态任务（图像变化描述与分割），并设计CCRC双链框架，通过解耦语义推理和空间分割来同时实现结构化变化描述和像素级定位。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统图像变化描述方法缺乏空间定位能力，限制了其在监控和图像编辑等应用中的精确性，需要同时实现结构化描述和像素级定位的新方法。

Method: 提出CCRC双链框架：第一链CCC通过多头部变化感知注意力增强细粒度变化感知，判断变化是否可分割；第二链CCS利用CCC的空间先验，通过变化感知令牌细化器精确定位边界。

Result: 在合成和真实世界变化检测基准测试中，CCRC实现了最先进的性能表现。

Conclusion: ICCS任务和CCRC框架有效解决了传统方法空间定位不足的问题，通过解耦语义推理和空间分割，实现了精确的变化描述和定位。

Abstract: Understanding and localizing subtle changes between paired images is critical for tasks such as surveillance and image editing. However, traditional Image Change Captioning (ICC) methods lack spatial grounding, limiting their precision. We introduce Image Change Captioning and Segmentation (ICCS), a new multimodal task that jointly requires structured change description and pixel-level localization. To address ICCS, we propose the Change-aware Captioning and Reasoning Chain (CCRC), a dual-chain framework that decouples semantic reasoning from spatial segmentation. The first chain, Chain-of-Change-Captioning (CCC), enhances fine-grained change perception via a visual fusion module based on Multi-Head Change-aware Attention inserted between the visual and language components of a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM). CCC also determines whether a change is segmentable. If not, it alone generates the caption. Otherwise, the second chain, Chain-of-Change-Segmenting (CCS), is activated, leveraging spatial priors from CCC and refining masks with a Change-aware Token Refiner for accurate boundary localization. We evaluate CCRC on both synthetic and real-world change detection benchmarks with pixel-level supervision. Experiments show CCRC achieves state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [46] [FreqOrtho-SR: Frequency-Guided Orthogonal Expert Learning for Real-World Image Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28745)
*Minh Son Hoang,Dinh Phu Tran,Quyen Nguyen Duc,Dam Hoang Phuong,Daeyoung Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FreqOrtho-SR 提出了一种新的图像超分辨率方法，通过频率引导的LoRA专家混合和正交梯度投影，解决了像素保真度与语义质量平衡、以及适应多样化退化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散先验的方法在真实世界图像超分辨率中面临两个关键挑战：平衡像素级保真度与语义质量，以及适应多样化的退化类型。现有双分支方法在语义训练期间冻结像素模块，但语义分支仍可能在像素子空间内扩展容量，阻碍真正的感知质量提升。此外，使用单一静态适配器无法泛化到异构的真实世界退化。

Method: 提出了FreqOrtho-SR方法，包含两个核心组件：1) 频率引导的LoRA专家混合(FreqMoE)：通过基于FFT的非参数退化特征提取器编码频域特征，将输入路由到专门的专家，实现跨退化类型的稳定可解释专业化。2) 正交梯度投影(OGP)：将双目标优化重新定义为子空间约束问题，通过SVD提取像素保真度子空间，并将语义梯度投影到其零空间，保证两个目标的正交性，实现真正互补的学习而无相互干扰。

Result: 实验表明，FreqOrtho-SR在多个基准测试中实现了具有竞争力的整体性能和强大的保真度-感知权衡，同时支持高效的单步推理。

Conclusion: FreqOrtho-SR通过创新的频率引导专家路由和正交梯度投影机制，有效解决了真实世界图像超分辨率中的保真度-感知权衡和多样化退化适应问题，在保持高效推理的同时实现了优异的性能。

Abstract: Diffusion prior-based methods have shown impressive results in real-world image super-resolution (ISR), yet two key challenges persist: balancing pixel-level fidelity with semantic quality, and adapting to diverse degradations. Existing dual-branch approaches freeze the pixel module during semantic training, but the semantic branch can still expand capacity within the pixel subspace, precluding genuine perceptual improvement. Moreover, using a single static adapter cannot generalize across heterogeneous real-world corruptions. To address both issues, we propose FreqOrtho-SR, which comprises: $\textbf{Freq}$uency-guided Mixture of LoRA Experts (FreqMoE), it routes inputs to specialized experts via a non-parametric FFT-based degradation-feature extractor that encodes frequency-domain signatures, enabling stable and interpretable specialization across corruption types; and $\textbf{Ortho}$gonal Gradient Projection (OGP), which reframes the dual-objective optimization as a subspace-constrained problem: by extracting the pixel-fidelity subspace via SVD on combined expert weight deltas and projecting semantic gradients onto its null space, OGP guarantees orthogonality between the two objectives, enabling genuinely complementary learning without mutual interference. Experiments show that FreqOrtho-SR achieves competitive overall performance and a strong fidelity-perception trade-off across multiple benchmarks with efficient single-step inference. The source code of our method can be found at $\href{https://github.com/sonhm3029/FreqOrtho-SR}{\texttt{sonhm3029/FreqOrtho-SR}}$.

</details>


### [47] [A Physics-Grounded Benchmark for Multi-Agent Dynamics in World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28757)
*Nuo Chen,Lulin Liu,Zihao Li,Ziyao Zeng,Zihao Zhu,Wenyan Cong,Junyuan Hong,Yunhao Yang,Zhengzhong Tu,Yan Wang,Boris Ivanovic,Marco Pavone,Zhangyang Wang,Yang Zhou,Zhiwen Fan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CrashTwin是一个物理基础评估框架，用于测试生成式世界模型在模拟多智能体碰撞场景时的物理可信度，通过无标定重建管道从模型输出中恢复3D物理属性，并系统评估时空一致性、动量与动能守恒等维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成式世界模型的评估主要关注视觉逼真度和语义对齐，但无法可靠量化生成动态是否遵守基本物理定律，这对于安全关键的多智能体交互（如车辆碰撞）模拟至关重要。

Method: CrashTwin框架包含：1）多样化的多智能体碰撞数据集（25K合成+12K真实世界序列）；2）新颖的无标定重建管道，直接从世界模型输出中恢复3D物理属性；3）诊断套件系统评估时空一致性、动量与动能守恒、世界动态完整性三个维度。

Result: 对最先进模型的广泛基准测试发现：高感知质量经常掩盖复杂交互期间的严重物理违规。通过定量暴露这些故障模式，CrashTwin揭示了世界模型在物理可信度方面的关键缺陷。

Conclusion: CrashTwin为开发物理基础的世界模型提供了重要诊断工具，能够实现可靠的真实世界模拟，特别是在安全关键的多智能体交互场景中。

Abstract: Generative world models hold immense promise as scalable simulators for autonomous systems, particularly for synthesizing rare but safety-critical multi-agent interactions, such as vehicle collisions. However, current evaluation paradigms index heavily on visual fidelity and semantic alignment, leaving a critical blind spot: they cannot reliably quantify whether generated dynamics actually obey the fundamental physical laws required for reliable simulation. Assessing this physical plausibility is inherently difficult due to a lack of physical metrics and the challenge of extracting metric-scale kinematics from uncalibrated video rollouts. To bridge this gap, we introduce CrashTwin, a physics-grounded evaluation framework designed to stress-test the physical trustworthiness of world models. CrashTwin couples a diverse dataset of multi-agent collision scenarios, comprising 25K controllable synthetic and 12K in-the-wild real-world collision sequences with a novel calibration-free reconstruction pipeline, enabling the recovery of 3D physical attributes directly from world model rollouts. We propose a diagnostic suite that systematically evaluates three dimensions: spatio-temporal consistency, momentum and kinetic energy conservation, and world-dynamics integrity. Extensive benchmarking of state-of-the-art models reveals a crucial insight: high perceptual quality frequently masks severe physical violations during complex interactions. By quantitatively exposing these failure modes, CrashTwin provides a vital diagnostic tool for developing physically grounded world models capable of reliable real-world simulation.

</details>


### [48] [X-Mind: Efficient Visual Chain-of-Thought via Predictive World Model for End-to-End Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28758)
*Bohao Zhao,Chengrui Wei,Guangfeng Jiang,Ruixin Liu,Xuejie Lv,Liu Liang,Sutao Deng,Xiuyang Fan,Pengkun Zheng,Jinyun Zhou,Rui Guo,Hanpeng Liu,Yutong Zheng,Yi Guo,Xinlong Zheng,Qingyu Luo,Zhuangzhuang Ding,Yu Zhang,Hang Zhang,Xianming Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: X-Mind框架将预测世界模型内化为视觉思维链，使VLA模型具备前瞻推理能力，通过紧凑表示和递归块扩散实现高效低延迟的自动驾驶


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉-语言-动作模型缺乏预测未来状态的能力，仅依赖反应式的感知-动作映射。现有方法要么带来过高延迟，要么作为浅层终端任务，无法深度嵌入前瞻推理

Method: 将预测世界模型内化为视觉思维链，使用BEV布局与抽象驾驶先验的紧凑表示作为思维画布，通过深度压缩自编码器减少token数量，采用递归块扩散方案加速生成

Result: 在大规模真实世界数据上训练验证，X-Mind实现了有竞争力的端到端驾驶性能，成为高度实用、低延迟的解决方案，成功将大规模认知推理部署到资源受限的车载平台

Conclusion: X-Mind框架成功赋予VLA模型前瞻推理能力，通过高效表示和生成机制解决了计算瓶颈，为自动驾驶系统提供了实用的认知推理解决方案

Abstract: Predicting future states is essential for autonomous agents, yet current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models fundamentally lack this capability, relying instead on reactive perception-action mapping. While integrating Predictive World Models (PWMs) addresses this gap, existing approaches either incur prohibitive cascaded latency or act as shallow terminal tasks that fail to deeply embed forward-looking reasoning. To endow VLA models with this reasoning capability, we propose X-Mind. Rather than treating PWMs as an external auxiliary module, this framework internalizes them as the Visual Chain-of-Thought (Visual CoT). By enforcing a world rollout prior to action, the model is constrained to imagine future evolution first, yielding a driving policy that is robustly grounded in environmental dynamics and aware of the future consequences its actions will unfold. The challenge here is efficiency, and we tackle it on two fronts. First, we introduce a compact representation of visual thinking: an abstract sketch that fuses a Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) layout with abstract driving priors (e.g., navigation intents and traffic rules). Rather than rolling out dense future frames, the model reasons over this sketch as a mental canvas; aided by a Deep Compression Autoencoder (DC-AE), a 12-frame future rollout is reduced to merely 96 tokens, alleviating the long-context computational bottleneck. Second, to accelerate generation further, we propose a recurrent block diffusion scheme that unrolls the denoising steps across the layers of the large drive model, folding iterative refinement into the backbone's one forward pass. Trained and validated on large-scale real-world data, X-Mind achieves competitive end-to-end driving performance, which makes it a highly practical, low-latency solution that successfully deploys large-scale cognitive reasoning directly onto resource-constrained vehicle platforms.

</details>


### [49] [Stochastic Optimal Control Sampling for Diffusion Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28785)
*Jie Zhang,Youmei Qiu,Hanling Tian,Jingyuan Zhang,Xiang Yin,Xiaolin Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SOCS方法，通过随机最优控制将扩散模型应用于图像逆问题，实现测量对齐重建并提升视觉质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在图像逆问题中表现优异，但现有基于SOC的方法需要优化整个轨迹，计算成本高。需要一种更高效的SOC方法来实现测量对齐和高质量重建。

Method: 提出随机最优控制采样(SOCS)，将去噪过程建模为动态系统，通过SOC注入控制信号。推导闭式控制更新，在每个采样步骤应用，将测量一致的干净预测拉回到去噪流中。可调节控制强度以匹配扩散模型能力。

Result: 在广泛的图像逆任务实验中，SOCS实现了准确的测量对齐重建，具有更好的视觉保真度和更强的定量性能。方法兼容多种线性随机微分方程骨干网络。

Conclusion: SOCS为扩散模型在图像逆问题中的应用提供了一种高效且有效的随机最优控制方法，能够平衡测量对齐和视觉质量。

Abstract: Benefiting from the strong ability to capture data distributions, diffusion models have become powerful tools for solving image inverse problems. The key is to controllably steer the sampling trajectory toward the measurements while respecting the diffusion prior. In this work, we introduce Stochastic Optimal Control Sampling (SOCS), which models the denoising process as a dynamical system and injects control signals via SOC. Previous SOC-based approach addresses inverse problems by optimizing over the entire trajectory, which is computationally expensive. In contrast, we derive a closed-form control update and apply it at each sampling step, pulling the measurement-consistent clean prediction back onto the denoising flow. In SOCS, we can readily modulate the control strength to align with the diffusion model's native capabilities and thereby enhance perceptual quality. Our method is compatible with a variety of linear stochastic differential equation backbones. Extensive experiments across a broad spectrum of image inverse tasks demonstrate that SOCS achieves accurate measurement-aligned reconstructions with improved visual fidelity and stronger quantitative performance.

</details>


### [50] [BREIT: A Framework for Brain Stroke Reconstruction using Multi-Frequency 3D EIT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28787)
*Djahid Abdelmoumene,Ishak Ayad,Maï K. Nguyen,Christian Daveau*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: BREIT是一个用于3D多频电阻抗断层扫描(MF-EIT)卒中重建的模块化框架，包含神经影像到EIT的转换管道、3D前向求解器和改进的D-bar算法，并提出了dFNO-bar方法将傅里叶神经算子集成到D-bar中，在合成数据上取得了更好的重建效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前3D MF-EIT卒中成像面临两个主要挑战：缺乏大规模带地面真值配对的训练数据集，以及缺乏用于数据生成、模拟和评估的标准化管道。这限制了深度学习重建方法在EIT领域的发展。

Method: 1. 开发BREIT框架，包含：(i)神经影像到EIT的管道，将CT/MRI转换为频率相关的导纳率地面真值；(ii)自包含的Python 3D完整电极模型前向求解器；(iii)支持非均匀电极布局的3D D-bar实现。2. 提出dFNO-bar方法，将傅里叶神经算子集成到D-bar算法中，学习从散射数据t(ξ)到电导率σ(x)的映射。

Result: 在UCLH匹配的合成数据上评估dFNO-bar，与D-bar、Deep D-bar和高斯-牛顿重建方法相比，dFNO-bar在保持可比较的相关性系数(CC)的同时，在多种噪声设置下都获得了更高的大脑结构相似性指数(SSIM)。

Conclusion: BREIT框架为3D MF-EIT卒中重建提供了标准化的数据生成和评估管道，而dFNO-bar方法通过将傅里叶神经算子集成到D-bar中，显著提高了重建质量，为EIT领域的数据集创建和算法开发提供了有价值的工具。

Abstract: Multi-Frequency Electrical Impedance Tomography (MF-EIT) is a non-invasive, low-cost modality that reconstructs electrical property distributions from boundary voltages. For stroke imaging, progress in 3D deep-learning reconstruction is limited by the lack of large-scale datasets with paired ground-truth (GT) volumes and by non-standardized pipelines for data generation, simulation, and evaluation. We introduce BREIT, a modular framework for 3D MF-EIT stroke reconstruction providing: (i) a neuroimaging-to-EIT pipeline that converts CT/MRI into frequency-dependent GT admittivity volumes; (ii) a self-contained Python 3D Complete Electrode Model (CEM) forward solver for simulating MF-EIT voltages; and (iii) a 3D D-bar implementation supporting non-uniform electrode layouts. Building on BREIT, we propose dFNO-bar, which integrates Fourier Neural Operators into D-bar by learning a mapping from scattering data $t(ξ)$ to conductivity $σ(x){=}\Re\{γ\}$. We evaluate dFNO-bar against D-bar, Deep D-bar, and Gauss--Newton reconstructions on UCLH-matched synthetic data, and observe higher brain SSIM with comparable CC across noise settings. Code and data are publicly available at: https://github.com/djahiddj13/BREIT

</details>


### [51] [Virtual Ring Try-On](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28792)
*Vishnu D. Burkhawala,Zankhana J. Barad,Harshadkumar B. Prajapati,Vipul K. Dabhi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 基于React Native的移动应用，通过MediaPipe手部关键点检测和YOLO-V8自定义目标检测实现虚拟试戴戒指功能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 让用户能够通过手机应用拍摄手部照片并虚拟试戴戒指，提供便捷的在线购物体验，解决传统珠宝购买中无法试戴的痛点

Method: 1. 使用React Native构建移动应用界面；2. 通过MediaPipe检测手部关键点并生成戒指放置区域ROI掩码；3. 使用YOLO-V8检测戒指并去除背景；4. 通过向量代数计算手指参考轴与戒指主轴的角度差异；5. 根据手指厚度缩放戒指尺寸并保持纵横比；6. 将处理后的戒指图像合成到手部图像上

Result: 开发了一个能够实现虚拟戒指试戴的移动应用，用户可以通过拍摄手部照片并选择戒指样式，系统自动将戒指准确贴合到手部图像上，生成逼真的试戴效果图

Conclusion: 该研究成功结合了计算机视觉技术和移动应用开发，实现了实用的虚拟戒指试戴系统，为珠宝电商提供了创新的用户体验解决方案

Abstract: This paper presents an innovative approach that enables the users to capture their hand and try the jewel ring on their hand. The user captures the image of the hand using the React Native base GUI of the mobile application and selects the ring that the user wants to try, and the output image will have the user's hand with the ring image. This approach is implemented using a combination of MediaPipe hand point detection and YOLO-V8 custom object detection. The hand image uploaded by the user first undergoes mediapipe hand point detection. It will give the hand points and a Region of Interest mask where the ring is going to be placed. Then the ring is passed through YOLO object detection, in which ring points are detected, and background is removed. After that, using vector algebra, the angular discrepancy between the finger's reference axis and the ring's principal axis is computed. Also, ring size is rescaled according to finger thickness, preserving the aspect ratio to maintain perceptual realism. Then the ring is placed on the hand image and the output image is generated and shown on the user screen.

</details>


### [52] [PSP: Harnessing Position and Shape Priors for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Medical Image Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28799)
*Bin Xu,Yazhou Zhu,Haofeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种利用位置和形状先验（PSP）的跨域少样本医学图像分割框架，通过位置坐标嵌入、形状原型调制和混合原型预测三个模块，有效解决跨模态纹理差异导致的性能下降问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 少样本医学图像分割（FSMIS）在跨不同成像模态时存在性能崩溃问题，主要原因是域间纹理差异显著，导致模型被源域特定的强度分布误导。现有方法尝试对齐频率或局部纹理特征，但往往无法将语义结构与域特定外观解耦。

Method: 提出PSP框架，包含三个核心模块：1）位置坐标嵌入（PCE）模块，注入相对空间坐标实现快速器官定位；2）形状原型调制（SPM）模块，通过显式形状先验构建域不变结构原型，过滤纹理噪声；3）混合原型预测（HPP）模块，自适应校准支持原型到查询特征分布，缓解特征错位。

Result: 在两个公共医学影像数据集上的广泛实验表明，PSP显著优于最先进的方法。

Conclusion: 通过利用器官位置和几何形状在跨模态中的不变性，PSP框架有效解决了跨域少样本医学图像分割中的纹理差异问题，实现了更好的泛化性能。

Abstract: Few-Shot Medical Image Segmentation (FSMIS) offers a powerful solution to data scarcity but struggles to generalize across different imaging modalities. This performance collapse stems primarily from the drastic texture discrepancies between domains, which mislead models trained on source-specific intensity distributions. While existing methods attempt to align frequency or local texture features, they often fail to decouple semantic structure from domain-specific appearance. To address this, we identify a critical invariance: despite distinct imaging physics, the position and geometric shape of organs remain robustly consistent across modalities. Therefore, we propose a novel framework that harnesses Position and Shape Priors (PSP) for cross-domain FSMIS. Specifically, PSP first introduces a Position Coordinate Embedding (PCE) module to inject relative spatial coordinates for rapid organ localization. Subsequently, a Shape Prototype Modulation (SPM) module constructs domain-invariant structural prototypes via explicit shape priors, effectively filtering out texture noise. Furthermore, the Hybrid-Prototype Prediction (HPP) module adaptively calibrates the support prototype to the query feature distribution, mitigating feature misalignment. Extensive experiments on two public medical imaging datasets demonstrate that PSP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [53] [ViPSim: Collaborating Visual and Parameter Spaces for Consistent Long-Horizon Embodied World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28804)
*Longyu Chen,Heng Li,Wei Yang,Manqi Zhao,Dongsheng Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ViPSim提出了一种通过视觉空间和参数空间协同合作来实现一致长时程生成的框架，解决了具身世界模型在评估基准和基础模拟器中因低维动作与高维视频合成之间的表示差距而导致的可靠性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前具身世界模型作为评估基准和基础模拟器时，由于低维动作与高维视频合成之间的表示差距，导致缺乏几何对应关系，表现为长时程推演中累积的轨迹漂移和不一致的机器人-物体交互，这影响了其可靠性。

Method: ViPSim框架通过视觉空间和参数空间的协同合作实现一致长时程生成。视觉空间作为显式空间先验领域，整合末端执行器姿态的像素对齐投影、相机视角、深度感知的场景几何和机器人形态掩码，提供密集结构基础；参数空间作为数值驱动领域，注入原始动作序列和相机矩阵，提供精确运动指导。通过统一这两个空间，确保生成的状态同时锚定在几何边界并由数值命令引导。

Result: 实验表明ViPSim是骨干无关的，并显著增强了轨迹一致性。该方法在与可变形物体（如布料折叠）的复杂交互生成中表现出涌现能力，并在分布外和跨具身场景中保持鲁棒性能，为具身代理的自动化评估和预测控制提供了高保真基础。

Conclusion: ViPSim通过统一视觉空间和参数空间，有效解决了具身世界模型中的表示差距问题，实现了一致的长时程生成，提高了评估基准和模拟器的可靠性，为具身智能的自动化评估和预测控制提供了高质量基础。

Abstract: Embodied World Models (EWMs) have emerged as a scalable and risk-free paradigm for advancing embodied intelligence, enabling the safety-critical evaluation of Vision-Language-Action systems. However, their reliability as evaluation benchmarks and foundational simulators is often hindered by the representation gap between low-dimensional actions and high-dimensional video synthesis. This gap results in a lack of geometric correspondence, manifesting as accumulated trajectory drift and inconsistent robot-object interactions during long-horizon rollouts. To bridge this gap, we propose ViPSim, a framework that achieves consistent long-horizon generation through the synergistic collaboration of Visual and Parameter Spaces. We define the Visual Space as a domain of explicit spatial priors, integrating pixel-aligned projections of end-effector pose, camera perspectives, depth-informed scene geometry, and robotic morphological masks to provide dense structural grounding. Concurrently, the Parameter Space serves as a domain of numerical drivers, injecting raw action sequences and camera matrices to provide precise motion guidance. By unifying these two spaces, ViPSim ensures that the generated states are simultaneously anchored by geometric boundaries and steered by numerical commands. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ViPSim is backbone-agnostic and significantly enhances trajectory consistency. Notably, our approach exhibits emergent capabilities in generating complex interactions with deformable objects (e.g., cloth folding) and maintains robust performance in out-of-distribution and cross-embodiment scenarios, providing a high-fidelity foundation for the automated evaluation and predictive control of embodied agents.

</details>


### [54] [CoGS: Compositional Dynamic Human-Object Scenes Gaussian Splatting from Monocular Video](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28820)
*Jerrin Bright,John Zelek*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CoGS是一个基于组合高斯泼溅的单目视频人-物交互场景重建框架，通过分解为人体、物体和背景三个分支，解决了传统方法中运动纠缠的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从单目视频重建动态人-物交互场景很困难，因为人体、被操纵物体和背景遵循不同的运动模型但共享相同像素。现有动态辐射场和高斯泼溅方法通常将这些组件纠缠在一起，导致物体运动泄漏到人体或静态场景中，且单目人体重建在很少观察到的区域仍然约束不足。

Method: CoGS将视频分解为三个协调分支：从完整规范先验初始化的关节人体、由估计物体轨迹驱动的刚性物体场、以及当可用时由弱场景平面原语正则化的静态场景场。采用六阶段优化计划，先独立稳定人体和物体，然后将它们与场景融合，使用全图像监督、可见性感知人体锚定、物体轮廓和运动约束，以及延迟场景正则化。

Result: 在HOSNeRF和NeuMan数据集上的实验表明，CoGS改进了人-物交互重建和野外人-场景渲染，在全帧和人体聚焦评估中实现了更强的保真度和感知质量。

Conclusion: CoGS通过组合分解方法有效解决了动态场景重建中的运动纠缠问题，使每个组件负责自己的几何和运动，同时允许光度证据修正最终合成，为单目人-物交互场景重建提供了更优的解决方案。

Abstract: Reconstructing dynamic human--object interaction scenes from monocular video is difficult because the human, manipulated object, and background obey different motion models while sharing the same pixels. Existing dynamic radiance-field and Gaussian-splatting methods often entangle these components, causing object motion to leak into the human or static scene, and monocular human reconstruction remains underconstrained in regions that are rarely observed. We present CoGS, a compositional Gaussian-splatting framework for monocular human--object scene reconstruction. CoGS decomposes the video into three coordinated branches: an articulated human initialized from a complete canonical prior, a rigid object field driven by an estimated object trajectory, and a static scene field regularized by weak scene-only planar primitives when available. A six-stage optimization schedule first stabilizes the human and object independently, then fuses them with the scene under full-image supervision, visibility-aware human anchoring, object silhouette and motion constraints, and delayed scene regularization. This design keeps each component responsible for its own geometry and motion while allowing photometric evidence to correct the final composite. Experiments on HOSNeRF and NeuMan show that CoGS improves both human--object interaction reconstruction and in-the-wild human--scene rendering, achieving stronger fidelity and perceptual quality across full-frame and human-focused evaluations. Code will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [55] [RefGlass-GS: A UAV-Enabled Fusion Framework for Photorealistic, Semantic and Interactive Digitization of Reflective Glass Facades via Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28826)
*Zhenyu Liang,Xiao Zhang,Boyu Wang,Zhaolun Liang,Ang Li,Jeff Chak Fu Chan,Mingzhu Wang,Jack C. P. Cheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RefGlass-GS 是一个端到端无人机框架，用于对反射玻璃幕墙进行高保真、语义化和交互式数字化，解决了现有方法在几何重建、纹理渲染和语义增强方面的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有建筑数字化方法在处理反射玻璃幕墙时面临几何重建失真、视点依赖纹理渲染不真实、以及基于对象的语义增强困难等问题，需要一种专门针对反射玻璃幕墙的完整解决方案。

Method: 提出 RefGlass-GS 融合框架，包含四个关键技术：(1) 基于最大后验估计和结构正则化的玻璃面板分割方法；(2) 最大化视点依赖外观覆盖的无人机视点规划优化函数；(3) 带有反射MLP、延迟着色函数和增强正则化项的优化高斯泼溅框架；(4) 基于对象的标准化数据组织范式。

Result: 在真实反射玻璃幕墙场景上的实验验证了方法的有效性：玻璃面板分割mIoU提升0.1927，实现实例级面板提取；无人机视点规划相比商业方法PSNR提升13.15dB；RefGlass-GS建模相比SOTA高斯泼溅方法平均PSNR提升5.08dB。

Conclusion: RefGlass-GS 成功实现了对反射玻璃幕墙的端到端高保真、语义化和交互式数字化，为数字孪生平台上的交互式设施管理提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Existing digitization of buildings with reflective glass facades suffers from geometric reconstruction distortion, unrealistic view-dependent texture rendering, and difficulties in object-based semantic enhancement. Therefore, we propose RefGlass-GS, a fusion framework that enables end-to-end UAV-based photorealistic, semantic, and interactive digitization of reflective glass facades. The contributions include: (1) proposing an individual glass panel segmentation method based on maximum a posteriori estimation with structural regularities, robust to severe reflection and background interference; (2) formulating a UAV viewpoint planning optimization function that maximizes the coverage of view-dependent appearance for sufficient data capture; (3) developing an optimized Gaussian Splatting framework with a Reflection MLP, a novel deferred shading function, and two enhanced regularization terms for effective modeling of high-frequency near-field reflections; (4) introducing a standardized data organization paradigm for structuring GS-based representations into object-based models, facilitating interactive facility management on digital twin platforms. Experiments on real-world reflective glass facade scenes validate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method. Specifically, the glass panel segmentation achieves an improvement of 0.1927 in mIoU over SOTA methods, and only our method enables instance-level panel extraction. The UAV view planning improves novel view synthesis for reflective facades by 13.15 dB in PSNR compared to commercially used nap-of-the-object planning methods. The RefGlass-GS modeling outperforms SOTA Gaussian Splatting approaches for reflective scenes with an average improvement of 5.08 dB in PSNR.

</details>


### [56] [Ground4D: Consistency-Aware 4D Reconstruction from Monocular Video](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28828)
*Qing Zhao,Weijian Deng,Pengxu Wei,Liang Lin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Ground4D是一个两阶段框架，通过3D基础模型进行几何初始化，然后通过动态高斯泼溅进行几何一致性感知的细化，从单目视频学习4D场景表示，实现动态新视角合成并保持几何一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从单目视频学习4D场景表示，既要支持动态新视角合成，又要保持几何一致性。现有方法如动态高斯泼溅有渲染优势但缺乏多视角几何一致性，而3D基础模型有几何一致性但不适合真实感渲染。

Method: 两阶段框架：1) 通过3D基础模型(VGGT)进行几何初始化，无需训练地重建多视角一致的3D几何和相机位姿；2) 通过动态高斯泼溅进行几何一致性感知细化，在可微渲染优化中保持多视角几何一致性。

Result: Ground4D通过将基础级几何先验整合到动态高斯优化中，实现了更强的重建保真度和渲染性能，能够自然支持任意时间戳的渲染。

Conclusion: 几何基础约束在鲁棒的4D场景建模中发挥关键作用，Ground4D展示了通过整合几何先验来提升动态场景表示性能的有效性。

Abstract: Learning a 4D scene representation from a single monocular video that supports dynamic novel-view synthesis while maintaining faithful geometry over time remains challenging. Dynamic Gaussian Splatting achieves strong rendering performance through photometric optimization, yet does not explicitly enforce multi-view geometric consistency. In contrast, 3D foundation models recover coherent scene geometry and camera motion, but their point-based outputs are not designed for photorealistic rendering. We propose Ground4D, a geometry-grounded framework built on two stages. First, we perform geometry initialization via 3D foundation models, leveraging VGGT in a training-free manner to reconstruct multi-view-consistent 3D geometry and camera poses from monocular video. The recovered geometry provides a structured and reliable initialization for dynamic Gaussian representations. Second, we conduct geometry-consistency-aware refinement via dynamic Gaussian Splatting, optimizing the representation through differentiable rendering while maintaining multi-view geometric consistency across both observed and synthesized viewpoints. Furthermore, Ground4D inherently models the continuous 4D dynamics of the scene, naturally supporting rendering at arbitrary timestamps. By integrating foundation-level geometric priors into dynamic Gaussian optimization, Ground4D achieves stronger reconstruction fidelity and rendering performance, underscoring the role of geometry-grounded constraints in robust 4D scene modeling.

</details>


### [57] [DLGStream: Dynamic Language-embedded Guassian Splatting for Open-vocabulary Enabled Free-viewpoint Video Streaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28840)
*Zhihui Ke,Yuyang Liu,Xiaobo Zhou,Tie Qiu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DLGStream提出了一种支持语言嵌入的自由视点视频表示方法，通过双不透明度动态语言高斯表示和插值变形场，在保持小帧尺寸的同时实现4D环境交互、场景编辑和空间智能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅技术虽然能重建自由视点视频，但缺乏用户交互和编辑能力，影响沉浸体验。现有语言高斯表示由于自由视点视频对低帧尺寸和高FPS的严格要求，不适合语言嵌入的自由视点视频应用。

Method: 提出双不透明度动态语言高斯表示，为颜色和语言特征分别维护不透明度属性以解决联合优化时的性能下降问题；引入插值变形场减少时间冗余，同时支持4D帧插值提升FPS。

Result: DLGStream在开放词汇分割和重建质量方面均取得优越性能，平均帧尺寸仅为43KB，能够有效支持4D环境交互、场景编辑和空间智能。

Conclusion: DLGStream成功实现了高效的语言嵌入自由视点视频表示，在保持小帧尺寸的同时实现了交互和编辑功能，为沉浸式体验提供了新的技术方案。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting~(3DGS) has emerged as a promising paradigm for reconstructing streamable free-viewpoint video~(FVV) from multi-view videos. However, 3DGS-based FVVs typically lack user interaction and editing capabilities, which diminishes the immersive experience. Recent research has integrated language features from CLIP into 3DGS via distillation, enabling open-vocabulary queries and supporting many downstream applications. Nevertheless, the stringent requirements of FVV, low frame size and high FPS, make current language Gaussian representations unsuitable for language-embedded FVV. In this paper, we propose DLGStream, a novel language-embedded FVV representation that streams time-varying language features alongside Gaussian attributes to support 4D environment interaction, scene editing, and spatial intelligence. Specifically, we propose a dual-opacity dynamic language Gaussian representation, which maintains two opacity attributes for color and language features to deal with performance degradation that occurs when colors and features are jointly optimized. Furthermore, we introduce an interpolation-based deformation field to reduce temporal redundancy. This deformation field can also be used for 4D frame interpolation, boosting FVV sequences from low to high FPS. Experimental results demonstrate that DLGStream achieves superior performance in both on open-vocabulary segmentation and reconstruction quality with an average frame size of merely 43 KB. The code is available on \href{https://github.com/kkkzh/DLGStream}{https://github.com/kkkzh/DLGStream}.

</details>


### [58] [Personalizing MLLMs via Reinforced Multimodal Reference Game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28845)
*Deepayan Das,Davide Talon,Yiming Wang,Massimiliano Mancini,Elisa Ricci*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RRG框架通过强化多模态参考游戏，让MLLM在对比游戏中同时扮演说话者和倾听者角色，生成具有区分性的个人概念描述，从而提升MLLM个性化识别能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM个性化方法中的概念描述常包含状态和上下文等无关信息，这些信息不仅无助于识别目标概念，反而可能干扰对视觉相似物品的区分。需要准确、具有区分性且无干扰细节的描述来有效识别个人概念。

Method: 提出强化参考游戏（RRG）学习框架，通过新颖的强化多模态参考游戏促进区分性描述生成。MLLM在对比游戏设置中同时扮演说话者和倾听者角色，目标是有效传达目标概念的区分性信息。该方法基于硬正例（同一概念的不同视图）和硬负例（视觉相似但不同的概念）制定可验证的对比奖励。

Result: 在三个个性化基准测试的多个任务中达到最先进水平。RRG能够泛化到未见领域，并优于基于概念描述和个性化特定RL框架的现有方法。

Conclusion: RRG框架通过强化对比学习有效提升了MLLM对个人概念的区分性描述能力，在个性化任务中表现出优越性能，具有良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: Personalizing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) aims to recognize users' unique concepts from visual data and provide personalized responses. Although prior work has shown the benefit of concept descriptions and reasoning for this task, MLLM descriptions often include information, such as state and context, that does not help and may in fact hinder the unique identification of the target concept among other visually similar items. Effective descriptions of personal concepts should instead be accurate, discriminative, and free of distracting details. To achieve such descriptions, we introduce Reinforced Reference Game (RRG), a learning framework that promotes discriminative descriptions through a novel reinforced multimodal reference game. The MLLM plays both the roles of speaker and listener in a contrastive game setting, whose goal is to effectively communicate discriminative information about a target concept. Our approach formulates a verifiable contrastive reward over hard positives (dissimilar views of the same concept) and hard negatives (visually similar but different concepts). Empirically, RRG achieves state-of-the-art across multiple tasks on three personalization benchmarks. RRG generalizes to unseen domains and outperforms existing methods based on concept descriptions and personalization-specific RL frameworks. We will release code and models in the project page.

</details>


### [59] [EpiSAM: Character Segmentation in Challenging Stone Inscriptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28859)
*Arnav Sharma,Pratyush Jena,Amal Joseph,Ravi Kiran Sarvadevabhatla*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EpiSAM：一个用于石碑文字字符分割的提示引导Transformer框架，通过邻域感知策略提升分割准确性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 石碑文字是宝贵的历史和语言学资源，但由于表面不规则、侵蚀和低视觉对比度，其自动化分析面临重大挑战。传统文档和手写分析技术在这些场景中表现不佳。

Method: 提出EpiSAM框架，采用提示引导的Transformer进行石碑文字字符分割。创新性地使用邻域感知策略，在预测目标字符时同时预测相邻字符，利用上下文线索解决边界模糊问题，提升掩码生成质量。

Result: EpiSAM在现有基准上实现了持续改进，同时在具有挑战性的碑文场景中表现出强大的零样本泛化能力。研究还扩展了现有石碑文字数据集，添加了密集的多边形字符标注。

Conclusion: 字符检测是鲁棒碑文分析的核心策略，EpiSAM通过邻域感知的字符分割方法有效解决了传统技术难以处理的石碑文字分析问题，为东南亚碑文研究提供了全面支持。

Abstract: Stone inscriptions are invaluable sources of historical and linguistic knowledge, yet their automated analysis remains a major challenge due to surface irregularities, erosion, and low visual contrast. Conventional document and handwriting analysis techniques fail to perform well in these scenarios. In this work, we propose character detection as a core strategy for robust inscription analysis. We introduce EpiSAM, a prompt-guided transformer framework for character segmentation in stone inscriptions. Rather than treating characters in isolation, EpiSAM employs a novel neighbor-aware strategy, explicitly predicting adjacent characters alongside the target. These contextual cues resolve boundary ambiguities, improving mask generation and enabling more accurate character segmentation. Furthermore, we expand an existing stone inscription dataset by adding dense polygonal annotations for characters, thereby enabling comprehensive research on Southeast Asian epigraphy. Experimental results show that EpiSAM achieves consistent improvements over existing baselines, while also exhibiting strong zero-shot generalization in challenging epigraphic scenarios.

</details>


### [60] [HKVLM: Faithful Reasoning Grounding by Binding Language Queries to a Frozen Detector](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28862)
*Bo Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HKVLM通过分离定位与语言生成路径来解决视觉语言模型中的绑定问题，使用冻结检测器生成区域建议，语言模型编码推理指令，通过轻量级对齐钩子进行绑定，仅训练钩子模块即可显著提升定位准确度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在视觉推理任务中存在"看到但说错"的绑定失败问题：定位信息通过自回归头传递，与语言生成耦合；或两阶段流程中模型意图被压缩为单一类别字符串。需要解耦定位与语言路径，实现更可靠的视觉推理。

Method: HKVLM采用三组件架构：1) 冻结的语言对齐检测器生成类别无关区域建议；2) 冻结语言模型编码推理指令为参考查询嵌入；3) 轻量级对齐钩子通过对比检索和二分图分配在共享嵌入空间绑定查询与区域。感知基础的真实性否决机制防止命名无区域支持的对象。

Result: 仅训练对齐钩子即可将定位准确度提升50-90倍；真实性否决机制将POPE准确度从接近随机(0.50)提升至0.66-0.76，幻觉率从~0.99降至0.23-0.43；增加区域建议数量(M=50到M=300)可将定位准确度提升19-24%，表明剩余误差主要来自感知而非绑定。

Conclusion: HKVLM通过解耦定位与语言路径，仅训练轻量级对齐钩子，在少量数据冷启动场景下显著改善了视觉语言模型的绑定问题，为视觉推理任务提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Many visual requests -- ``the object to open this bottle'', ``the person not wearing a helmet'' -- require reasoning, not just category matching. Pure open-vocabulary detectors need an explicit phrase; vision-language models (VLMs) can reason yet ``see but mis-speak'', attending to the right region but returning the wrong box or label. We argue this is a \emph{binding} failure: in coordinate-as-text VLMs localization passes through the autoregressive head, coupling it to language generation; in two-stage pipelines the model's intent is squeezed through a single class string. We present HKVLM, which removes localization from the language path. A frozen, language-aligned detector emits class-agnostic region proposals; a frozen language model encodes reasoning instructions as referential query embeddings; a lightweight \emph{alignment hook} binds queries to regions by contrastive retrieval and bipartite assignment in a shared embedding space. A perception-grounded faithfulness veto forbids naming an object that no region supports. Only the hook is trained, targeting small-data cold-start settings where monolithic VLM tuning struggles. We formalize a \emph{say-vs-see} decomposition separating localization error (SeeErr) from binding error (SayErr), and evaluate on RefCOCO/RefCOCO+/RefCOCOg and POPE. With frozen Grounding DINO and Qwen2.5-VL, training only the hook lifts grounding accuracy by $50$--$90\times$ over untrained cross-space matching; the faithfulness veto raises POPE accuracy from near-chance ($0.50$) to $0.66$--$0.76$ and reduces hallucination from ${\sim}0.99$ to $0.23$--$0.43$, with gains from $200$ expressions. Increasing proposals from $M{=}50$ to $M{=}300$ improves grounding by $19$--$24\%$ without retraining, confirming that residual error is perceptual (SeeErr) rather than binding (SayErr).

</details>


### [61] [On Test-Time Scaling for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28864)
*Fawaz Sammani,Tzoulio Chamiti,Nikos Deligiannis*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 测试时扩展（test-time scaling）方法在大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）上的首次全面研究，发现传统为LLMs开发的方法可直接应用于LVLMs，但小模型受益最大，且LVLMs在计算资源过多时会失去焦点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然测试时扩展在大型语言模型（LLMs）中已被广泛研究，但其在大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）中的应用仍缺乏深入探索和分析。本研究旨在回答一个基本问题：为LLMs开发的传统测试时扩展方法能否直接应用于LVLMs？

Method: 对LVLMs进行首次全面的测试时扩展研究，涵盖多个模型和模型大小、九种测试时扩展方法，以及在六个多样化基准测试上的评估。

Result: 1) 与先前发现不同，小型高性能模型从测试时扩展中受益最大，性能提升可达约30%，能达到甚至超越大型模型性能；2) LVLMs在获得超出必要计算资源时会失去焦点；3) 视觉信息在推理链早期被编码，之后推理链主要由纯文本推理主导，图像token的贡献显著下降。

Conclusion: 研究为LVLMs的测试时扩展提供了实用指导和深入见解，揭示了小模型通过扩展计算可获得显著性能提升，同时指出了LVLMs推理过程中视觉信息处理的局限性，为研究和工业部署提供了重要参考。

Abstract: Test-time scaling is a paradigm where large models use additional compute at inference to achieve better performance, without changing model weights. While it has been widely studied for Large Language Models (LLMs), its applicability to Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) remains less explored and analyzed, with limited analysis of whether, when, and to what extent these approaches transfer to LVLMs. In this work, we ask a simple but fundamental question: can conventional test-time scaling methods developed for LLMs be directly applied to LVLMs? We present the first comprehensive study of test-time scaling for LVLMs, spanning multiple models and model sizes, nine test-time scaling methods, and six diverse benchmarks. Our main findings is that 1) different from previous findings, small, well-performing models benefit the most from test-time scaling, enabling performance improvements of up to around 30\%, reaching large models performance, and often outperforming them, 2) LVLMs lose focus when given more compute than necessary, and 3) Visual information is encoded early in the reasoning chain, after which the chain is dominated by text-only reasoning and the contribution of image tokens drops significantly. Finally, we also provide a global and fine-grained analysis on the quality and information sufficiency of the reasoning chains produced. Overall, our findings and analysis provide practical guidance and insights into LVLMs and their deployment in research and industry.

</details>


### [62] [Projection-based coupling of infrared thermography and stereocorrelation-based digital image correlation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28905)
*Jendrik-Alexander Tröger,Lutz Müller-Lohse,Stefan Hartmann*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种基于外部投影的耦合方法，将红外热成像的2D温度数据与立体数字图像相关的3D点坐标关联，特别适用于曲面分析，并通过径向基函数插值提供丰富的全场数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的全场测量技术（如数字图像相关和红外热成像）在分析非平面表面时，需要复杂的过程才能在同一个拉格朗日框架中表达两种数据集。本研究旨在解决这一难题。

Method: 使用针孔相机模型进行外部投影耦合，将红外热成像的2D温度数据与立体数字图像相关的3D点坐标关联。通过单个参考物体图像校准相机模型的投影矩阵，并使用径向基函数进行时空全局插值。

Result: 温度场能够准确地在材料点上表示，该方法特别适用于曲面分析，且易于嵌入现有实验协议中。通过径向基函数插值可以计算曲面上的面内温度梯度甚至温度变化率。

Conclusion: 提出的外部投影耦合方法为曲面分析提供了一种简单有效的解决方案，能够生成信息丰富的全场数据集，扩展了现有实验技术的应用范围。

Abstract: Full-field measurement techniques such as digital image correlation and infrared thermography are prevalent in experimental solid mechanics. Digital image correlation is used to analyze surface deformation, while infrared thermography quantifies surface temperature fields. However, sophisticated procedures are necessary to express both datasets in the same Lagrangian frame, especially when analyzing non-flat surfaces. In this study, we propose an external projection-based coupling that uses the pinhole camera model to relate two-dimensional temperature data measured by infrared thermography to three-dimensional point coordinates from stereocorrelation-based digital image correlation. Unlike existing multiview approaches, we utilize two independently calibrated industrial-grade systems and augment the experimental evaluation with the pinhole camera model. The projection matrix of the camera model is calibrated using a single image of a reference object. Through this projection, temperature fields are accurately represented at material points. Our method is particularly suited for, but not restricted to, curved surfaces and straightforward to embed in existing experimental protocols, as the image registration is kept as is. Additionally, we propose using radial basis functions as a global interpolation ansatz in both space and time to compute in-plane temperature gradients and even temperature rates on curved surfaces, thereby providing an extensive and information-rich full-field dataset.

</details>


### [63] [What Color is the Sky (for a non-human) ?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28912)
*Yair Weiss,Ofer Springer*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种计算任意视觉系统中单色同色异谱的方法，并应用于多种物种的天空光颜色感知分析，发现不同物种对天空光的单色同色异谱主波长差异显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索人类视觉系统之外的其他生物如何感知天空颜色。由于不同物种的视锥细胞响应函数不同，它们对天空光的颜色感知可能与人类完全不同。

Method: 提出了一种简单的计算方法，用于确定任意视觉系统中给定输入光的单色同色异谱。使用已发表的各种物种光谱敏感度函数数据，计算天空光的单色同色异谱主波长。

Result: 研究发现多种物种（包括二色视、三色视和四色视动物）都存在天空光的单色同色异谱，但这些同色异谱的主波长在不同物种间差异显著，且与人类感知的颜色完全不同。

Conclusion: 颜色感知是高度依赖于视觉系统的，天空的"颜色"对不同物种来说是不同的。该计算方法为研究不同生物的颜色感知提供了有效工具。

Abstract: The light of the daytime sky contains a mixture of many colors yet is perceived as blue by human observers. This is largely due to the particular response functions of the human cones. Under these response functions skylight and blue light are metamers: they yield the exact same excitation of the cones. In this paper we ask: is it possible to define the ``color'' of the sky for other visual systems? We present a simple computational method to determine monochromatic metamers to a given input light for arbitrary visual systems. Using published values on spectral sensitivity functions of various species, we use our method to determine the dominant wavelength of monochromatic metamers to skylight. For a wide range of species (bichromats, trichromats and tetrachormats) we find monochromatic metamers to skylight but the dominant wavelength of the metamer can vary drastically between species and be very different from the color perceived by humans.

</details>


### [64] [ExACT: Exemplar-Driven Calibrated Refinement for Training-Free Visual Grounding in Remote Sensing Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28920)
*Zixiao Zhang,Lingling Li,Pei He,Xu Liu,Licheng Jiao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ExACT 是一个无需训练的框架，通过单次视觉提示机制，利用视觉范例提供判别性结构指导，以解决遥感视觉定位中多模态大语言模型与细粒度视觉线索之间的模态鸿沟问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遥感视觉定位（RSVG）旨在使用自然语言描述定位高分辨率遥感图像中的特定物体。虽然多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在开放词汇RSVG方面显示出巨大潜力，但由于抽象语言语义与细粒度视觉线索之间的模态鸿沟，其无需训练的适应受到阻碍，导致在杂乱遥感场景中产生严重的定位漂移。

Method: 提出Exemplar-driven Calibrated Refinement (ExACT)框架，包含：1) Vision Exemplar-based Calibrator (VEC)：从给定范例中提取细粒度视觉对应关系，修正冻结MLLMs的粗略跨模态先验；2) Structure-Aware Refiner (SAR)：采用迭代合并选择聚类策略，将校准后的先验整合为高质量的正负几何提示；3) 使用Segment Anything Model (SAM)在提示指导下实现精确像素级预测。

Result: 大量实验证实ExACT优于现有的无需训练和弱监督方法。

Conclusion: ExACT通过单次视觉提示机制有效弥合了语言语义与视觉线索之间的模态鸿沟，显著提升了遥感视觉定位的精度，为无需训练的开放词汇RSVG提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Remote sensing visual grounding (RSVG) aims to locate specific objects in high-resolution RS imagery using free-form natural language descriptions. While recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show great potential for such open-vocabulary RSVG, their training-free adaptation is hindered by the modality gap between abstract linguistic semantics and fine-grained visual cues. In cluttered RS scenes, this gap inevitably causes severe localization drift. To bridge this gap, we propose Exemplar-driven Calibrated Refinement (ExACT), a novel training-free framework driven by a one-shot visual prompting mechanism to explicitly provide discriminative structural guidance for precise pixel-level localization. Specifically, we propose a Vision Exemplar-based Calibrator (VEC) that extracts fine-grained visual correspondences from the given exemplar to rectify the rough cross-modal priors from frozen MLLMs, effectively suppressing background artifacts and accurately outlining target boundaries. Subsequently, a Structure-Aware Refiner (SAR) employs an iterative merge-and-select clustering strategy to consolidate the calibrated priors into high-quality positive and negative geometric prompts. These prompts then guide the Segment Anything Model (SAM) to achieve precise pixel-level predictions. Extensive experiments confirm the superiority of ExACT over existing training-free and weakly-supervised methods.

</details>


### [65] [Character Recognition of Nepali Number Plate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28946)
*Satyasa Khadka,Sandhya Baral,Sudip Tiwari,Sharad Kumar Ghimire*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 针对尼泊尔车牌（使用天城体文字）的自动车牌识别系统，采用YOLO进行车牌和字符检测，CNN进行字符分类，在真实条件下达到93%的识别准确率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尼泊尔车牌使用天城体文字（Devanagari script），现有车牌识别系统主要针对拉丁字母，需要专门为尼泊尔车牌设计识别系统，以支持交通管理应用。

Method: 采用流水线模型：1) 使用YOLO模型进行车牌检测；2) 使用YOLO模型进行字符检测；3) 使用CNN分类器对34个天城体字符进行分类。使用两个公开数据集，包含不同光照、字体和结构变化。通过数据增强和针对压花车牌的额外训练提高模型泛化能力。

Result: 系统识别准确率达到93%，在真实世界条件下表现出色，为尼泊尔交通管理提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Conclusion: 该系统针对尼泊尔车牌设计，采用深度学习流水线，在多样化的真实条件下实现了高准确率的车牌识别，为尼泊尔交通管理提供了有效的技术解决方案。

Abstract: This paper presents a robust Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR) system tailored for Nepali license plates written in Devanagari script. In this paper, a pipelined model was used that integrates YOLO-based models for license plate and character detection, followed by a CNN classifier trained on 34 Devanagari characters. Two publicly available data sets were used that incorporate diverse lighting, fonts, and structural variations. Data augmentation and additional training on embossed plates enhanced the generalizability of the model. The system achieved a recognition accuracy of up to 93\%, demonstrating strong performance under real-world conditions and providing a scalable solution for traffic management in Nepal. Code: https://github.com/Satyasakhadka/Nepali-NumberPlate-Character-Recognition

</details>


### [66] [Self-Evolving Agentic Image Restoration via Deliberate Planning and Intuitive Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28971)
*Shuang Cui,Fan Ji,Guanglong Sun,Yufei Guo,Xiongxin Tang,Jiangmeng Li,Fanjiang Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SEAR提出了一种自演进的智能图像修复框架，通过双系统架构（直觉执行器与深思熟虑规划器）解决现有代理框架中贪婪策略和信息利用不足的问题，实现了更好的探索与利用平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的智能图像修复框架存在两个关键局限：1) 过度依赖贪婪策略，无法平衡探索与利用；2) 信息利用不足，存在"片段性遗忘"问题。需要一种能够进行长程推理并有效利用历史经验的系统。

Method: SEAR采用双系统架构：直觉执行器（快速思维系统1）和深思熟虑规划器（慢速思维系统2）。规划器使用剪枝感知的蒙特卡洛树搜索进行长程推理，结合无参考奖励和基于MLLM的锦标赛防止指标利用。执行器则利用基于退化感知状态指纹的自演进片段记忆，将昂贵的搜索轨迹提炼为自适应专业知识。

Result: 在合成和真实世界基准测试上的广泛实验表明，SEAR在感知质量和量化指标上都表现出色，证明了其强大的图像修复能力。

Conclusion: SEAR通过双系统智能架构有效解决了现有图像修复代理框架的局限性，实现了更好的探索与利用平衡，并通过自演进记忆机制克服了片段性遗忘问题，为复杂退化场景下的图像修复提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Real-world image restoration (IR) remains challenging due to complex and coupled degradations. While recent agentic IR frameworks leverage Large Language Models for flexible tool planning, they face two critical limitations. First, from a search scheme perspective, excessive reliance on greedy strategies fails to balance exploration and exploitation. Second, existing agentic systems underutilize information, exhibiting episodic amnesia. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{Self-Evolving Agentic Image Restoration (SEAR)}, which formulates restoration as a sequential decision-making problem. Inspired by the dual-process theory, SEAR comprises an Intuitive Executor and a Deliberate Planner, respectively following the fast-thinking \textit{System 1} and slow-thinking \textit{System 2} principles. The Deliberate Planner employs Pruning-Aware Monte Carlo Tree Search for long-horizon reasoning, utilizing a hybrid no-reference reward and a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM)-based tournament to prevent metric exploitation. Complementarily, the Intuitive Executor leverages a self-evolving episodic memory indexed by degradation-aware state fingerprints. This mechanism distills expensive search trajectories into adaptive expertise, overcoming episodic amnesia while progressively amortizing cold-start exploration costs through memory reuse. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate its strong perceptual and quantitative performance.

</details>


### [67] [Evidence-Based Text-Conditioned 3D CT Synthesis for Ovarian Cancer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28980)
*Francesca Pia Panaccione,Eugenio Lomurno,Francesca Fati,Carlotta Pecchiari,Marina Rosanu,Luigi De Vitis,Lucia Ribero,Gabriella Schivardi,Giovanni Damiano Aletti,Nicoletta Colombo,Maria Francesca Spadea,Francesco Multinu,Matteo Matteucci,Elena De Momi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OvESyn是一个用于卵巢癌的文本条件3D CT合成框架，通过直接从CT影像描述符和临床元数据构建标准化文本报告，无需原始放射学报告，使用潜在扩散模型在493名高级别浆液性卵巢癌患者上进行适配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卵巢癌常在晚期诊断，术前增强CT对分期和手术规划至关重要，但标注数据稀缺和隐私法规限制阻碍了可泛化计算模型的发展。现有文本条件3D CT合成方法依赖配对的放射学报告，且仅在胸部CT上评估。

Method: 提出OvESyn框架：1) 直接从CT衍生的影像描述符和常规临床元数据构建标准化"发现"和"印象"部分；2) 使用潜在扩散模型在493名高级别浆液性卵巢癌患者上进行适配；3) 系统消融研究视觉-语言编码器对齐和生成器微调两个适配轴。

Result: 生成器域适配是跨越域间隙的关键机制：没有它，合成仍锚定在胸部预训练域，精度和召回率降至零，FID2.5D超过140。编码器对齐则细化强度和细节。完整OvESyn获得最佳分布和强度保真度(FID2.5D 29.35，精度0.671，Wasserstein-1 0.044)，仅生成器变体最大化覆盖率(召回率0.645)。

Conclusion: OvESyn是首个适用于腹盆腔肿瘤环境的文本条件3D CT合成框架，仅需自动分割和常规术前元数据，支持在报告稀缺环境中进行转移，为腹盆腔肿瘤影像的合成队列生成提供基础。

Abstract: Ovarian cancer is frequently diagnosed at an advanced stage, making preoperative contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) central to staging and surgical planning; yet the scarcity of annotated imaging data, compounded by privacy regulations, limits the development of generalizable computational models in this domain. Text-conditioned 3D CT synthesis has shown promise, but existing pipelines depend on paired radiology reports and have been evaluated only on chest CT. We propose OvESyn (Ovarian Evidence-based Synthesis), a framework that constructs standardized Findings and Impression sections directly from CT-derived imaging descriptors and routine clinical metadata, without any original radiology report, and uses them to condition a latent diffusion model adapted to 493 high-grade serous ovarian carcinoma patients. This is the first text-conditioned 3D CT synthesis framework adapted to an abdomino-pelvic oncologic setting. A systematic ablation over two adaptation axes, vision-language encoder alignment and generator fine-tuning, identifies generator domain adaptation as the operative mechanism for crossing the domain gap and establishing the target anatomy: without it, synthesis remains anchored to the thoracic pretraining domain, with Precision and Recall collapsing to zero and FID2.5D exceeding 140, regardless of encoder alignment. Encoder alignment instead refines intensity and fine detail. The full OvESyn attains the best distributional and intensity fidelity (FID2.5D 29.35, Precision 0.671, Wasserstein-1 0.044), while the generator-only variant maximizes coverage (Recall 0.645), reflecting a fidelity/coverage trade-off governed by encoder adaptation. Requiring only automatic segmentations and routine preoperative metadata, OvESyn supports transferability to report-scarce settings and provides a foundation for synthetic cohort generation in abdomino-pelvic oncologic imaging.

</details>


### [68] [Learning from Acquisition: Metadata-driven Multimodal Pre-training for Cardiac MRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28991)
*Xueyi Fu,Liwei Hu,Zi Wang,Guang Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MetaCLIP-CMR利用CMR影像的采集元数据作为文本监督，基于CLIP框架进行对比学习，显著提升了心脏影像的表征学习效果，在模态分类、视图分类和分割任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心脏磁共振成像常规记录结构化采集元数据，但现有CMR基础模型主要依赖纯图像预训练，未充分利用这些自然可用的弱语义监督信息。

Method: 基于对比语言-图像预训练框架，将成像模态、解剖视图、扫描仪厂商、场强和扫描仪模型等元数据转换为文本监督，用于CMR表征学习。

Result: 在模态分类上达到86.8%准确率，电影视图分类86.5%，明显优于ImageNet和掩码重建初始化。在下游心脏分割任务中，在ACDC和M&MS数据集上均获得最高Dice分数，且仅需不到1%的预训练图像规模即可达到与大规模预训练模型相当的性能。

Conclusion: 元数据学习提供了一种自然且易于使用的策略，可将常规记录的采集信息转化为有效的监督信号，用于基础级CMR表征学习，凸显了元数据驱动的多模态预训练的前景。

Abstract: Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) routinely records structured acquisition metadata, yet most CMR foundation models rely primarily on image-only pre-training and leave this naturally available source of weak semantic supervision largely underexplored. We propose MetaCLIP-CMR, a metadata-driven framework based on Contrastive Language--Image Pre-training (CLIP), which converts imaging modality, anatomical view, scanner vendor, field strength, and scanner model into textual supervision for CMR representation learning. The pretrained image encoder is evaluated on imaging modality classification, cine view classification, and cardiac segmentation. MetaCLIP-CMR achieves 86.8% modality accuracy and 86.5% cine view accuracy, clearly outperforming ImageNet and masked reconstruction initialisations. For downstream cardiac segmentation, MetaCLIP-CMR consistently obtains the highest Dice score across the evaluated ACDC and M&Ms cine short-axis (SAX) settings under both full-data and 20% fine-tuning regimes. Compared with recent image-focused large-scale CMR pre-training models, MetaCLIP-CMR achieves comparable ACDC segmentation performance, while requiring less than 1% of their pre-training image scale. These results suggest that metadata learning offers a natural and easy-to-use strategy for transforming routinely recorded acquisition information into effective supervision for foundation-level CMR representation learning, highlighting the promise of metadata-driven multimodal pre-training.

</details>


### [69] [SciFlow: Semantic Cross Interference for Self-Supervised Optical Flow Domain Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29004)
*Jamie Menjay Lin,Jisoo Jeong,Hong Cai,Kai Wang,Fatih Porikli*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SciFlow是一个简单有效的网络无关训练方法，通过自监督学习将运动估计从合成域泛化到开放世界域，利用语义干扰和几何一致性，无需真实世界标注数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 运动估计模型通常使用合成数据训练但部署在真实世界，面临合成到真实域的泛化挑战。高质量像素级光流标注成本高且稀缺，需要解决域泛化问题以适应开放世界应用。

Method: SciFlow通过自监督学习实现域泛化：1）在训练时将开放世界图像的语义干扰施加到合成图像上，混合域内特征与跨域干扰；2）利用几何一致性确保自监督的有效性；3）这是网络无关的训练方法。

Result: 实验结果显示SciFlow显著增强了模型在域变化下的鲁棒性，能够实现从合成到真实域的泛化，且无需任何开放世界的真实标注数据。

Conclusion: SciFlow提供了一种简单有效的训练方法，利用自监督学习解决运动估计的合成到真实域泛化问题，为开放世界应用提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Motions of objects and scenes carry essential intelligence in video understanding, offering rich cues for interpreting dynamic settings and interactions. Due to the cost and scarcity of high-quality annotation or ground truth of pixel-wise optical flow, however, motion estimation models are typically trained in synthetic domains while deployed in real-world domains. Addressing synthetic-to-real domain generalization challenges has been crucial for developing practical solutions in diverse open-world use cases.
  This paper introduces SciFlow, a simple yet effective, network-agnostic, training-based approach that leverages self-supervised learning to generalize motion estimation across synthetic and open-world domains. Specifically, SciFlow imposes semantic interference from open-world images onto synthetic images during training, blending indomain features with cross-domain interference, which enables the network to adapt to the real-world domains. Additionally, SciFlow utilizes geometric consistency to ensure validity of the self-supervision. Our experiment results show that SciFlow not only significantly enhances model robustness amidst domain variations, but also remarkably enables synthetic-to-real domain generalization without requiring any ground truth in the open world.

</details>


### [70] [Mural: Transferring LLM knowledge to image generation via Mixture-of-Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29013)
*Achin Jain,Jie An,Siddharth Chaudhary,Davide Modolo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究探索了在标准文本-图像对上训练时，冻结大型语言模型(LLM)的知识能否有效用于文本到图像(T2I)生成。通过Mixture-of-Transformers架构将冻结LLM与扩散图像生成器结合，实验表明LLM的内在知识在T2I训练中保持可访问性，并涌现出跨语言图像生成等新能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索在文本到图像合成中如何有效利用大型语言模型的能力，特别是在仅使用标准文本-图像对训练的情况下，冻结LLM的知识能否被有效利用，而不需要多模态交错信号或显式推理监督。

Method: 采用Mixture-of-Transformers架构，通过共享注意力机制将冻结的、具有推理能力的LLM与基于扩散的图像生成器集成。仅在标准文本-图像对上训练，不依赖多模态交错数据或显式推理监督。

Result: 在多个基准测试中表现优异：GenEval得0.85，DPG-Bench得86.75，WISE得0.66。更重要的是涌现出训练数据中不存在的多种新能力，包括跨语言图像生成、颜色引导构图、表情符号/ASCII场景构建以及世界知识指导的生成。

Conclusion: 研究表明预训练的LLM知识可以在标准文本到图像训练范式下指导图像合成，无需多模态交错信号或显式推理监督。这一发现为在资源受限的多模态学习中利用冻结模型能力开辟了新途径。

Abstract: Leveraging capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in text-to-image (T2I) synthesis is an important research direction. In this work we investigate whether the knowledge of a frozen LLM can be effectively utilized in T2I generation when trained exclusively on standard text-image pairs. We integrate a frozen, reasoning-capable LLM with a diffusion-based image generator via shared attention within the Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture. Our experiments span two critical questions: (1) what degree of the LLM's intrinsic knowledge remains accessible during T2I training, and (2) what novel capabilities emerge in the resulting system. Across established benchmarks, our models achieve strong performance among unified understanding-generation systems: 0.85 on GenEval, 86.75 on DPG-Bench, and 0.66 on WISE with inference-time reasoning, using only text-image data. Remarkably, we uncover emergent behaviors absent from training data, including cross-lingual image generation, color-guided composition, emoji / ASCII scene construction, and generation directed by world knowledge. These results demonstrate that pretrained LLM knowledge can guide image synthesis under standard text-to-image training paradigms, without interleaved multimodal signals or explicit reasoning supervision. Our findings open new avenues for harnessing frozen model capabilities in resource-constrained multimodal learning.

</details>


### [71] [Semantic-Aware, Physics-Informed, Geometry-Grounded Weather Video Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29020)
*Chenghao Qian,Nedko Savov,Lingdong Kong,Yeying Jin,Rui Song,Wenjing Li,Zhun Zhong,Jiaqi Ma,Gustav Markkula,Luc Van Gool*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Semantic-Aware, Physics-Informed, and Geometry-Grounded框架，通过语义感知外观锚定、物理信息动态模拟和几何基础视频合成，为输入视频添加多样且可控的天气效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有天气合成方法缺乏天气外观多样性，对天气动态控制不足；文本提示不够具体，通用视频编辑器倾向于抑制强烈天气现象，难以生成密集粒子效果。

Method: 将合成分解为三个条件信号：语义（天气外观）、动态（时间演化）、几何（场景位置）。具体包括：语义感知外观锚定、物理信息动态模拟（高斯表示粒子场在重力、风、湍流下的模拟）、几何基础视频合成。

Result: 实验表明该方法能生成多样、物理和视觉真实的天气效果，且合成数据显著提升了自动驾驶语义分割在恶劣天气条件下的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 提出的三因素框架通过语义、物理、几何的协同指导，实现了对现有视频编辑器的有效引导，生成高质量、可控的天气合成效果，并有助于自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性提升。

Abstract: Weather synthesis aims to add weather effects to input videos while preserving scene identity, structure, and motion. The key limitation of existing methods is the lack of diversity in weather appearance and effective control over weather dynamics (e.g., temporal evolution and particle motion). Most approaches rely on text prompts, which are inherently underspecified and often fail to produce detailed weather characteristics. Additionally, general-purpose video editors optimized for clean and aesthetic outputs tend to suppress heavy weather phenomena, making dense particle effects difficult to generate. To address these, we propose a Semantic-Aware, Physics-Informed, and Geometry-Grounded framework that steers an off-the-shelf video editor to synthesize diverse global appearances and detailed particle dynamics. We factorize the synthesis into three conditional signals, so that each provides a distinct and stable source of guidance: semantics specifies what the weather should look like, dynamics governs how it evolves over time, and geometry determines where it should appear in the scene. Specifically, we introduce (1) semantic-aware appearance anchoring to establish the target appearance from scene semantics and user input; (2) physics-informed dynamic simulation to generate particle effects by simulating a Gaussian-represented particle field under gravity, wind, and turbulence; and (3) geometry-grounded video synthesis to align the simulated particles with target scene geometry and synthesize the final video. Experiments demonstrate that our method produces diverse, physically and visually realistic weather effects. Furthermore, we show that our synthesized data significantly improves the robustness of autonomous driving semantic segmentation under adverse weather conditions. Project page: https://jumponthemoon.github.io/w-crafter/.

</details>


### [72] [Efficient Spatio-Temporal Grounding with Multimodal Large Models via Second-Level Tracking and RL Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29023)
*Tianshu Zhang,Yan Wang,Ji Qi,Lijie Wen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于长视频时空定位的实用管道，通过从帧级转向秒级跟踪并进行跨秒平滑，在保持连续性的同时减少序列长度，结合强化学习优化策略


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长视频的时空定位需要精确的时间定位和基于自然语言查询的鲁棒对象跟踪。虽然现有的视觉语言模型具备强大的推理能力，但逐帧推理长序列计算成本高且不稳定。

Method: 1) 从帧级跟踪转向秒级跟踪，进行跨秒平滑以减少序列长度；2) 使用先进的多模态模型合成思维链式轨迹进行时间定位和目标选择；3) 用真实标注替换生成的时空坐标以避免噪声监督；4) 基于t_IoU+mv_IoU的验证器进行强化学习优化策略

Result: 在多个FPS设置下的实验表明，该方法在效率和定位质量之间实现了良好的平衡。

Conclusion: 提出的方法通过秒级跟踪和跨秒平滑，结合合成监督和强化学习，为长视频时空定位提供了高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Spatio-temporal grounding in long videos requires precise temporal localization and robust object tracking conditioned on natural-language queries. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) show strong reasoning ability, directly applying frame-by-frame inference to long sequences is computationally expensive and unstable.
