We propose a practical pipeline that shifts from frame-level to second-level tracking and performs cross-second smoothing to preserve continuity while reducing sequence length. To improve reasoning supervision, we synthesize chain-of-thought style trajectories using advanced multimodal models for temporal localization and target selection, and replace generated spatio-temporal coordinates with ground-truth annotations to avoid noisy supervision. We further optimize the policy with reinforcement learning using a verifier based on $t\_\mathrm{IoU}+mv\_\mathrm{IoU}$. Experiments across multiple FPS settings show that our method achieves a strong trade-off between efficiency and localization quality.

</details>


### [73] [Adaptive Spectrum-Aware Feature Disentangled Network for Small Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29029)
*Yang Guo,Zihan Yang,Feifei Kou,Yulan Hu,Ran Zhang,Siyuan Yao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SFDNet是一个通过频谱感知特征解耦来检测小目标的新框架，包含自适应频谱解耦模块和类原型蒸馏过程，在多个基准测试中大幅超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小目标检测由于空间分辨率有限和视觉线索弱而具有挑战性，不同频率谱中的背景干扰物会降低检测性能。

Method: 提出SFDNet框架：1) 自适应频谱解耦(ASD)模块将骨干特征分解为多个互补的频谱分量，为每个分量丢弃背景干扰物；2) 类原型蒸馏(CPD)过程建立类原型，通过原型蒸馏强制紧凑表示。

Result: 在多个具有挑战性的基准测试中，SFDNet大幅超越现有的最先进方法。

Conclusion: SFDNet通过频谱感知特征解耦和类原型蒸馏，有效解决了小目标检测中的背景干扰问题，显著提升了检测性能。

Abstract: Small Object Detection (SOD) is a fundamental yet challenging problem in computer vision due to its limited spatial resolution and weak visual cues. Although recent approaches have achieved remarkable advances, the background distractors in different frequency spectra still degrade the performance. In this paper, we propose a novel small object detection framework termed SFDNet, which is capable of detecting small objects via efficient spectrum-aware feature disentanglement. Specifically, we propose an Adaptive Spectrum Disentanglement (ASD) module that decomposes backbone features into multiple complementary spectral components, aiming to construct discriminative object-relevant representations by discarding the background distractors for each component. Afterwards, to strengthen the semantic consistency of the similar objects in the same class, we propose a Class-Wise Prototype Distillation (CPD) procedure, which establishes class prototypes for the object instances and enforces the compact representation by efficient prototype distillation. Extensive experiments on multiple challenging benchmarks show that SFDNet outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Our code is available at https://github.com/ManOfStory/SFDNet.

</details>


### [74] [Flow Matching in Feature Space for Stochastic World Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29059)
*Francois Porcher,Nicolas Carion,Karteek Alahari,Shizhe Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FlowWM是一种随机世界模型，直接在预训练特征空间（如DINOv3）中进行流匹配，解决了现有视觉世界模型在预测不确定未来和保持下游感知信息之间的权衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉世界模型难以同时满足两个目标：基于VAE的随机模型在低维重建潜在空间中操作，限制了感知性能；而使用强预训练特征的确定性预测器将多模态未来压缩为单一的模糊均值。需要在保持感知信息的同时预测不确定的未来。

Method: FlowWM采用随机世界模型方法，直接在预训练特征空间中进行流匹配。为了解决高维特征空间的挑战，研究了特征空间流匹配的设计选择，并引入了可微分的一步投影机制，支持时间一致性和任务驱动目标的高效训练。

Result: 在合成基准测试和真实世界基准测试FuturePerception上评估，FlowWM在感知性能、模式覆盖和时域鲁棒性方面均有提升，验证了在特征空间中进行随机世界建模的设计方案。

Conclusion: FlowWM通过在预训练特征空间中直接进行流匹配，成功解决了高维特征空间中的随机世界建模问题，在保持感知信息的同时有效预测不确定的多模态未来。

Abstract: World modeling requires forecasting uncertain futures while preserving information useful for
  downstream perception. Existing visual world models often struggle to satisfy both goals:
  VAE-based stochastic models operate in low-dimensional reconstruction latents, which can
  limit perception performance, while deterministic predictors using strong pretrained features
  collapse multimodal futures into a single blurry mean. In this work, we propose FlowWM, a
  stochastic world model that performs flow matching directly within pretrained feature space
  (e.g., DINOv3). This is challenging because pretrained features are substantially
  high-dimensional, making standard diffusion recipes suboptimal. To address this, we
  investigate the design choices needed for feature-space flow matching and introduce a
  differentiable one-step projection mechanism that enables efficient training with temporal
  consistency and task-driven objectives. We evaluate FlowWM on two benchmarks: a synthetic
  benchmark for systematic evaluation of accuracy and diversity, and a real-world benchmark
  FuturePerception. FlowWM improves perception performance, mode coverage, and horizon
  robustness, validating our proposed design for stochastic world modeling in high-dimensional
  feature spaces.

</details>


### [75] [From Fog Chamber to Aircraft Window: Pixel-Registered Imaging and Synthetic Fine-Tuning Enable Cross-Domain Defogging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29093)
*Alexander Ingold,Sabina D. Menon,Manya Yellepeddy,Alec Ikei,John D. Hodges,Jordan Baker,Syed N. Qadri,Rajesh Menon*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种深度去雾流程，通过在实验室可控雾气环境下预训练，再使用域随机化合成雾气在室外场景微调，实现了无需目标域训练即可泛化到多种分布外场景，包括飞机舷窗视频等新传感器、场景和光路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决真实世界双目去雾中存在的开放域迁移问题，即训练好的模型难以泛化到未见过的新传感器、新场景和新光路条件。

Method: 1. 使用单相机雾成像系统在人工雾室中拍摄平板显示器，生成5495对像素对齐的雾图/清晰图对；2. 采用配对的拉普拉斯比值来预测每幅图像的恢复质量；3. 使用像素精确的L1重建训练避免对抗性幻觉；4. 在Mapillary Vistas裁剪图像上叠加在线随机化合成雾进行微调，涵盖广泛的强度、空间变化、空气光条件和噪声。

Result: 1. 在552张测试图像上，30个恢复骨干网络中NAFNet表现最佳（24.33 dB/0.7912 SSIM）；2. 紧凑型替代方案仅用3%参数量达到相似性能；3. ResNet-50分类器确认恢复保留了语义内容；4. 在未配对的飞机舷窗视频上，NIQE从6.22降至4.97，输出具有时间稳定性；5. 在O-HAZE/NH-HAZE数据集上达到20.71 dB/0.683 SSIM。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了通过实验室预训练结合域随机化微调的方法，可以有效解决去雾模型的开放域迁移问题，实现了从可控实验室环境到真实世界复杂场景（包括飞机舷窗视频）的泛化能力，无需目标域训练数据。

Abstract: A deep defogging pipeline pretrained on controlled laboratory fog and fine-tuned with domain-randomized synthetic fog applied to clear outdoor scenes generalizes across a graded sequence of out-of-distribution settings with no target-domain training, from chamber-free free-flowing fog to iPhone video recorded through an aircraft cabin window in flight, an entirely unseen sensor, scene, and optical path. This directly addresses an open transfer limitation reported for real-world binocular defogging. Two design choices support the transfer. First, a single-camera fog imager photographs a flat-panel display through an artificial-fog enclosure with a fixed 114~mm scattering path, producing 5{,}495 pixel-aligned foggy/clear pairs. Exact registration permits a paired Laplacian ratio that predicts per-image restoration quality far better than single-image proxies (Spearman $ρ= 0.632$ versus $0.399$) and supports pixel-exact $L_1$ reconstruction training that avoids adversarial hallucination. Second, the fog-chamber checkpoint is fine-tuned on Mapillary Vistas crops overlaid with on-the-fly randomized synthetic fog spanning a broad range of strengths, spatial variations, airlights, and noise conditions. On a 552-image held-out split, a uniform comparison of 30 restoration backbones places NAFNet at the top (24.33~dB~/~0.7912~SSIM), with a compact alternative within 1.29~dB at 3\% of the parameter count, and a ResNet-50 classifier confirms that the restoration preserves semantic content rather than only pixel-level structure. On unpaired aircraft-window video, NIQE decreases from a mean of 6.22 to 4.97 after fine-tuning, with temporally stable output across full-motion sequences. The same backbone, under paired supervision, also reaches 20.71~dB~/~0.683~SSIM on a non-overlapping O-HAZE/NH-HAZE split (a transferability check rather than a competitive ranking).

</details>


### [76] [CMTFormer: Marrying Transformer with Hierarchical Information Interaction for RGB-Event Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29136)
*Yu Li,Yuenan Hou,Yingmei Wei,Jiangming Chen,Yanming Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出CMTFormer，一种分层融合RGB和事件信息的跨模态交互Transformer，用于事件相机目标检测，通过浅层对齐、中层增强和深层可学习融合实现高效稳定的多模态协作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RGB帧与事件流之间存在固有异质性，现有多模态融合方法容易导致噪声放大或冗余特征整合。事件相机具有高时间分辨率和高动态范围，但需要有效融合RGB信息以提升性能。

Method: 提出CMTFormer，采用浅到深的信息交互方案：1) 浅层对齐模块(SAM)融合低层特征，减少属性差异和噪声；2) 跨模态增强模块(CEM)利用纹理和边缘信息产生相互增强的中层特征；3) 可学习深层融合模块(LDFM)通过可学习权重自适应融合高层线索；4) 空间先验模块增强定位精度。

Result: 在DSEC-Detection和PKU-DAVIS-SOD两个事件目标检测基准上，CMTFormer在单模态和多模态设置下均超越现有检测方法，证明了该范式的有效性。

Conclusion: CMTFormer通过分层跨模态交互实现了RGB和事件信息的高效稳定融合，解决了多模态异质性带来的噪声放大和冗余特征问题，显著提升了事件相机目标检测性能。

Abstract: Event cameras capture sparse brightness changes with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range, compensating for the deficiencies of the conventional RGB frames. However, previous multi-modal fusion techniques typically fail to handle the inherent heterogeneity between RGB frames and event streams, thus easily leading to noise amplification or redundant feature integration during cross-modal fusion. In this paper, we propose a Cross-Modal information inTeraction transFormer, coined as CMTFormer, which hierarchically integrates RGB and event information to achieve efficient and stable multimodal collaboration. Specifically, we design a shallow-to-deep information interaction scheme. In the shallow stage, we present the Shallow Alignment Module (SAM) to achieve an efficient fusion of RGB and event low-level features, which mitigates attribute disparities and prevents noisy information. In the middle stage, we devise the Cross-modal Enhancement Module (CEM) that utilizes texture and edge information to produce mutually reinforced middle-level features. In the deep stage, we present the Learnable Deep Fusion Module (LDFM) which performs high-level information aggregation through learnable weights, thus enabling the network to adaptively fuse RGB and event clues. A Spatial Prior Module is further designed to utilize global spatial information to enhance localization accuracy. Extensive experiments are conducted on two prevalent event-based object detection benchmarks, i.e., DSEC-Detection and PKU-DAVIS-SOD. Our CMTFormer consistently surpasses the detection counterparts in both uni-modal and multi-modal settings, strongly demonstrating the effectiveness of our paradigm. Codes will be available upon publication.

</details>


### [77] [GPC: Large-Scale Generative Pretraining for Transferable Motor Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29148)
*Yi Shi,Yifeng Jiang,Chen Tessler,Xue Bin Peng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GPC（生成式预训练控制器）利用token化和next-token建模从大规模运动数据中创建通用、可重用的生成控制器，通过FSQ量化学习运动词汇表，结合GPT风格transformer实现物理模拟角色的控制生成，并通过适配技术微调下游任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发能够以自然、生动方式完成广泛任务的控制器是物理角色动画实用化的关键挑战。现有方法在训练过程和通用性方面存在局限，需要更简化且强大的通用控制器框架。

Method: 1) 使用FSQ（有限标量量化）联合优化"运动词汇表"和控制策略；2) 训练GPT风格自回归transformer对离散编码进行next-token预测；3) 提出适配技术微调控制器以适应新下游任务。

Result: 在重现大量运动片段时达到99.98%的成功率；生成控制器表现出多种自然涌现行为，如对扰动的响应行为和摔倒后的恢复行为；相比先前token化方法大大简化了训练过程。

Conclusion: GPC框架创建了高度鲁棒的通用控制器，适用于各种下游应用，通过预训练+微调范式实现了物理角色动画的通用控制能力。

Abstract: Developing controllers capable of completing a wide range of tasks in a natural and life-like manner is a key challenge in enabling practical applications of physics-based character animation. In this work, we introduce Generative Pretrained Controllers (GPC), which leverage tokenization and next-token modeling to create general-purpose, reusable generative controllers from large-scale motion datasets. Our framework utilizes end-to-end reinforcement learning to jointly optimize a "motion vocabulary", modeled via Finite Scalar Quantization (FSQ), along with a corresponding control policy that can map the discrete codes to physics-based controls. After the "codebook" has been learned, the underlying structure of this large vocabulary is modeled by training a GPT-style autoregressive transformer, leading to a powerful generative controller that generates controls for a physically simulated character by performing next-token prediction. Once the generative controller has been trained, we propose a suite of adaptation techniques for finetuning the controller for new downstream tasks. Our proposed framework greatly simplifies the training process compared to previous tokenized methods, and achieves a 99.98% success rate in reproducing a vast corpus of motion clips. The generative controller exhibits a variety of natural emergent behaviors, such as responsive behaviors to perturbations and recovery behaviors after falling. This results in highly robust general purpose controllers for a variety of downstream applications.

</details>


### [78] [Spatially Localized Image Degradation Embeddings for Image Quality Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29162)
*Krishna Srikar Durbha,Hassene Tmar,Ping-Hao Wu,Ioannis Katsavounidis,Alan C. Bovik*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SLIDE-IQA是一种自监督学习方法，通过引入空间局部化图像退化嵌入来改进无参考图像质量评估，解决了现有方法对空间局部和共现退化的敏感性不足问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自监督学习在无参考图像质量评估中表现优异，但标准SSL流程在整个图像区域均匀应用合成失真，限制了其对真实世界内容中空间局部化和共现退化的敏感性。研究发现现有最先进编码器存在对空间有界图像退化的敏感性降低问题。

Method: 提出SLIDE-IQA方法，采用双分支Vision Transformer框架，将空间有界退化注入对比预训练目标。引入阈值有界排除机制来处理这些退化的空间复杂性，解决空间局部化失真引起的结构冲突，确保潜在空间同时尊重退化类型和空间尺度。

Result: SLIDE-IQA的纯合成预训练显著提高了对局部化失真的敏感性，同时在NR-IQA基准测试中与现有SSL NR-IQA模型相比取得了竞争性性能。

Conclusion: SLIDE-IQA通过空间局部化图像退化嵌入有效解决了现有SSL方法在无参考图像质量评估中对空间局部退化的敏感性盲点，为处理真实世界复杂退化提供了更好的表示能力。

Abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) currently drives state-of-the-art performance in no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA). However, standard SSL pipelines uniformly apply synthetic distortions across the entire image field, which can limit their sensitivity to spatially localized and co-occurring degradations encountered in real-world content. In this work, we empirically expose this representational blind spot across existing state-of-the-art encoders, demonstrating their reduced sensitivity to spatially bounded image degradations. To bridge this gap, we introduce Spatial Localized Image Degradation Embeddings for Image Quality Assessment (SLIDE-IQA). SLIDE-IQA employs a dual-branch Vision Transformer framework that injects spatially bounded degradations into a contrastive pretraining objective. To handle the spatial complexity of these degradations, we introduce a Threshold-Bounded Exclusion Mechanism, a representational design choice that resolves structural conflicts arising from spatially localized distortions to ensure the latent space respects both degradation type and spatial scale. Finally, we show that SLIDE-IQA's synthetic-only pretraining significantly improves sensitivity to localized distortions, while achieving competitive performance on NR-IQA benchmarks against existing SSL NR-IQA models.

</details>


### [79] [Articulating then Matching: Zero-Shot Shape Matching for Uncurated Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29167)
*Qilong Liu,Qinfeng Xiao,Chenyuan Yi,Liying Zhang,Kit-lun Yick*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ATM是一个零样本框架，通过"表达后匹配"范式解决3D形状稠密对应问题，无需对应特定训练，利用预训练视觉基础模型和参数化形状先验，在参数化空间建立鲁棒对应并细化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决现实环境中3D形状稠密对应的挑战：缺乏训练时间和样本、未筛选的极端高分辨率数据存在拓扑失真、需要处理多样的3D表示形式。

Method: 采用"表达后匹配"范式：1) 利用预训练视觉基础模型和参数化形状先验从多视角渲染估计参数化形状模型；2) 通过多视角几何一致性系统性地验证估计；3) 将不同输入映射到共享的规范参数空间建立鲁棒粗对应；4) 通过谱细化得到精确稠密映射。

Result: 在非等距基准测试中取得优异结果：平均测地误差2.4-TOPKIDS和3.8-SMAL，相比基线URSSM分别减少73%和37%误差。对包含高达20万个顶点的野外原始扫描表现出前所未有的鲁棒性，计算时间接近恒定且保持一致的优越精度。

Conclusion: ATM是一个无需对应训练数据的零样本框架，能鲁棒处理现实世界3D形状对应问题，通过参数化重建有效绕过拓扑噪声，无缝处理多种3D模态，在准确性和效率方面均表现出色。

Abstract: Finding dense correspondences between 3D shapes is a fundamental yet unresolved challenge, especially in real-world environments. These environments present severe challenges, including the lack of time and sufficient samples for training, the prevalence of uncurated extreme-high resolution data with topological distortions, and the need to handle diverse 3D representations. In this paper, we present ATM, a zero-shot framework that requires no correspondence-specific training and robustly addresses these issues at once through an articulate-then-match paradigm. Rather than relying on intrinsic geometric properties, we leverage powerful pretrained vision foundation models and parametric shape priors to estimate parametric shape models from multi-view renderings, and systematically ground these estimations via multi-view geometric consistency. By mapping diverse inputs into a shared canonical parametric space, we inherently establish robust coarse correspondences that bypass topological noise, which are then refined into precise dense mappings via spectral refinement. Operating purely on test-time optimized parametric reconstructions, ATM requires no correspondence training data, is naturally immune to connectivity artifacts, and seamlessly handles diverse 3D modalities, including meshes, point clouds, and 3D Gaussians. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves strong results on non-isometric benchmarks (average geodesic errors of 2.4-TOPKIDS, 3.8-SMAL), reducing errors by 73% and 37% respectively compared to the baseline URSSM. Furthermore, it exhibits unprecedented robustness on in-the-wild raw scans of up to 200k vertices per shape while maintaining near-constant computation time and consistent superior accuracy.

</details>


### [80] [Anomaly Factory 3D: A Modular Framework for Diverse Pseudo-Anomaly Synthesis in Unsupervised 3D Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29181)
*Ali Balapour,Faraz Hach*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AF3AD是一个用于3D点云异常检测的模块化框架，通过从正常点云合成多样伪异常来扩展训练数据，提升无监督异常检测方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D点云中的异常检测面临挑战，因为异常样本稀缺且多样，而训练通常仅限于正常数据。需要一种方法来扩展训练数据以提升异常检测性能。

Method: AF3AD使用基于局部PCA框架的中心条件参数化变形模型，具有核控制的空间衰减、各向异性、方向门控和法向/切向位移场，能够生成广泛的几何缺陷预设。

Result: 在AnomalyShapeNet和Real3D-AD数据集上的实验显示，AF3AD在物体级和点级的异常检测与定位方面均带来一致改进，并通过消融实验验证了预设组的有效性及在噪声下的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: AF3AD作为一个独立的合成工具，能够跨不同3D异常检测范式进行迁移应用，为无监督3D异常检测方法提供了有效的训练数据扩展方案。

Abstract: Detecting and localizing defects in 3D point clouds is challenging because abnormal samples are scarce and diverse, while training is often limited to normal data. We propose Anomaly Factory 3D (AF3AD), a modular framework that synthesizes diverse pseudo-anomalies from normal point clouds to expand the training data for unsupervised 3D anomaly detection methods that rely on pseudo-anomalies. AF3AD uses a center-conditioned parametric deformation model defined in local PCA frames, with kernel-controlled spatial falloff, anisotropy, directional gating, and normal/tangential displacement fields, enabling a broad set of geometric defect presets. We demonstrate its ease-of-use and effectiveness by integrating AF3AD with an offset-prediction detector and a reconstruction-based anomaly detection method, showing that AF3AD transfers across detection paradigms. Experiments on AnomalyShapeNet and Real3D-AD show consistent improvements in object- and point-level detection and localization, supported by ablations on preset groups and robustness under noise. AF3AD is designed as a standalone synthesis tool to facilitate adoption across different 3D anomaly detection paradigms. Code is available at github.com/vpc-ccg/AF3AD.

</details>


### [81] [DTI: Dynamic Trajectory Initialization for Generative Face Video Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29198)
*Yingwei Tang,Chen Yan,Wendi Liu,Qiang Hu,Xiaoyun Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了动态轨迹初始化(DTI)范式用于生成式人脸视频超分辨率(GFVSR)，将GFVSR重新定义为输入驱动的定向恢复，通过增强-注入条件机制和判别引导来平衡感知质量与保真度，实现了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式人脸视频超分辨率方法主要利用预训练扩散模型的生成先验，但存在固定采样、推理成本高、过度追求感知指标导致保真度低等问题。

Method: 提出动态轨迹初始化(DTI)范式，将GFVSR重新定义为输入驱动的定向恢复；设计增强-注入条件机制用于预训练DiT骨干；通过判别引导(DG)动态设置采样起始点，使用信噪比对齐目标训练。

Result: 在仅需少量模型适配和微调的情况下，该方法在多个指标和基准测试中实现了SOTA整体性能，显著提高了保真度而不损害感知质量。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了生成式人脸视频超分辨率的感知-失真权衡问题，分析表明LPIPS是最具说服力的评估指标，为GFVSR提供了新的研究方向。

Abstract: As the most perceptually powerful Face Video Super-Resolution (FVSR) method, existing works in Generative FVSR (GFVSR) mainly exploit the generative prior of pretrained diffusion models. However, viewed as full generation, they suffer from fixed sampling and expensive inference costs if without large-scale auxiliary training. Furthermore, an excessive pursuit of generic perceptual metrics often results in low fidelity. To address these issues, we present Dynamic Trajectory Initialization (DTI) paradigm for GFVSR, which reformulates GFVSR as an input-driven directional restoration. With a novel enhancement-and-injection conditioning mechanism for pretrained DiT backbone, fidelity of our model has been significantly improved without compromising perceptual quality. To dynamically set the starting sampling point, we propose a Discriminative Guide (DG) trained via objective Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) alignment. With only minor model adaptation and fine-tuning, our method achieves a SOTA overall performance across diverse metrics and benchmarks. An analysis of relationship between actual comprehensive quality and common metrics is also conducted, which demonstrates the perception-distortion trade-off and that the LPIPS is the most convincing metric in our case.

</details>


### [82] [Zero-Gated Language-conditioned Human Motion Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29208)
*Guanhui Qiao,Lu Zhou,Ding Jiang,Jinqiao Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ZGL是一个轻量级的语言条件化3D人体运动预测器，它使用观察运动的描述作为语义先验，同时保持强大的运动主干作为主要动态来源，通过零门控机制实现语言条件化的渐进学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于姿态历史的3D人体运动预测缺乏明确的高级语义指导，限制了预测的准确性和语义合理性。需要引入语义信息来增强运动预测的语义一致性。

Method: 1. 渲染观察到的姿态并生成一句话描述；2. 使用冻结的CLIP-L文本编码器编码描述；3. 将编码投影为少量条件token；4. 通过零门控交叉注意力适配器注入到DCT基的时空Transformer中；5. 门控初始化为零，确保网络初始化时与纯姿态基线数值相同。

Result: 在Human3.6M上，ZGL相比代表性运动预测基准方法提高了整体MPJPE。在CMUMocap上的结果进一步表明，紧凑的描述条件化能够迁移到第二个基准数据集，并为3D人体运动预测提供了实用的语义线索。

Conclusion: ZGL成功地将语言条件化引入3D人体运动预测，通过零门控机制实现了语义信息的渐进利用，在保持强大运动动态的同时显著提升了预测准确性，展示了语义先验在运动预测中的实用价值。

Abstract: Pose histories provide the core kinematic evidence for 3D human motion prediction, but they lack explicit high-level semantic guidance. This paper introduces ZGL, a lightweight language-conditioned predictor that uses captions of the observed motion as a semantic prior while preserving a strong motion backbone as the main source of dynamics. We render only the observed poses, generate a one-sentence description with a vision-language model, encode the caption with a frozen CLIP-L text tower, and project it into a small set of conditioning tokens. These tokens are injected into a DCT-based spatial-temporal Transformer by compact crossattention adapters with zero gates: each adapter output is multiplied by a learnable gate initialized to zero, so the full network is numerically identical to the pose-only baseline at initialization and can learn to use language only when it reduces prediction error. On Human3.6M, ZGL improves overall MPJPE over representative motion-prediction baselines in our comparison. Results on CMUMocap further show that compact caption conditioning transfers to a second benchmark and provides a practical semantic cue for 3D human motion prediction.

</details>


### [83] [Again-Pose: Anchor-Guided Adaptive Inter-Frame Motion Cues Propagating for High-quality Human Pose Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29230)
*Shuaikang Zhu,Yiding Sun,Yang Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Again-Pose：通过锚帧引导的自适应帧间运动传播，解决严重运动模糊和遮挡下3D姿态估计的鲁棒性问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于隐式时间注意力的方法在严重视觉退化（运动模糊、遮挡）时，输入特征会崩溃并变得与噪声无法区分，导致隐式聚合失败和灾难性重建错误

Method: 提出Again-Pose框架，将退化帧的姿态估计重新定义为运动引导的恢复任务。基于特征显著性识别高质量锚帧，传播可靠的运动学线索来"修复"退化中间帧的姿态。包括双路径运动感知模块捕获细粒度帧间动态，以及差异加权融合模块自适应传播线索抑制漂移

Result: 在标准基准（Human3.6M、3DPW、PoseTrack）和具有挑战性的FineDiving数据集上，Again-Pose在鲁棒性和稳定性方面显著优于现有方法，能有效恢复其他方法失败的合理姿态

Conclusion: 通过显式识别高质量锚帧并传播可靠运动学线索，Again-Pose解决了严重视觉退化下3D姿态估计的鲁棒性问题，为极端运动场景提供了有效的解决方案

Abstract: Reconstructing continuous 3D human poses from unconstrained videos is challenging, especially in extreme motion scenarios involving severe motion blur and occlusion. Current state-of-the-art methods typically rely on implicit temporal attention to aggregate features across frames. However, under severe visual degradation, input features often suffer from collapse, rendering them indistinguishable from noise. In such cases, implicit aggregation fails to distinguish valid signals, leading to catastrophic reconstruction errors. To address this robustness gap, we propose a simple yet effective framework called Anchor-guided adaptive inter-frame motion cues propagating (Again-Pose), reformulating pose estimation in degraded frames as a motion-guided recovery task. Instead of blindly smoothing features, we explicitly identify high-quality Anchor Frames based on feature saliency and propagate reliable kinematic cues to "inpaint" the poses of degraded intermediate frames. Specifically, a Dual-path Motion-aware Module captures fine-grained inter-frame dynamics, while a Difference-weighted Fusion Module adaptively propagates these cues to suppress drift. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks (Human3.6M, 3DPW, PoseTrack) and the challenging FineDiving dataset demonstrate that Again-Pose significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in robustness and stability, effectively recovering plausible poses where other methods fail.

</details>


### [84] [When Does Synthetic CT Transfer? A Label-Free Donor/Host Diagnostic for Medical Vision-Language Model Routing on Real Lung CT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29232)
*Fakrul Islam Tushar*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种无需真实标签即可预测医学影像模型从合成数据到真实数据迁移能力的方法，通过区分"供体驱动"（结节属性）和"宿主驱动"（周围解剖结构）的模型能力来预测迁移成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学影像缺乏真实标签来验证模型能力，需要一种无需真实标签就能预测模型从合成数据到真实数据迁移能力的方法。

Method: 使用合成数字孪生，区分"供体驱动"（结节属性）和"宿主驱动"（周围解剖结构）的模型能力。在三个肺CT视觉语言任务、五个公共VLM、四种指导条件和七个真实数据集上进行测试。

Result: 预测在所有情况下都成立：供体驱动的能力（存在性和大小排序）成功迁移（R2 >= 0.96），而宿主驱动的能力（肺叶定位）不迁移。TrialCouncil方法仅使用合成CT校准就能匹配最佳固定模型。

Conclusion: 主要贡献不是路由器本身，而是发现仅使用合成数据就能无需真实标签地预测模型迁移能力，这为医学影像模型评估提供了新方法。

Abstract: A synthetic measurement of model competence is useful only if it survives the move to real data, yet the real labels that would verify it are exactly what medical imaging lacks. We ask whether transfer can be predicted in advance, label-free, and answer with a mechanism: on synthetic digital twins, competence that is donor-driven (a property of the transplanted nodule) survives the synthetic to real change of host, while host-driven competence (a property of the surrounding anatomy) need not. We test this on three lung CT vision-language tasks chosen to span that axis, across five public VLMs, four guidance conditions, and seven real datasets. The prediction holds in every case: presence and size orderings transfer (R2 >= 0.96), lobe does not; the split survives leave-source-out calibration, and the diagnostic names that boundary before any real label. TrialCouncil, a training-free council calibrated only on synthetic CT, confirms it by matching the best fixed model exactly where transfer is predicted. The contribution is not the router but the finding that transfer itself is predictable, label-free, from synthetic data alone.

</details>


### [85] [Confidence-feedback-weighted graph matching network: online-offline laser-induced damage site matching under complex interference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29255)
*Yueyue Han,Guanhua Chen,Hangcheng Dong,Kang Zhang,Fengdong Chen,Zhitao Peng,Fa Zeng,Qihua Zhu,Guodong Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出置信度反馈加权图匹配网络，仅需损伤点质心坐标作为输入，通过置信度反馈抑制干扰点传播，提升跨图判别能力，在复杂场景数据集上达到96.36%的匹配F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高功率激光装置最终光学元件的在线检测图像中存在与真实损伤点极为相似的伪损伤点，需要准确匹配到离线真实损伤点，但由于匹配判别特征有限、局部几何畸变和大量干扰点，匹配任务极具挑战。

Method: 提出置信度反馈加权图匹配网络：1) 从每轮匹配分数中估计节点匹配置信度；2) 将置信度作为可靠性权重反馈指导后续边特征聚合；3) 几何一致性约束校准虚假高置信度估计；4) 难例挖掘损失提升结构相似点之间的区分能力。

Result: 在Complex-Scene数据集上，该方法实现了96.36%的匹配F1分数，表现出鲁棒且高效的性能。

Conclusion: 提出的置信度反馈加权图匹配网络能有效抑制干扰点传播，增强跨图判别能力，为在线检测图像中损伤点的真伪判别提供了一种有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Online inspection images of final optics in high-power laser facilities contain pseudo-damage sites that closely resemble true damage sites. Determining the authenticity of online-detected sites is therefore difficult and requires accurate matching to offline ground-truth sites. However, this matching remains highly challenging due to limited match-discriminative features, local geometric distortions, and numerous distractor sites. Existing matching models mainly suppress distractors implicitly through loss-function supervision. We propose a confidence-feedback-weighted graph matching network that requires only damage-site centroid coordinates as input. It estimates node matchability confidence from each round of matching scores and feeds it back as a reliability weight to guide subsequent edge-feature aggregation, thereby suppressing distractor propagation and enhancing cross-graph discriminability. Within this framework, a geometric consistency constraint calibrates spurious high-confidence matchability estimates, while a hard-example mining loss improves discrimination between structurally similar sites. Experiments on our Complex-Scene dataset show that the proposed method achieves a matching F1-score of 96.36$\%$ with robust and efficient performance.

</details>


### [86] [Enhancing Part-Level Point Grounding for Any Open-Source MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29267)
*Jin-Cheng Jhang,Fu-En Wang,Xin Yang,Nan Qiao,Lu Xia,Min Sun,Cheng-Hao Kuo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种通用方法，使任何开源多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)能够实现准确的2D部件级点定位，通过利用MLLMs固有的注意力机制，合成文本条件、定位感知的查询，并转换为点中心热图进行预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型在视觉定位任务中主要擅长对象级定位，但在部件级定位方面表现不足，而部件级定位对于机器人操作等细粒度任务至关重要。

Method: 提出一种通用方法，通过Q-Synth模块在MLLMs中间层合成文本条件、定位感知的查询，捕获目标相关的注意力模式，然后使用轻量级的Attention-to-Point解码器将这些模式转换为点中心热图进行最终预测，所有原始MLLM参数保持冻结。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在不同数据集上持续提高了部件级定位的准确性，并且可以无缝集成到任何开源MLLMs中。

Conclusion: 该方法为MLLMs提供了准确的2D部件级点定位能力，为细粒度视觉定位任务提供了更直接的解决方案，同时完全保留了预训练模型的能力。

Abstract: Visual grounding aims to associate free-form textual queries with specific regions in an image. While recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated promising capabilities in this domain, they primarily excel at object-level grounding and often struggle with part-level grounding-an essential requirement for fine-grained tasks such as robotic manipulation. In this work, we introduce a general approach that equips any open-source MLLMs with accurate 2D part-level point grounding, offering a more direct alternative to conventional grounding representations. Our method leverages the attention mechanisms inherently present in MLLMs. By synthesizing text-conditioned, grounding-aware queries within intermediate layers via the proposed Q-Synth Module, we capture target-relevant attention patterns and refine them with a lightweight Attention-to-Point Decoder, which converts these patterns into a point-centric heatmap for final prediction. Notably, all original MLLM parameters are frozen, ensuring full preservation of their pre-trained capabilities. Experiments show that our design consistently improves part-level grounding accuracy across datasets and can be seamlessly integrated into any open-source MLLMs.

</details>


### [87] [ScaleErasure: Inference-Time Minimal Intervention for Precise Concept Erasure in Next-Scale Autoregressive Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29282)
*Cong Wang,Haiyu Wu,Zhiwei Jiang,Zifeng Cheng,Fei Shen,Yafeng Yin,Qing Gu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ScaleErasure：针对next-scale自回归图像生成的概念擦除方法，通过最小干预在严重语义纠缠下实现精确概念消除，同时保持通用生成能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: next-scale自回归图像生成中，早期尺度语义信息高度压缩导致不安全概念与无关语义严重纠缠，现有概念擦除方法难以应对这种新生成范式。

Method: 提出ScaleErasure方法，在推理时执行最小干预：1) 对不安全概念和相应安全概念进行两次额外前向传播；2) 利用输出将目标logits从不安全概念引导至安全概念；3) 在尺度、令牌和比特通道三个维度进行精确的logits选择和引导。

Result: 实验表明，ScaleErasure在next-scale自回归范式下优于适应的基线方法，实现更精确的概念擦除，同时很大程度上保留了通用生成能力。

Conclusion: ScaleErasure有效解决了next-scale自回归图像生成中的概念擦除问题，通过最小干预策略在严重语义纠缠下实现了精确的概念消除，为这一新生成范式提供了有效的安全解决方案。

Abstract: Concept erasure aims to prevent image generative models from producing unsafe content while preserving their general generative capability. Meanwhile, next-scale autoregressive (AR) image generation has recently emerged as a new generative paradigm characterized by next-scale prediction, for which concept erasure remains largely unexplored. In this paradigm, semantic information is highly compressed at early scales, leading to severe entanglement between unsafe and unrelated semantics. In this paper, we propose ScaleErasure, an inference-time concept erasure method that performs minimal intervention. ScaleErasure precisely selects and guides predicted logits that are most relevant to the unsafe concept, thereby enabling effective erasure under severe semantic entanglement. Specifically, ScaleErasure performs two additional forward passes conditioned on the unsafe concept and the corresponding safe concept, and leverages their outputs to guide the target logits away from unsafe concepts toward safe concepts. To enable precise and minimal intervention, logits selection and guidance are conducted across three dimensions: scales, tokens, and bit channels. Experiments demonstrate that ScaleErasure outperforms adapted baselines in the next-scale AR paradigm, achieving more precise concept erasure while largely preserving general generative capability. The code is available at https://github.com/coziiizz/ScaleErasure.

</details>


### [88] [ASTAD: Asymmetric Style Transfer for Synthetic-to-Real Adaptation in Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29286)
*Dingyi Yao,Xinqi Zhang,Lihui Peng,Jianming Hu,Danya Yao,Yi Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对自动驾驶感知的非对称风格迁移任务（ASTAD），仅使用带标注的合成数据和未标注的真实参考图像，通过两阶段训练免费框架实现语义一致的高质量风格迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前方法虽然使用扩散模型进行逼真风格迁移来缩小合成与真实数据之间的差距，但忽略了实际应用中的非对称性：合成数据有完美的像素级标注，而真实参考图像通常没有对应标签。现有依赖对称语义引导的方法要么标注成本高昂，要么存在严重的语义错位问题。

Method: 提出了ASTModel，一个两阶段训练免费框架：1）从未标注的目标中提取粗略语义先验；2）在去噪过程中进行动态先验细化和类别一致的风格注入，实现语义一致的非对称风格迁移。

Result: 实验表明ASTModel在下游感知效用和结构保真度方面显著优于现有方法，同时提供3.2倍的推理加速，更好地满足实际部署需求。

Conclusion: 这项工作将合成到真实的适应与实际问题约束对齐，有望加速鲁棒自动驾驶系统的可扩展部署。

Abstract: Synthetic data mitigates the data scarcity problem in autonomous driving perception. However, the synthetic-to-real gap leads to performance degradation, hindering real-world model generalization. Although current methods leverage diffusion models for photorealistic style transfer to bridge this gap, they critically ignore a practical asymmetry: while synthetic data possesses perfect pixel-level annotations, real-world style reference images generally lack corresponding labels. Consequently, existing methods relying on symmetric semantic guidance suffer from either prohibitive annotation costs or severe semantic misalignment. To address this dilemma, we formally propose a novel task: Asymmetric Style Transfer for Autonomous Driving (ASTAD), which requires semantically consistent transfer using only labeled synthetic content and unlabeled real-world references. We further introduce the ASTModel, a training-free two-stage framework designed to bridge this domain gap under asymmetric constraints. ASTModel first extracts a coarse semantic prior from the unlabeled target, followed by dynamic prior refinement and class-consistent style injection during the denoising process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ASTModel significantly outperforms existing methods in downstream perception utility and structural fidelity, while offering a 3.2$\times$ inference speedup. This work aligns synthetic-to-real adaptation with practical constraints, holding the potential to accelerate the scalable deployment of robust autonomous driving systems. Code: https://github.com/Dingyi-Yao/ASTAD.

</details>


### [89] [Pointer-CAD v2: Plan-Then-Construct CAD Generation with Dimension-Aware Parametric Precision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29301)
*Dacheng Qi,Chenyu Wang,Jingwei Xu,Yi Ma,Shenghua Gao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Pointer-CAD v2 提出了一种新的CAD生成方法，通过"计划-然后构建"范式直接预测连续值，避免了量化误差，提高了几何精度，满足工业制造对精确度的要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的CAD生成方法主要关注视觉相似性，忽略了精确的几何参数和正确的度量尺度。微小的数值偏差在形状层面可能不明显，但会违反工业公差要求，而当前自回归范式使用命令序列表示并量化数值参数以简化LLM预测，进一步加剧了这个问题。

Method: 提出统一框架，通过"计划-然后构建"范式将参数推理与几何构建解耦。首先生成具有明确度量尺度参数的结构化设计计划，这些参数组织到字典中，在序列生成过程中通过指针机制直接引用，消除离散化误差并确保维度一致性执行。

Result: Pointer-CAD v2在实验中持续优于现有基线方法，在几何精度方面取得显著改进，能够为精度关键的工程应用提供可靠的CAD生成。

Conclusion: Pointer-CAD v2通过直接预测连续值、消除量化误差的方法，显著提高了CAD生成的几何精度，满足了工业制造对精确度的严格要求，为精度关键的工程应用提供了可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Computer-aided design (CAD) plays a fundamental role in modern manufacturing by providing the high precision required for industrial production. Recent large language model based approaches formulate CAD generation as a sequence prediction problem and have achieved promising results. However, existing methods and evaluation protocols primarily emphasize visual similarity, while overlooking precise geometric parameters and correct metric scale. Small numerical deviations that are negligible at the shape-level may still violate industrial tolerance requirements, a problem further compounded by current autoregressive paradigms that utilize command sequence representations, aggressively quantize numerical parameters to ease LLM prediction. In this work, we present Pointer-CAD v2. Compared with v1 (arXiv:2603.04337), this version directly predicts continuous values, bypassing the need for quantized numerical parameters and thereby eliminating quantization errors. Specifically, we propose a unified framework that decouples parameter reasoning from geometric construction through a Plan-Then-Construct paradigm. Our method first produces a structured design plan with explicit metric scale parameters. These parameters are organized into a dictionary and directly referenced during sequence generation via a pointer mechanism, eliminating discretization errors and ensuring dimensionally consistent execution. In addition, we construct a new large-scale dataset with plan-level annotation and introduce three hierarchical geometry accuracy metrics to evaluate parametric fidelity at the vertex, edge, and face levels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Pointer-CAD v2 consistently outperforms existing baselines and achieves substantial improvements in geometric accuracy, enabling reliable CAD generation for precision-critical engineering applications.

</details>


### [90] [Event-VLA: Action-Conditioned Event Fusion for Robust Vision-Language-Action Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29384)
*Jiaxin Liu,Xun Xu,Zhenhao Zhang,Hanqing Wang,Ruiqi Chen,Shi Chang,Weiyu Guo,Laurent Kneip*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Event-VLA：一种事件增强的视觉-语言-动作框架，通过事件流作为光照鲁棒的补充观察，提升机器人在不同光照条件下的操作泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型通常假设良好光照的室内环境，而真实世界的机器人操作可能面临光照变化导致的RGB图像质量下降，这给鲁棒操作带来了挑战。需要解决在不同光照条件下的泛化操作问题。

Method: 提出Event-VLA框架，将事件流作为光照鲁棒、运动敏感的补充观察。不同于传统多模态融合直接将事件特征合并到全局语义token空间，Event-VLA通过动作查询路由路径注入事件信息：使用可学习的动作查询从VLA推理过程中提取任务相关语义，并通过门控交叉注意力选择性聚合事件token来构建事件感知的动作表示。

Result: 在仿真和真实世界部署中的实验表明，Event-VLA在正常光照下保持强大的操作性能，并在低光照退化和接近黑暗的真实世界设置中提高了成功率。

Conclusion: Event-VLA通过有效整合事件流信息，为VLA模型提供了光照鲁棒性，解决了RGB图像在恶劣光照条件下质量下降的问题，实现了在不同光照条件下的泛化机器人操作。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have become an important paradigm of embodied AI. However, existing VLA models typically assume well-lit and stable indoor settings, while real-world embodied manipulation may involve degraded RGB observations caused by illumination shifts, posing critical challenges for robust robotic manipulation. To address this gap, we propose \textbf{Event-VLA}, an event-enhanced VLA framework for generalizable manipulation across varying illumination conditions. We formulate VLA-based manipulation under degraded visibility as a practical robustness problem for RGB-centric policies, and introduce event streams as an illumination-robust, motion-sensitive complementary observation to improve robustness across visibility levels. Specifically, unlike conventional multimodal fusion that directly merges event features into the global semantic token space, Event-VLA injects event information through an action-query routing pathway. It uses learnable action queries to extract task-relevant semantics from the VLA reasoning process, and selectively aggregates event tokens via gated cross-attention to construct event-aware action representations. This design preserves the pretrained RGB-language semantic priors while effectively leveraging event information for robust action prediction. Experiments in simulation and real-world deployment show that Event-VLA maintains strong manipulation performance under normal lighting and improves success rates under low-light degradation and near-dark real-world settings.

</details>


### [91] [Occlusion-Robust Multi-Object Decoupling for Physics-Based Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29303)
*Xin Dong,Wenfeng Deng,Yansong Tang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种无需掩码的、从稀疏且遮挡的真实世界视图中进行无损多物体3D重建的方法，支持通过物质点法进行物理可信的交互模拟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决现实场景中多物体因遮挡和视角有限导致的耦合问题，实现无需手动掩码的多物体分离重建，为物理模拟提供准备。

Method: 基于3D高斯泼溅表示，先用SAM2训练的分割场获取粗略实例分区；通过联合分数蒸馏采样过程重建碎片化几何，结合参考视图监督和新视图合成（由2D/3D扩散先验引导）确保纹理保真和3D一致性；加入几何感知先验（如物体内/间相似性）进行几何推理正则化。

Result: 实验表明，该方法能在合成和真实数据集上生成完整、可直接用于模拟的3D物体，无需手动掩码，并支持真实的动态交互。

Conclusion: 该方法通过将多物体解耦视为稀疏视图重建问题，结合扩散先验和几何感知正则化，成功实现了无需掩码的多物体3D重建，为物理交互模拟提供了可行方案。

Abstract: We propose a mask-free method for lossless multi-object 3D reconstruction from sparse and occluded real-world views, enabling physically plausible interaction via Material Point Method (MPM) simulation. Our key insight is that object coupling stems from occlusion and limited viewpoints, which we address by formulating multi-object decoupling as a sparse-view reconstruction problem. Using 3D Gaussian Splatting as base representation, we first obtain coarse instance partitions with a SAM2-trained segmentation field. Rather than relying on masks, we reconstruct fragmented geometries by leveraging a joint Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) process, which integrates reference-view supervision with novel-view synthesis guided by 2D and 3D diffusion priors to enforce both texture fidelity and 3D consistency. Furthermore, we incorporate geometry-aware priors such as intra-object and inter-object similarity to regularize geometric reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that our method produces complete, simulation-ready 3D objects without requiring manual masks, enabling realistic dynamic interactions on both synthetic and real-world datasets.

</details>


### [92] [MirrorPPR: Exemplar-Based Portrait Photo Retouching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29308)
*Zhihong Liu,Zheng Li,Jiachun Jin,Siqi Kou,Yitao Jian,Fengpei Yu,Zhijie Deng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MirrorPPR：基于示例的肖像照片精修框架，通过提取示例对的细微修图操作并注入到DiT模型中，解决文本引导图像编辑在结构肖像精修中的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本引导的图像编辑在结构肖像精修方面存在局限，文本描述难以传达面部特征和身体比例的细微变化。现有基于示例的编辑方法主要关注视觉变化明显的任务，而肖像精修涉及极其精细和局部化的修改，提取和转移这些编辑具有挑战性。

Method: 提出MirrorPPR框架：1）使用修图操作提取器捕捉示例对的细微差异；2）通过连接器和LoRA模块将提取的表示注入预训练的扩散Transformer（DiT）；3）提出高级数据自增强范式确保修图操作严格对齐；4）构建包含4700万修图对的大规模数据集MirrorPPR47M，支持渐进式课程学习。

Result: 大量实验表明，MirrorPPR在修图质量和身份保持方面显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: MirrorPPR通过创新的框架设计、数据增强策略和大规模数据集，成功解决了结构肖像精修中的细微操作提取和转移问题，为基于示例的肖像精修任务提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: While text-guided image editing has made remarkable progress, it remains limited in structural portrait retouching. Textual descriptions struggle to convey fine-grained changes to facial features and body proportions. To address this gap, we introduce Exemplar-Based Portrait Photo Retouching, where the model is given an exemplar pair and tasked with inferring and applying the same retouching operations to a new query image. Existing exemplar-based editing methods primarily focus on tasks with pronounced visual transformations. In contrast, structural portrait retouching involves extremely delicate and localized modifications, making accurate extraction and transfer of these edits challenging. To tackle this, we propose MirrorPPR, a novel framework designed to capture and transfer subtle structural retouching operations. Our method uses a Retouching Operation Extractor to capture the subtle differences from the exemplar pair. The extracted representations are then injected into a pre-trained Diffusion Transformer (DiT) through a connector and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) modules. Furthermore, constructing perfectly aligned cross-identity training pairs is severely hindered by operation misalignment. To overcome this, we propose an advanced data self-augmentation paradigm that ensures strictly aligned retouching operations. To alleviate data scarcity and support this novel task, we introduce MirrorPPR47M, a large-scale dataset with over 47 million retouched pairs. By structuring the dataset into simulated and professional subsets, we enable progressive curriculum learning to smoothly optimize the network. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MirrorPPR significantly outperforms existing baselines in both retouching quality and identity preservation. The project page is available at https://sjtu-deng-lab.github.io/MirrorPPR.

</details>


### [93] [MF-UAVPose6D: A Model-Free Monocular 6-DoF Pose Estimation Framework for Fixed-Wing UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29697)
*Juanqin Liu,Leonardo Plotegher,Eloy Roura,Shaoming He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MF-UAVPose6D：针对固定翼无人机的无模型单目6自由度姿态估计框架，无需CAD模型或关键点先验，通过热图引导中心定位、透视感知模块、动态拓扑采样和分离式姿态解码实现准确估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在无人机应用中，6-DoF姿态估计对空域态势感知、目标跟踪和反无人机操作至关重要。然而，非合作目标通常缺乏CAD模型和关键点先验，使得现有基于模型或关键点匹配的方法难以可靠应用。

Method: 提出MF-UAVPose6D框架：1）通过热图引导中心定位获取稳定目标锚点；2）引入透视感知模块建模观察射线先验；3）利用动态拓扑采样补充机翼、机身和尾部的弱结构线索；4）采用分离式平移-旋转姿态解码机制估计6-DoF姿态。

Result: 实验结果表明，MF-UAVPose6D实现了准确高效的单目6-DoF姿态估计，无需CAD模型，在长距离旋转估计、深度恢复和联合姿态评估方面表现出强鲁棒性。同时构建了FW-UAV6DPose合成数据集。

Conclusion: 该方法解决了无CAD模型和关键点先验条件下的固定翼无人机姿态估计难题，为无人机态势感知和反无人机操作提供了有效的技术方案。

Abstract: For uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs), estimating six-degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) poses is essential for airspace situational awareness, target tracking, and counter-UAV operations. However, non-cooperative targets usually lack computer-aided design (CAD) models and keypoint priors, making existing model-based or keypoint-matching methods difficult to apply reliably. To address these challenges, this paper proposes MF-UAVPose6D, a model-free monocular 6-DoF pose estimation framework for fixed-wing UAVs. During inference, the method takes only a single red-green-blue (RGB) image and camera intrinsics as input. It first obtains a stable target anchor through heatmap-guided center localization, introduces a Perspective-Aware Module (PAM) to model observation-ray priors, exploits Dynamic Topological Sampling (DTS) to complement weak structural cues from the wings, fuselage, and tail, and adopts a decoupled translation-rotation pose decoding mechanism to estimate the 6-DoF pose. In addition, we construct the FW-UAV6DPose synthetic dataset, which covers fixed-wing UAV observations across diverse distances, viewpoints, and poses. Experimental results show that MF-UAVPose6D achieves accurate and efficient monocular 6-DoF pose estimation without requiring CAD models, and demonstrates strong robustness in long-range rotation estimation, depth recovery, and joint pose evaluation.

</details>


### [94] [D$^{2}$R$^{2}$OSR: Degradation-Disentangled Representation for Real-World Omnidirectional Image Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29314)
*Hongyu An,Xinfeng Zhang,Xu Fan,Shijie Zhao,Li Zhang,Ruiqin Xiong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: D²R²OSR是一个用于真实世界全向图像超分辨率的退化解耦表示框架，通过显式建模鱼眼成像和ERP投影的退化，结合视角感知特征和退化特定模块，实现高质量的全向图像超分辨率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着沉浸式视觉体验需求的增长，高质量全向图像变得日益重要。然而，成像设备和传输带宽的限制导致低分辨率全向图像，特别是在真实世界退化和几何畸变存在时，难以渲染精细的360°细节。现有的真实世界超分辨率方法不适用于全向图像，因为它们的退化模型未能考虑鱼眼捕获和ERP投影的复杂成像流程，引入了严重的混叠和投影特定畸变。

Method: 提出D²R²OSR（Degradation-Disentangled Representation framework for Real-world Omnidirectional image Super-Resolution），通过两个关键洞察指导：1) 投影先验在塑造真实世界退化中起关键作用；2) 沉浸式环境中的人类感知本质上是视角中心的。引入透视投影表示（PPR）与ERP分支并行运行以捕获视角感知特征，同时使用退化特定模块（DSM）联合建模ERP引起的几何畸变和PPR特定的真实世界退化。

Result: 大量实验表明，D²R²OSR实现了最先进的性能，产生了视觉上引人注目的高保真全向真实世界超分辨率结果，同时在低资源部署中保持了良好的计算效率。

Conclusion: D²R²OSR通过显式建模鱼眼成像和ERP投影的退化，结合视角感知特征和退化特定模块，有效解决了真实世界全向图像超分辨率的挑战，为沉浸式视觉体验提供了高质量的解决方案。

Abstract: With the growing demand for immersive visual experiences, high-quality omnidirectional images (ODIs) have become increasingly important. However, limitations in imaging devices and transmission bandwidth often lead to low-resolution ODIs, hindering the rendering of fine-grained 360° details, especially in the presence of real-world degradations and geometric distortions. Existing real-world super-resolution (Real-SR) methods are inadequate for ODIs, as their degradation models fail to account for the complex imaging pipeline involving fisheye capture and Equirectangular Projection (ERP), introducing severe aliasing and projection-specific distortions. To address these challenges, we propose D$^{2}$R$^{2}$OSR, a Degradation-Disentangled Representation framework for Real-world Omnidirectional image Super-Resolution. D$^{2}$R$^{2}$OSR explicitly models degradations arising from both fisheye imaging and ERP projection, guided by two key insights: (1) projection priors play a critical role in shaping real-world degradations, and (2) human perception in immersive environments is inherently viewpoint-centric. Accordingly, we introduce a Perspective Projection Representation (PPR) operating alongside the ERP branch to capture viewpoint-aware features, together with a Degradation-Specific Module (DSM) that jointly models ERP-induced geometric distortions and PPR-specific real-world degradations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that D$^{2}$R$^{2}$OSR achieves state-of-the-art performance and produces visually compelling, high-fidelity omnidirectional Real-SR results while maintaining favorable computational efficiency for low-resource deployment.

</details>


### [95] [OP3DSG: Open-Vocabulary Part-Aware 3D Scene Graph Generation for Real-World Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29786)
*Yirum Kim,Ue-Hwan Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OP3DSG是一个开放词汇的部件感知3D场景图生成框架，能够构建统一图来联合建模对象、交互部件、空间关系、功能关系和可供性，在机器人任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的3D场景图生成方法主要是对象中心的，关系信息编码有限，限制了在需要细粒度理解的现实场景中的应用。

Method: 提出OP3DSG框架，整合对象-部件知识引导检测与部件感知3D融合，使用几何初始化先验图和基于LLM的细化来减少虚假关系预测，实现高效图构建。

Result: 实验结果表明OP3DSG实现了最先进的性能，并展示了其作为感知骨干在各种真实世界机器人任务中的有效性。

Conclusion: OP3DSG通过构建统一的多层次3D场景图，解决了现有方法的局限性，为机器人应用提供了更丰富的场景理解和推理能力。

Abstract: 3D scene graphs (3DSGs) provide a compact and structured abstraction of 3D environments. Although advances in foundation models have enabled open-vocabulary 3DSG generation, existing approaches remain object-centric and encode limited relational information -- restricting their applicability in real-world scenarios that require fine-grained understanding. We propose OP3DSG, an open-vocabulary part-aware 3DSG generation framework that constructs unified graphs that jointly model objects, interactive parts, spatial relations, functional relations, and affordances. OP3DSG integrates object-part knowledge-guided detection with part-aware 3D fusion to preserve small and interaction-relevant components, and employs a geometry-initialized prior graph with LLM-based refinement to reduce spurious relational predictions while enabling efficient graph construction. To systematically evaluate unified 3D scene graph construction, we introduce UniGraph3D, a benchmark designed for part-aware perception and multi-level relational reasoning. Experimental results show that OP3DSG achieves state-of-the-art performance and demonstrates its effectiveness as a perception backbone in diverse real-world robotics tasks.

</details>


### [96] [W4A4 Quantization for Inference on Wan2.2-I2V-A14B](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29337)
*Yidong Chen,Chengyu Shi,Jiahao Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文针对ICME 2026低比特大模型量化挑战的W4A4量化推理子挑战，提出结合混合精度和通道平滑的量化方法，在Wan2.2视频生成模型上实现了接近FP16的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决4位权重和4位激活量化在视频生成模型中的性能下降问题，特别是针对激活值中的离群值处理，以在保持模型质量的同时实现高效推理。

Method: 结合两种LLM量化技术：1) MixQ风格的混合精度处理稀疏激活离群值；2) SmoothQuant风格的逐通道平滑；使用块级HiF4打包，通过校准识别重尾激活通道，平滑重新平衡动态范围，双分支GEMM保留离群列的高精度。

Result: 在官方VBench I2V指标上，该方法在大多数质量维度上与FP16的差距保持在2-3.5%以内，并改善了运动平滑度，优于原生HiFloat4基线（后者在所有报告分数上相对FP16下降约5%）。

Conclusion: 通过结合混合精度和通道平滑技术，可以在Wan2.2视频生成模型上实现有效的W4A4量化，在保持接近FP16质量的同时显著减少内存占用和计算需求。

Abstract: We summarize our submission to Sub-Challenge 1: W4A4 Quantization for Inference (HiF4 / MXFP4) of the ICME 2026 Low-Bit-width Large-Model Quantization Challenge. The sub-challenge targets 4-bit weight and 4-bit activation inference on Wan-AI/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B under HiF4 or MXFP4 numerical formats. We adapt two complementary ideas from LLM quantization, MixQ-style mixed precision for sparse activation outliers and SmoothQuant-style per-channel smoothing, together with block-wise HiF4 packing for Wan2.2 feed-forward linear layers. Calibration on representative OpenS2V-5M batches identifies heavy-tailed activation channels; smoothing rebalances dynamic range before W4A4 rounding; and a dual-branch GEMM preserves outlier columns in higher precision while the bulk of channels use strict W4A4. On official VBench I2V metrics, our pipeline stays within 2-3.5 percent of FP16 on most quality axes and improves motion smoothness, outperforming a native HiFloat4 baseline that degrades roughly 5 percent relative to FP16 across all reported scores.

</details>


### [97] [Dynamic Parsing and Updating Natural Language Specification using VLMs for Robust Vision-Language Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29357)
*Xiao Wang,Liye Jin,Dan Xu,Yuehang Li,Lan Chen,Yaowei Wang,Yonghong Tian,Jin Tang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种基于语言依赖解析的视觉语言跟踪方法，通过解析文本描述中的核心组件（目标对象、语义概念、背景信息）来提升跟踪准确性，避免传统方法中的目标更新错误、背景干扰和幻觉问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言跟踪方法通过序列模型或大语言模型直接生成文本描述，存在目标更新错误、背景干扰和幻觉等固有缺陷，需要更精确的文本描述更新机制来缓解语义-视觉不匹配问题。

Method: 提出语言依赖解析机制，从文本描述中精确提取核心跟踪组件（目标对象、语义概念、背景上下文信息），然后利用预训练视觉语言模型Qwen-VL的跨模态理解能力进行组件感知的自适应文本描述更新。

Result: 在TNL2K、LaSOT、TNLLT和OTB-LANG等多个大规模视觉语言跟踪基准测试中取得了持续且优越的跟踪性能。

Conclusion: 通过语言依赖解析机制和组件感知的文本描述更新，有效解决了传统方法中的缺陷，提升了视觉语言跟踪的准确性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Vision-language tracking guided by natural language specifications leverages high-level semantic cues of target objects to substantially boost tracking accuracy and robustness. Existing studies have verified that adaptively optimizing textual descriptions throughout the tracking process can effectively mitigate the semantic-visual mismatch induced by dynamic variations in target appearance, position, and other inherent attributes. Nevertheless, mainstream methods that directly generate textual information via sequence models or large language models inevitably suffer from inherent defects, including erroneous target updating, excessive background distraction, and pervasive hallucination artifacts. To address the aforementioned limitations, this paper proposes a novel language dependency parsing mechanism to precisely distill core tracking principal components, encompassing target objects, semantic concepts, and background contextual information. On this basis, we perform component-aware adaptive textual description updates by exploiting the powerful cross-modal understanding capability of the pre-trained vision-language model Qwen-VL. By integrating the proposed elaborately designed modules into the baseline framework, our method achieves consistent and superior tracking performance on multiple large-scale vision-language tracking benchmarks, including TNL2K, LaSOT, TNLLT, and OTB-LANG. The source code and pre-trained models will be released at https://github.com/Event-AHU/Open_VLTrack.

</details>


### [98] [SAFE-DiT: Semantics-Aware Fast-path Execution for High-Resolution Diffusion Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29360)
*Xuanhua Yin,Yuxuan Jia,Chuanzhi Xu,Weidong Cai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SAFE-DiT是一个训练免费的语义感知快速路径执行框架，通过消除冗余的注意力掩码和实现语义感知的空间调度，显著加速高分辨率Diffusion Transformer推理，同时保持视觉质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高分辨率Diffusion Transformer推理中存在大量空间冗余，但许多空间自适应实现将区域计算编码为注意力掩码，这会无意中将缩放点积注意力从FlashAttention快速路径移开，导致Mask-Induced Dispatch Tax（MIDT）系统瓶颈。

Method: SAFE-DiT框架将精确掩码消除与基于近似的空间调度分离。它仅移除那些在注意力对数中产生行向常数偏移的图像自注意力掩码，保留语义承载的掩码（如文本填充掩码），并通过提示条件令牌分区、带全局上下文的选择性状态更新和周期性上下文刷新实现空间自适应。

Result: 在PyTorch SDPA堆栈上，冗余掩码使长序列注意力变慢4.1×到5.8×。在Lumina-Next上，SAFE-DiT在1024²分辨率实现2.69×端到端加速，在2560²实现5.09×加速，将2560²的峰值内存从94.1GB减少到27.9GB，并能在密集推理内存耗尽时实现3072²生成。

Conclusion: SAFE-DiT通过消除掩码诱导的调度税，实现了显著的速度提升和内存节省，同时保持视觉质量。SAFE-Core在视觉上不劣于密集快速路径基线，而SAFE-DiT+SW提供了独立的提示对齐操作点，无需重新引入空间自注意力掩码。

Abstract: High-resolution Diffusion Transformer (DiT) inference contains substantial spatial redundancy, but many spatially adaptive implementations encode regional computation as attention masks, which can inadvertently move scaled dot-product attention (SDPA) away from FlashAttention fast paths. We identify this avoidable systems bottleneck as Mask-Induced Dispatch Tax (MIDT) and show that it grows with latent sequence length. We introduce SAFE-DiT, a training-free Semantics-Aware Fast-path Execution framework that separates exact mask elision from approximation-based spatial scheduling. SAFE-DiT removes only provenance-certified image self-attention masks that induce a row-wise constant shift in attention logits, preserves semantics-bearing masks such as text-padding masks, and realizes spatial adaptation through prompt-conditioned token partitioning, selective state updates with global context, and periodic context refresh. We call this acceleration-only configuration SAFE-Core and report sensitivity-weighted classifier-free guidance separately as SAFE-DiT+SW. On the evaluated PyTorch SDPA stack, redundant masks make long-sequence attention $4.1\times$ to $5.8\times$ slower than the mask-free path. On Lumina-Next, SAFE-DiT achieves $2.69\times$ end-to-end acceleration at $1024^2$ resolution and $5.09\times$ at $2560^2$, reduces peak memory at $2560^2$ from 94.1 to 27.9 GB, and enables $3072^2$ generation when dense inference runs out of memory. Paired metrics, component ablations, and a blinded human study support visual non-inferiority of SAFE-Core to the dense fast-path baseline, while SAFE-DiT+SW provides a separate prompt-alignment operating point without reintroducing spatial self-attention masks. Code is available at https://github.com/xuanhuayin/SAFE-DiT.

</details>


### [99] [FiRe: Frequency Reparameterization as a Preconditioner for Periodic Implicit Neural Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29414)
*Harinandan Shukla,Rajarshi Verma,Jitin Singla*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FiRe通过引入低秩门控路径为每个神经元提供输入相关的有界频率，改进了周期性隐式神经表示的优化过程，在固定计算预算下实现更快的收敛和更好的重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有周期性隐式神经表示（如SIREN和FINER）为所有神经元分配相同的全局频率，当局部信号内容变化时，表示效率低下。需要一种方法来提高优化效率而不改变底层激活函数。

Method: FiRe（频率重参数化）通过单独的、与输入相关的低秩门控路径为每个神经元提供有界频率。这种方法可以作为隐式预处理器，通过神经正切核（NTK）改善初始化时的优化条件。

Result: 在2D图像拟合任务中，FiRe相比参数匹配的基线方法，在短训练预算下PSNR提升高达+1 dB。性能增益随分辨率变化，在完全收敛时减小。研究还分析了性能与分辨率、秩和训练预算的关系。

Conclusion: FiRe通过为每个神经元提供输入相关的频率，有效改善了周期性隐式神经表示的优化条件，实现了更快的收敛和更好的重建质量，特别是在有限计算预算下表现显著。

Abstract: Periodic Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) such as SIREN and FINER assign every neuron, the same global frequency, spending the representational budget inefficiently when local signal content varies. We introduce FiRe (Frequency Reparameterization), that accelerates optimization by reparameterizing per-neuron frequency of periodic INRs without changing their underlying activation function. FiRe gives each neuron a bounded, input-dependent frequency via a separate low-rank gating path and is applicable to any periodic activation function. The gate acts as an implicit preconditioner that improves optimization conditioning at initialization via the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK). This better-conditioned initialization makes optimization converge faster, and the high-frequency content of the reconstruction tracks the target more closely at a fixed computational budget. On 2D image fitting, FiRe increases PSNR over a parameter-matched baseline (up to +1 dB at short training budgets), with gains that vary with resolution and diminish at full convergence. We characterize how performance depends on resolution, rank, and training budget, and give an NTK account that predicts these trends.

</details>


### [100] [Can Machines Really See Objects in Images? A Study Based on Syntactic Distance and Visual Self-Referential Instances](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29416)
*Xingyu Peng,Junran Wu,Yue Hou,Zhongliang Qiao,Jiaheng Liu,Shangzhe Li,Jichang Zhao,Wenjun Wu,Xianglong Liu,Yongxin Tong,Li Dong,Ke Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文通过构建视觉自指任务，在最大方差二元噪声中测试视觉模型的全局语义识别能力，发现当图像尺度超过临界点后，模型的准确率会崩溃至随机猜测水平，揭示了当前架构在全局概念任务上的结构能力边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨视觉模型是否真正理解物体，还是仅仅依赖表面视觉线索。基于维特根斯坦"语言的界限就是世界的界限"观点，认为模型的识别能力受限于其学习的描述系统。当前视觉模型通常通过学习利用局部统计线索的特征表示，作者希望测试当局部线索无法提供稳定区分基础时，模型是否仍能正确分类。

Method: 提出句法距离概念来衡量类别的可分离性，并通过操作的对称性映射来测量。构建了视觉自指任务：在最大方差二元噪声中，正样本包含闭合正方形，负样本包含一个边界像素翻转的相同正方形。两个类别在全局语义上不同但句法距离为零，使局部统计捷径不可靠。在ResNets和Vision Transformers上进行实验。

Result: 实验发现一致的相变现象：一旦图像尺度超过临界点，准确率就会崩溃至随机猜测水平，且在测试范围内无法恢复。更大的训练集和模型只能延迟这种崩溃，而具有全局注意力的ViTs更早达到崩溃点。这揭示了当前架构在全局概念任务上的结构能力边界。

Conclusion: 当前视觉架构在需要全局语义理解的任务上存在结构性的能力边界，模型主要依赖局部统计线索而非真正的理解。这一发现表明，实现通用智能可能需要创造新的语言系统，而不仅仅是重用现有的描述系统。

Abstract: Can a vision model truly see an object, or does it only fit surface-level visual cues? Following Wittgenstein's view that the limits of language are the limits of the world, we view a model's recognition ability as bounded by the descriptive system it has learned. In current vision models, this system is often realized through learned feature representations that exploit local statistical cues. We therefore ask whether a model can still classify correctly when such local cues provide no stable basis for distinction. We formalize this question with syntactic distance, which measures class separability through the symmetry of the operations mapping one class to the other: positive distance exposes exploitable local features, whereas zero distance requires global semantics rather than local rules. We construct a visual self-referential task in maximum-variance binary noise: positive samples contain a closed square, while negative samples contain an otherwise identical square with one flipped boundary pixel. The two classes differ in global semantics but have zero syntactic distance, making local statistical shortcuts unreliable. Experiments on ResNets and Vision Transformers reveal a consistent phase-transition phenomenon, with accuracy collapsing to random guessing once the image scale crosses a critical point and does not recover within the tested range. Larger training sets and models only delay this collapse, while globally attentive ViTs reach it earlier. These results reveal a structural capability boundary of current architectures on global-concept tasks, suggesting that general intelligence may require creating new language, not reusing an existing one.

</details>


### [101] [Bit-ViP: Leveraging Bit-planes to Preserve Visual Privacy in Images through Obfuscation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29417)
*Vishesh Kumar Tanwar,Ashish Gupta,Sanjay Madria,Sajal K. Das*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于位平面的图像混淆方案Bit-ViP，用于保护基于图像识别任务的视觉隐私，通过生成不可逆噪声防止恶意重建，同时保持可用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 计算机视觉应用（如监控系统和社交媒体）的快速增长引发了安全和视觉隐私担忧，特别是在数据存储在云服务器时。现有混淆方案要么易受恶意攻击（如模型反转重建原始图像），要么生成不可训练的混淆图像，导致无法获得合理准确率。

Method: 提出了Bit-ViP方案，采用基于位平面的图像混淆方法，结合创新的端到端混淆函数。使用Lorenz混沌系统和差分隐私生成不可逆噪声，使对手难以重建原始图像。

Result: 在UCF101和HMDB51两个流行的动作识别数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了Bit-ViP的有效性。在面对重建攻击、像素频率、信息熵和像素互相关等攻击时，安全分析显示相比现有方案有显著改进。

Conclusion: Bit-ViP方案能够产生安全可用的混淆图像，在保护视觉隐私的同时保持图像识别任务的可用性，相比现有方案在安全性方面有实质性提升。

Abstract: The unprecedented growth of computer vision applications, such as surveillance systems and social media, raises security and visual privacy concerns, especially when data is stored on cloud servers. Image obfuscation offers a way to preserve visual privacy while maintaining an adequate level of usability; thus, it has been a topic of great interest in recent years. However, prior obfuscation schemes are either vulnerable to malicious attacks, such as model inversion to reconstruct original images from obfuscated images, or generate non-trainable obfuscated images, making them unusable for achieving reasonable accuracy. This paper proposes a novel bit-plane-based image obfuscation scheme, {\em Bit-ViP}, to preserve visual privacy for image-based recognition tasks. The Bit-ViP scheme produces secure, usable images by incorporating an innovative end-to-end obfuscation function. While doing so, the obfuscated image would contain non-invertible noise (generated by Lorenz's chaotic system and differential privacy), making it hard for an adversary to reconstruct the original image. We conduct extensive experiments on two popular activity recognition datasets, namely UCF101 and HMDB51, to validate the effectiveness of Bit-ViP. In the face of attacks on reconstruction, pixel frequency, information entropy, and pixel inter-correlation, we present a rigorous security analysis demonstrating tangible improvements over existing schemes.

</details>


### [102] [Robust Zero-shot Anomaly Detection under Limited Auxiliary Anomaly Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29428)
*Guanyu Lu,Fang Zhou,Cheqing Jin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DIVE是一种针对零样本异常检测的新方法，专门解决辅助数据中异常模式有限时性能下降的问题。通过浅层-深层文本嵌入注入策略学习跨域通用异常概念，并采用解耦机制处理视觉嵌入与文本提示的对齐问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本异常检测模型假设辅助数据包含丰富的异常多样性，但忽略了真实目标域中更复杂和不可预测的变化。当辅助数据的异常先验有限时，会导致显著的性能下降，需要解决这一实际问题。

Method: 提出浅层-深层文本嵌入注入策略，在视觉编码过程中注入文本嵌入，学习跨辅助训练域和不同目标域的通用异常概念。引入解耦机制，解决与对象语义纠缠的视觉嵌入与对象无关文本提示之间的次优对齐问题。

Result: 在辅助数据异常模式有限的设定下，DIVE在12个数据集上平均表现优于SOTA基线：两个分类指标分别提升16.2%和28.5%，三个分割指标分别提升23.4%、24.1%和47.0%。当辅助数据具有足够异常多样性时，仍保持高度竞争力。

Conclusion: DIVE是首个研究有限辅助异常先验场景的方法，有效解决了由此导致的性能下降问题。通过文本嵌入注入和解耦机制，能够学习跨域通用异常概念，在有限和丰富的辅助数据场景下都表现出色。

Abstract: Zero-shot anomaly detection aims to identify defects in arbitrary novel domains; however, existing models assume that the auxiliary data contains a rich diversity of anomalies, neglecting the far more complex and unpredictable variations in real-world target domains. This study introduces DIVE, the first approach to investigate the scenario of limited auxiliary anomaly priors and resolve the resulting substantial performance degradation. Through a shallow-and-deep text embedding injection strategy during visual encoding, DIVE learns to abstract generic anomaly concepts shared across the auxiliary training domain and diverse target domains. Moreover, we propose a disentanglement mechanism to tackle the suboptimal alignment between visual embeddings entangled with object semantics and object-agnostic textual prompts. Experiments demonstrate that, under the setting of limited anomaly patterns in auxiliary data, DIVE outperforms SOTA baselines by up to 16.2% and 28.5% on two classification metrics, and 23.4%, 24.1%, and 47.0% on three segmentation metrics, in terms of average performance across twelve datasets. Furthermore, it maintains highly competitive performance when auxiliary data exhibits sufficient anomaly diversity.

</details>


### [103] [EvLIR: Learning Illumination Residuals from Ordered Events for Low-Light Image Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29430)
*Haoxian Zhou,Chuanzhi Xu,Langyi Chen,Pengfei Ye,Haodong Chen,Qiang Qu,Ali Anaissi,Weidong Cai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EvLIR：利用事件相机时序信息进行低光图像增强的新框架，通过时序事件残差模块学习光照残差，实现Retinex风格的光照估计和可靠性感知的图像-事件恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统低光图像增强面临结构缺失、饱和噪声和弱局部对比度等问题。现有方法将事件体素视为无序或静态特征堆叠，未能充分利用事件流的有序时序演化信息，削弱了事件相机的高时间分辨率优势。

Method: 提出EvLIR框架：1）保留事件流的有序时序分箱；2）引入时序事件残差模块(TERM)，使用轻量级ConvGRU编码短窗口事件动态；3）将时序状态转换为有界光照校正，为Retinex风格的光照估计提供空间自适应光度指导；4）进行可靠性感知的图像-事件恢复。

Result: 在SDE和SDSD室内/室外基准测试中，EvLIR在12个数据集-指标对中的11个上取得最佳结果，平均PSNR为25.63dB，PSNR*为28.30dB，SSIM为0.827。

Conclusion: EvLIR通过显式建模事件流的时序演化，有效利用事件相机的高时间分辨率优势，显著提升了低光图像增强的性能，证明了时序信息在事件相机辅助的图像增强中的重要性。

Abstract: Low-light image enhancement is severely ill-posed when the input frame contains missing structure, saturated noise, and weak local contrast. Event cameras provide asynchronous brightness-change observations with high temporal resolution, but prior works often treat voxel channels as an unordered or static feature stack before fusion, rather than explicitly modeling their within-window temporal evolution, weakening the temporal evidence that makes events useful. We propose EvLIR, a temporal-residual enhancement framework that learns illumination residuals from ordered events for low-light image enhancement. Given a low-light frame and its aligned event voxel, EvLIR preserves the ordered temporal bins of the event stream and introduces a Temporal Event Residual Module (TERM) to encode short-window event dynamics with a lightweight ConvGRU. The resulting temporal state is converted into a bounded illumination correction, which provides spatially adaptive photometric guidance for Retinex-style illumination estimation and subsequent reliability-aware image-event restoration. On SDE and SDSD indoor/outdoor benchmarks, EvLIR achieves the best result on eleven of twelve dataset-metric pairs, with average scores of 25.63~dB PSNR, 28.30~dB PSNR*, and 0.827 SSIM across the four benchmarks.

</details>


### [104] [Bridging VideoQA and Video-Guided Agentic Tasks via Generalized Keyframe Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29445)
*Sunqi Fan,Qingle Liu,Runqi Yin,Meng-Hao Guo,Shuojin Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了VG-GUIBench基准，用于评估MLLM能否从视频教程学习并完成GUI交互任务，同时提出了TASKER关键帧提取算法，显著提升了视频理解和代理任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频问答基准主要评估浅层视觉感知能力，缺乏对MLLM从视频教程学习深层知识或程序技能并泛化到下游长时程代理任务的能力评估。

Method: 1) 提出VG-GUIBench基准，评估MLLM基于GUI代理跟随视频教程完成交互任务的能力；2) 提出TASKER关键帧提取算法，综合考虑任务相关性和场景动态性来识别信息丰富的关键帧。

Result: TASKER在VideoQA和视频引导代理任务基准上均取得显著性能提升：在EgoSchema fullset上超过最佳基线2.0%，在NExT-QA数据集上超过最佳基线1.8%。

Conclusion: 论文填补了视频理解评估的空白，证明了任务驱动和场景感知的关键帧提取方法对视频理解任务具有重要价值，为MLLM的视频学习能力提供了新的评估框架。

Abstract: Video understanding is a fundamental capability for multimodal intelligence, and recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on Video Question Answering (VideoQA) benchmarks. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate whether models can perceive shallow visual cues, while rarely examining whether MLLMs can learn deeper knowledge or procedural skills from video tutorials and generalize them to downstream long-horizon agentic tasks. To address this gap, we introduce VG-GUIBench (Video-Guided GUI Benchmark), a new benchmark designed to evaluate whether MLLM-based GUI agents can follow video tutorials to complete corresponding GUI interactive tasks. Furthermore, we observe that the performance of models on both VideoQA and video-guided agentic tasks critically depends on effective keyframe extraction. Based on this observation, we propose TASKER (Task-driven And Scene-aware Keyframe searchER), a keyframe extraction algorithm that jointly considers task relevance and scene dynamics to identify informative frames. Experimental results demonstrate that TASKER achieves significant performance improvements on both VideoQA and video-guided agentic task benchmarks, outperforming the best baseline by 2.0% on the EgoSchema fullset and 1.8% on the NExT-QA dataset, respectively. These results further highlight the potential of generalized keyframe extraction methods for video understanding tasks. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/VG-GUI-TASKER/VG-GUI-TASKER.

</details>


### [105] [Miti360: A Comprehensive Dataset for Improved Reforestation Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29447)
*Cedric Kiplimo,Samuel Mbatia,Ciira wa Maina,Arthur Sichangi,Dennis Gitundu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Miti360是一个针对非洲肯尼亚Kieni森林再造林监测的综合性数据集，包含高分辨率航拍图像、地面图像、树木生物物理参数、物种信息和天气数据，填补了非洲林业数据空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习训练数据集主要来自北美、欧洲、亚洲和澳大利亚，非洲林业数据严重缺乏，限制了机器学习在非洲森林监测中的应用。

Method: 使用DJI Mavic 2 Pro进行航拍调查，通过Agisoft Metashape拼接图像，ArcGIS Pro进行分块；使用智能手机和定制立体相机采集地面图像；收集树木生物物理参数、物种、GPS坐标和历史天气数据。

Result: 成功追踪了三年的树冠变化，通过在Miti360上微调DeepForest模型，将框精度和框召回率分别提高了12%和69%，展示了数据集的实际效用。

Conclusion: Miti360数据集能够训练机器学习系统解决撒哈拉以南非洲特有的挑战，推进再造林监测，促进代表性不足地区的可持续林业实践。

Abstract: Over the past decade, interest in applying machine learning (ML) to automate forest monitoring has grown significantly. However, existing training datasets are predominantly drawn from North America, Europe, Asia, and Australia, leaving a critical gap in African forestry data. To address this limited geographic diversity, we present Miti360, a comprehensive dataset for reforestation monitoring that comprises high-resolution imagery, ground truth data, and longitudinal weather data. Data collection occurred within a 770-ha reforested section of the Kieni Forest in Kenya between March 2023 and February 2025. Miti360 comprises aerial photos (orthophotos and tiles) with tree bounding box annotations, terrestrial images (single and stereo), and detailed data records including tree biophysical parameters, species, and GPS coordinates, alongside historical weather data. Aerial surveys utilized a DJI Mavic 2 Pro, with imagery stitched via Agisoft Metashape and tiled using ArcGIS Pro, while terrestrial captures used smartphones and custom stereo cameras. Miti360 enables the training of ML systems for tasks such as accelerating tree censuses, matching species to geographical areas, modelling growth based on weather conditions, and developing digital twin frameworks. Models can be trained on Miti360 to address challenges specific to Sub-Saharan Africa, ultimately advancing reforestation monitoring and fostering sustainable forestry practices in underrepresented regions. We demonstrate the utility of this dataset by successfully tracking tree crowns across three years and improving the DeepForest model's box precision and box recall by 12% and 69% respectively through fine-tuning on Miti360.

</details>


### [106] [The Platonic Defense: Backdoor Defense for Self-Supervised Encoders in the Era of Large Scale Pre-training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29451)
*Tuo Chen,Minjing Dong,Benlei Cui,Jian Liu,Jie Gui*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Platonic Representation Defense，一种攻击无关、模型无关、模态无关的黑盒测试时防御范式，用于保护自监督学习预训练模型免受后门攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自监督学习预训练模型容易受到后门攻击，现有防御方法在完全黑盒设置下难以应对，因为它们通常需要访问标签、攻击模式或训练数据。

Method: 基于柏拉图式表示假设，将防御形式化为条件能量函数，通过噪声对比估计进行检测，通过去噪分数匹配进行表示净化。

Result: 在多个自监督编码器和10多种攻击上验证了有效性，能够同时进行表示检测和净化，并在多种攻击中取得显著性能提升。

Conclusion: Platonic Representation Defense为黑盒测试时后门防御提供了一种有效的新范式，基于大规模独立训练编码器会收敛到兼容表示的假设。

Abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) pretrained models have become a dominant paradigm for visual representation learning, but they are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Existing defenses struggle to defend against such attacks in a fully black-box setting because they often require access to labels, attack patterns, or training data. To tackle this issue, we propose a new attack-agnostic, model-agnostic, and modality-agnostic black-box test-time defense paradigm, called \emph{Platonic Representation Defense}. It is inspired by the Platonic Representation Hypothesis, which suggests that large-scale independently trained encoders converge toward compatible projections of the same underlying reality. We formalize this idea as a conditional energy function defined over source representations and a set of reference representations. The energy function is trained for detection through noise-contrastive estimation and for representation purification through denoising score matching. Theoretically, the energy gap between matched and mismatched samples is lower bounded by the mutual information between source and reference representations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on multiple self-supervised encoders and more than 10 attacks. The method can perform both representation detection and purification, and achieves substantial performance gains across multiple attacks. Code is available \href{https://github.com/jsrdcht/Platonic-Representation-Defense}{here}.

</details>


### [107] [Resonant Brane Splatting for Arbitrary-Scale Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29453)
*Giulio Federico,Giuseppe Amato,Claudio Gennaro,Fabio Carrara,Marco Di Benedetto*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RBS是一种前馈任意尺度超分辨率框架，用Branes（包含高斯-埃尔米特模式的空间变化颜色基元）替代平坦高斯，以更少基元实现高质量重建，并通过高效光栅化加速推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于2D高斯溅射的ASR方法虽然加速了推理，但标准高斯作为平滑低通基元需要多个重叠、对齐良好的溅射来建模边缘和精细纹理，导致光栅化瓶颈。

Method: 引入Branes：在标准高斯包络中增加内部高斯-埃尔米特模式，每个模式分配不同颜色系数，零阶模式恢复标准GS，高阶模式捕获高频。从低分辨率特征直接预测Brane参数，并设计基于量子转折点的精确剔除策略的微分光栅器。

Result: 在标准ASR基准测试中，RBS相比隐式和GS基线提高了重建质量，同时比先前GS方法实现了更优的速度-质量权衡。

Conclusion: RBS通过Branes提供比简单高斯更丰富的数学表示，显著减少重建所需的重叠基元数量，配合高效光栅化策略，在ASR任务中实现了更好的性能与效率平衡。

Abstract: Arbitrary-Scale Super-Resolution (ASR) reconstructs images at continuous magnification factors. Recent methods accelerate inference by replacing computationally heavy implicit neural decoders with explicit 2D Gaussian Splatting (GS). However, since standard Gaussians are smooth low-pass primitives, modeling edges and fine textures requires multiple overlapping, well-aligned splats, which creates severe bottlenecks during rasterization. To address this, we introduce Resonant Brane Splatting (RBS), a feed-forward ASR framework. RBS replaces flat Gaussians with Branes: expressive primitives that emit spatially varying colors to natively model local contrast and complex textures within a single footprint. We achieve this by augmenting the standard Gaussian envelope with internal Gaussian-Hermite modes, assigning a distinct color coefficient to each. The zero-order mode recovers standard GS, while higher-order modes capture high frequencies. We predict Brane parameters directly from low-resolution features. Because Branes provide a mathematically richer formulation than simple Gaussians, far fewer primitives need to overlap to reconstruct a given target pixel. To exploit this, we introduce an efficient fully differentiable rasterizer with a precise culling strategy based on the classical quantum turning point. This allows us to safely skip negligible regions, drastically reducing the rendering overhead. Experiments on standard ASR benchmarks show that RBS improves reconstruction quality over implicit and GS baselines, while achieving superior speed-quality trade-off than prior GS methods.

</details>


### [108] [From Phase to Phenomenon: Self-Supervised Learning of Subsurface Scattering with Minimal Phase-shift Inputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29461)
*Arjun Majumdar,Raphael Braun,Andreas Engelhardt,Hendrik PA. Lensch*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出自监督预训练框架，仅用8张相位偏移轮廓测量图像学习次表面散射光传输表示，通过定制数据增强策略和专用损失函数实现高质量重建


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统次表面散射光传输表示学习方法需要大量图像输入，计算成本高。本文旨在开发仅需极少量输入图像（每视角8张）就能学习通用表示的自监督预训练框架。

Method: 使用立体投影仪-相机系统采集高频相位偏移轮廓测量图像；提出针对PSP数据的定制增强策略；设计专用损失函数提高各向异性足迹重建精度；通过编码器-解码器架构学习散射足迹响应。

Result: 方法在仅用8张输入图像的情况下，能够泛化到未见过的复杂几何和材质物体，实现高保真重建，相比先前方法减少数量级图像需求；在空间变化重光照和kNN分类评估任务上表现优异。

Conclusion: 提出的自监督预训练框架能够从极少量输入图像中学习通用次表面散射表示，显著降低数据需求，在多个下游任务中表现优越，为次表面散射光传输学习提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: We propose a self-supervised pretraining framework for learning sub-surface scattering (SSS) light transport representations from minimal input. Our method leverages a stereo projector-camera setup that captures only eight high-frequency phase-shift profilometry (PSP) images per view to pretrain an encoder in a multi-view, multi-object setting. We introduce a tailored augmentation strategy for PSP-based SSS data, and show that it significantly outperforms standard ImageNet-style augmentations for SSL pretraining.
