The pretrained encoder learns generalizable SSS representations that transfer effectively to downstream tasks, including spatially varying relighting and representation evaluation using a kNN classifier. Combined with a decoder, the model reconstructs dense scattering footprint responses, trained using a dedicated cost function that improves accuracy, particularly for anisotropic footprints. Despite using only eight input images per view, our approach generalizes to unseen objects with complex geometry and material properties, achieving high-fidelity reconstructions while requiring orders of magnitude fewer images than prior methods.

</details>


### [109] [MIRROR: Aligning Semantic Relations from Language to Image via Gromov--Wasserstein](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29462)
*Hong-Han Wang,Yuntao Wang,Hu Ding*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MIRROR提出了一种几何正则化框架，通过最优输运将语言中的关系先验迁移到视觉表示中，解决MLLMs在视觉场景中应用语言关系先验失败的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型虽然继承了丰富的语言关系先验，但在视觉场景中应用这些关系时常常失败。作者发现这是由于投影对齐方法只关注单个视觉token的语义正确性，而忽略了概念间关系在跨模态迁移中的保持。

Method: 提出了MIRROR框架，基于半逆Gromov-Wasserstein问题，将语言表示中的丰富关系结构迁移到视觉表示中。该方法推导出代理损失函数，获得闭式解来规定理想的视觉关系结构。在解码器Transformer中，设计了层次、头层和token层的针对性策略，无需额外参数或推理成本。

Result: MIRROR在保持通用视觉语言任务性能的同时，显著提高了多模态大语言模型的关系一致性。该方法计算高效，适用于长token序列。

Conclusion: 通过几何正则化将语言关系先验迁移到视觉表示是解决MLLMs跨模态关系应用失败的有效方法。MIRROR框架提供了一种结构化的解决方案，既能提升关系一致性，又不损害其他任务性能。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) inherit rich relational priors from their language backbones, yet often fail when asked to apply these relationships in visual contexts. We trace this failure to a structural blind spot: projection-based alignment trains each visual token to carry the right semantics, but never asks whether the relationships between concepts survive the crossing from language to vision. To address this, we propose MIRROR (Mapping Inter-concept Relations from language to visual Representation via Optimal-transport-based Regularization), a geometric regularization framework that transfers relational priors from language to vision by exploiting the rich relational structure encoded in language representations. Specifically, we derive a surrogate loss from the proposed Semi-Inverse Gromov-Wasserstein (SI-GW) problem, an inverse geometric problem that aligns visual representations with language-derived relational priors. We show that this formulation admits a unique closed-form solution that prescribes the ideal visual relational structure implied by language geometry and cross-modal coupling. The structure of the formulation also enables efficient computation, making it applicable to long token sequences. Applying SI-GW inside decoder-only Transformers requires careful design. We introduce targeted strategies at the layer, head, and token levels to ensure stable extraction without additional parameters or inference cost. MIRROR improves relational consistency while preserving performance on general vision-language tasks.

</details>


### [110] [CellDETR: A Detection-Guided Framework for Scalable Cell Representation Learning from Histopathology Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29463)
*Shikang Zhang,Guojun Li,Yicong Mao,Chulin Sha*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CellDETR是一个基于Deformable DETR的检测引导框架，用于从全切片图像中学习细胞级表示，通过位置特征解耦和框约束注意力实现细胞嵌入提取，在监督分类、自监督预训练和跨数据集分类方面表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前病理学基础模型主要关注切片和斑块级表示学习，而细胞级表示学习研究不足，限制了细胞解析的可解释性、生物学发现和临床转化。

Method: 提出CellDETR框架，基于Deformable DETR构建，引入位置特征解耦和框约束注意力机制，实现细胞级嵌入的自动提取。同时结合对比学习设计，构建基于CellDETR的预训练模型，利用未标注WSIs进行可扩展的细胞表示学习。

Result: 在PanNuke数据的监督细胞分类中超越现有SOTA方法；通过预训练提升下游细胞分类性能；使用Xenium空间转录组学细胞标注预训练后，实现准确的跨数据集细胞分类，证明学习到的细胞嵌入具有可迁移性和生物学相关性。

Conclusion: CellDETR为可解释计算病理学提供了一个可扩展的通用细胞级表示学习框架，能够推动细胞解析的可解释性、生物学发现和临床转化。

Abstract: Recent advances in pathology foundation models have substantially improved patch and slide level representation learning from whole-slide images (WSIs).However, cell-level representations learning remain underexplored, limiting cell resolved interpretability, biological discovery, and clinical translation. We propose CellDETR, a detection-guided framework built on Deformable DETR for scalable cell representation learning from WSIs. By introducing location feature decoupling and box-constrained attention mechanism, CellDETR enables automated extraction of cell-level embeddings, and outperform existing state-of-the-art methods in supervised cell classification on PanNuke data. In addition, by incorporating contrastive learning design, we build a CellDETR-based pretraining model for scalable cell representation learning from unlabeled WSIs, which improves downstream cell classification performance. Furthermore, we show that after pretraining with Xenium spatial transcriptomics-derived cell annotations, CellDETR achieves accurate cross-dataset cell classification, demonstrating the transferability and biological relevance of the learned cell embeddings. Together, CellDETR provides a scalable route toward general cell-level representation learning framework for interpretable computational patholog

</details>


### [111] [Rank-Aware Hyperbolic Alignment for Vision-Language Dataset Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29464)
*Jongoh Jeong,Sun-Kyung Lee,Kuk-Jin Yoon*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出RAHA方法，通过双曲空间中的秩感知对齐改进视觉语言数据集蒸馏，在固定预算下实现更好的跨模态检索和迁移鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言数据集蒸馏方法在欧氏空间中强制执行全维度对齐，但图像-文本相关性通常是秩不足的，共享语义集中在低维范围，剩余变化分布在弱相关的残差子空间中，这种对齐过于严格

Method: 提出秩感知双曲对齐(RAHA)，将多模态表示提升到双曲空间，使用非对称目标优化蒸馏对，在共享范围内强制测地线对齐，同时正则化残差子空间以保留模态私有多样性

Result: 实验表明RAHA在基准测试中展示了有竞争力的跨模态检索性能，并在固定预算下改进了迁移指标

Conclusion: RAHA通过结合分层几何和显式对齐容量控制，有效解决了视觉语言数据集蒸馏中的秩不足对齐问题，提高了模型性能

Abstract: Vision-language dataset distillation (VLDD) compresses a large image-text paired dataset into a small set of synthetic pairs that can efficiently train contrastive vision-language models under strict data and compute budgets. Most existing methods match expert trajectories or cross-modal statistics, yet still enforce full-dimensional alignment in a Euclidean embedding space. This is often overly restrictive due to rank-deficient image--text correlation, with shared semantics concentrated in a low-dimensional range and remaining variation spread across a weakly correlated residual subspace. LoRS relaxes alignment at the similarity level by low-rank factorization, but does not explicitly control dominant alignment capacity and structure in the representation space. We thus propose a rank-aware hyperbolic alignment (RAHA) that combines hierarchical geometry with explicit alignment-capacity control. RAHA lifts multimodal representations to hyperbolic space and optimizes distilled pairs with asymmetric objectives that enforce geodesic alignment in the shared range while regularizing the residual subspace to preserve modality-private diversity and improve transfer robustness. Experiments on benchmarks show that RAHA demonstrates competitive cross-modal retrieval and improved transfer indicators under fixed budgets.

</details>


### [112] [MAVIN: Multi-Shot Audio-Visual Generation with Narrative Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29473)
*Kaiqi Liu,Yunyao Mao,Ziqi Cai,Zheng Geng,Jing Wang,Qiulin Wang,Xintao Wang,Pengfei Wan,Kun Gai,Shuchen Weng,Boxin Shi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MAVIN是一个多镜头音视频生成框架，通过边界感知注意力、ID感知传播和多智能体脚本管道解决现有方法的时间错位、可控性不足和脚本不完整问题，实现了定制化叙事控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成模型虽然能产生高质量视频，但在复杂叙事控制方面存在困难，特别是多镜头音视频生成中的时间错位、可控性有限和脚本不完整问题。

Method: 1. 边界感知注意力：利用分层字幕和边界感知令牌路由在各自时间边界内渲染音视频元素；2. ID感知传播：使用身份嵌入和身份感知掩码将特定身份绑定到一致的视觉外观和声音音色；3. 多智能体脚本管道：将自由格式用户输入转换为分层字幕；4. 构建MAVINSet数据集用于训练和评估。

Result: MAVIN在实验中取得了最先进的性能，为将生成模型整合到专业电影制作工作流程开辟了新途径。

Conclusion: MAVIN是首个具有定制化叙事控制的多镜头音视频生成框架，通过解决时间对齐、身份一致性和脚本完整性等关键问题，推动了音视频生成技术的发展。

Abstract: While recent generative models produce high-fidelity videos, they struggle with the complex narrative control required for coherent multi-shot audio-visual generation. Existing methods suffer from temporal misalignment, limited controllability, and incomplete scripting. In this paper, we propose MAVIN, the first framework for multi-shot audio-visual generation with customized narrative control. To resolve temporal misalignment, we propose boundary-aware attention, which leverages hierarchical captions and boundary-aware token routing to render audio-visual elements within their respective temporal boundaries. To improve the controllability for multi-subject scenarios, we propose ID-aware propagation, utilizing identity embeddings and an identity-aware mask to bind specific identities to consistent visual appearances and vocal timbres. To provide comprehensive audio-visual narratives, we present a multi-agent scripting pipeline to transform free-form user inputs into hierarchical captions. Furthermore, we construct MAVINSet, a multi-shot audio-visual dataset for robust training and evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MAVIN achieves state-of-the-art performance, opening up a new avenue for integrating generative models into professional filmmaking workflows.

</details>


### [113] [VCS-SLAM: Geometry-Validated Semantic Evidence Fusion for 3D Gaussian SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29494)
*Raman Jha,Shuaihang Yuan,Yi Fang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VCS-SLAM提出了一种几何验证的语义证据融合框架，通过评估语义观测的几何可靠性来解决3D高斯SLAM中语义融合的可靠性问题，从而抑制遮挡语义更新、减少无支撑语义扩散、延迟模糊区域标签分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义3D高斯SLAM通常将2D语义先验融合到持久3D地图中，使用统一的优化权重。但在在线建图中，这些先验并不总是同样可靠：遮挡、无支撑的语义边界和模糊的光线几何会导致语义伪影持续存在于全局高斯地图中。

Method: 提出VCS-SLAM框架，通过可见性一致性、表面支撑边界证据和光线级冲突不确定性来评估语义观测的几何可靠性，而不是将所有语义观测视为同等有效的监督。该可靠性感知目标抑制遮挡语义更新、减少无支撑语义扩散、延迟模糊区域的标签分配。

Result: 在Replica数据集上的实验显示改进的语义一致性、边界保留和重建质量。在ScanNet上的进一步结果表明，VCS-SLAM在真实RGB-D输入下保持了竞争力的跟踪性能。

Conclusion: VCS-SLAM通过几何验证的语义证据融合框架，有效解决了语义3D高斯SLAM中语义观测可靠性不一致的问题，提高了语义建图的准确性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Visual SLAM performance often deteriorates in complex real-world applications. Semantic 3D Gaussian SLAM commonly fuses 2D semantic priors into a persistent 3D map using uniform optimization weights. However, such priors are not equally reliable in online mapping: occlusions, unsupported semantic boundaries, and ambiguous ray geometry can introduce persistent semantic artifacts into the global Gaussian map. We propose VCS-SLAM, a geometry-validated semantic evidence fusion framework for RGB-D 3D Gaussian SLAM. Instead of treating all semantic observations as uniformly valid supervision, VCS-SLAM evaluates their geometric reliability through visibility consistency, surface-supported boundary evidence, and ray-level conflict uncertainty. The resulting reliability-aware objective suppresses occluded semantic updates, reduces unsupported semantic bleeding, and delays premature label assignment in ambiguous regions. Experiments on Replica demonstrate improved semantic consistency, boundary preservation, and reconstruction quality. Results on ScanNet further show that VCS-SLAM maintains competitive tracking performance under real RGB-D inputs

</details>


### [114] [Rectifying Mask via Entropy for Distractor-Free 3DGS in Ambiguous Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29496)
*Wongi Park,Jiyeon Lim,Minjae Lee,Myeongseok Nam,Seongjun Choi,Jungwoo Kim,Soomok Lee,William J. Beksi,SangHyun Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RefineSplat是一个用于3D场景重建的框架，通过熵感知自适应掩码和密度控制来有效识别和去除动态干扰物，实现无干扰的新视角合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在区分动态干扰物和静态场景方面存在困难，特别是当它们在颜色或语义上相似时。需要一种系统方法来处理这些模糊的干扰物，以提升3D场景重建的质量。

Method: 提出熵感知自适应掩码方法，利用熵和实例掩码来捕捉模糊干扰物；引入熵感知密度控制，通过熵感知位置梯度对齐高斯分布；创建了包含18个场景的Ambiguous wild数据集用于验证。

Result: 在多个数据集上的实验结果表明，RefineSplat实现了最先进的性能，能够有效去除干扰物，实现无干扰的新视角合成。

Conclusion: RefineSplat通过系统化的熵感知方法有效解决了动态干扰物识别问题，在模糊场景中表现出色，为3D场景重建提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: We present RefineSplat, a systematic framework that effectively constructs transient masks to identify diverse ambiguous distractors. To do this, we qualitatively and quantitatively analyze issues and propose a novel entropy-aware adaptive masking method. Unlike existing approaches that struggle to distinguish transient elements from static scenes due to color or semantic ambiguity, RefineSplat captures ambiguous distractors leveraging entropy and instance masks. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective entropy-aware density control to align Gaussians in ambiguous scenarios considering Entropy-aware positional gradients. Additionally, to rigorously validate our method, we first create and release the Ambiguous wild dataset, including 18 scenes where distractors and static scenes are hard to distinguish due to color or semantic resemblances. Experimental results on various datasets demonstrate that RefineSplat shows state-of-the-art performance, showing distractor-free novel view synthesis.

</details>


### [115] [Learning Where and When: Patch-Based Spatiotemporal Localization in Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29498)
*Hamza Karim,Nghia Nguyen,Lokman Bekit,Yasin Yilmaz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于patch的弱监督视频异常检测时空定位框架，通过多示例学习和邻近感知Top-k时空选择策略，实现无需边界框监督的细粒度空间异常定位。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有弱监督视频异常检测主要关注时间定位，忽略了异常在帧内的空间范围，而空间定位对于实际部署和可解释性至关重要。

Method: 基于网格级patch特征，在多示例学习框架下学习区域级异常分数，提出邻近感知Top-k时空选择策略，无需边界框监督即可生成细粒度空间异常图。

Result: 在多个基准测试中超越现有最先进方法，显著提升时空定位精度，并发布了两个广泛使用数据集的测试集帧级边界框标注。

Conclusion: 提出的patch-based时空框架有效解决了弱监督视频异常检测中的空间定位问题，为未来研究提供了新的资源和基准。

Abstract: Weakly supervised video anomaly detection (WSVAD) has predominantly focused on temporal localization, identifying when anomalies occur while largely neglecting their spatial extent within frames. Yet, spatial localization is essential for interpretability and practical deployment in real-world settings. We introduce a patch-based spatiotemporal framework for weakly supervised anomaly localization that jointly models where and when anomalies occur. Our approach operates on grid-level patch features and learns region-level anomaly scores under a multiple instance learning paradigm. We further propose a Proximity-Aware Top-k spatiotemporal selection strategy that enables the model to generate fine-grained spatial anomaly maps without requiring bounding-box supervision during training. Our method surpasses existing state-of-the-art approaches across multiple benchmarks, yielding substantial gains in spatiotemporal localization accuracy. In addition, we release frame-level bounding-box annotations for the test sets of two widely used datasets, along with our code and pretrained models, providing new resources to facilitate future research in spatially grounded WSVAD.

</details>


### [116] [Empirical Evaluation of Multi-Modal Touch Detection in Over-the-Shoulder Video Surveillance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29504)
*Mohammadreza Rashidi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个从视频中检测移动设备键盘触摸的框架，通过多种视觉模态分析手指交互来重建击键序列，但在真实场景中效果不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 该研究的动机是探索一种无需直接屏幕录制就能监控人机交互模式的方法，通过分析肩部视角视频来检测移动设备上的触摸交互，特别是在安全敏感场景如密码输入监测方面。

Method: 方法采用多模态检测框架：1）使用MediaPipe进行手部解剖学特征点检测；2）HSV肤色过滤；3）时间帧差分进行运动检测；4）基于形状引导的Canny边缘分析。将相对触摸坐标映射到参考屏幕布局来重建打字序列。

Result: 在120帧的模拟密码输入视频中，仅运动检测和仅边缘检测的F1分数分别为18.5%和18.2%，多模态组合的F1分数为16.7%，序列相似度为3.0%。在5个真实公开视频中，检测器每帧产生中位数57个触摸点（峰值205个），远高于实际点击率，无法在非受控场景中实现可靠的击键重建。

Conclusion: 该触摸检测框架在受控模拟环境中表现有限，但在真实场景中无法可靠工作，主要因为肤色过滤器对整个手部而非指尖接触产生响应，系统无法在非校准的真实视频中实现有效的击键重建。

Abstract: Video Intelligence Surveillance (VIDINT) on over-the-shoulder footage is a proposed vector for monitoring human-computer interaction patterns without direct screen recording access. In this paper, we evaluate a Behavioral Intelligence (BEHINT) touch-detection framework designed to reconstruct keystroke events on mobile keypad interfaces from physical finger interactions. Our system integrates four parallel detection modalities: (1) anatomical hand landmarks via MediaPipe, (2) HSV skin color filtering, (3) temporal frame differencing for motion detection, and (4) shape-guided Canny edge analysis. We map relative touch coordinates to a reference screen layout to reconstruct typing sequences. Evaluation on a 120-frame first-person staged video of passcode entry reveals that while MediaPipe and Skin Detection fail to run autonomously due to partial hand occlusion and ambient noise, Motion-Only and Edge-Only configurations achieve F1-scores of 18.5% and 18.2%, respectively. The combined multi-modal configuration achieves an F1-score of 16.7% and a sequence similarity of 3.0% when mapped to the iOS passcode layout. We conduct ablation, resolution decay, noise sensitivity, and proximity threshold tuning to characterize the system's operational envelope. We then audit generalization on 5 real, publicly licensed third-person phone videos and find that the detector emits a median of 57 touch points per frame (peaking at 205), one to three orders of magnitude more than the rate of real taps, because the skin filter responds to the whole hand rather than to fingertip contact. The staged keystroke result does not survive contact with uncontrolled footage; the system does not achieve reliable keystroke reconstruction outside the calibrated staged setting.

</details>


### [117] [Benchmark AUC Is Not Deployable Reliability: A Cross-Dataset Audit of Off-the-Shelf Features for Surveillance Video Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29506)
*Mohammadreza Rashidi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 视频异常检测基准测试中的高准确率仅适用于同一场景，跨场景检测性能降至随机水平，表明现有方法在实际部署中可靠性被高估


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 审计当前视频异常检测方法在实际部署中的可靠性，揭示基准测试中训练和测试在同一场景下的假设被打破时的性能变化

Method: 使用现成的冻结嵌入模型（CLIP、DINOv2、ResNet-50、EfficientNet-B0）和最近邻距离，构建无监督正常性模型，在4个真实数据集上进行同场景和跨场景测试

Result: 同场景检测AUC平均0.704，但跨场景AUC降至0.499（随机水平），最强骨干网络DINOv2的同场景AUC最高（达0.901）但跨场景下降最大，假警报率高达每小时31,931次

Conclusion: 当前监控异常检测的基准测试数字夸大了可部署可靠性，仅描述校准实验室设置，跨场景检测性能与随机猜测无异

Abstract: Automated "suspicious behavior" flagging is a headline promise of AI surveillance, and the field reports high frame-level ROC-AUC on standard video anomaly detection benchmarks. Those numbers are measured by training and testing on the same camera and scene. We audit what happens when that assumption is dropped. We build an unsupervised normality model from the all-normal training frames of one dataset, using frozen off-the-shelf embeddings (CLIP, DINOv2, ResNet-50, EfficientNet-B0) and a nearest-neighbour distance, and score the test frames of the same and of other datasets. Across 4 real datasets (UCSD Ped1, UCSD Ped2, CUHK Avenue, ShanghaiTech) and 4 backbones, same-dataset AUC averages 0.704 but cross-dataset AUC averages 0.499, which is chance: a detector calibrated on one scene is no better than a coin flip on another, and in several pairs it is below chance. The strongest backbone makes this worse, not better: DINOv2 has the best same-dataset AUC (up to 0.901 on Ped2) and the largest cross-dataset drop. The collapse is not an artefact of the scoring rule: replacing the nearest-neighbour detector with a PaDiM-style Mahalanobis detector reproduces it almost exactly (cross-dataset gap 0.202 versus 0.208). Even at a favourable operating point the false-alarm rate is on the order of 31,931 per hour. We conclude that the benchmark numbers quoted for surveillance anomaly detection describe a calibrated laboratory setting and overstate deployable reliability by a wide margin, and we release the code that reproduces every number.

</details>


### [118] [Scenes as Objects, Not Primitives: Instance-Structured 3D Tokenization from Unposed Views](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29513)
*Mijin Yoo,In Cho,Subin Jeon,Jiwoo Lee,Eunbyung Park,Seon Joo Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种前馈框架，直接从多视角图像中分解场景为实例结构化的3D token组，实现对象级别的重建、分割和编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有前馈重建方法输出密集、无结构的点或高斯分布，需要事后恢复对象级结构。需要一种能直接从图像中分解出对象级表示的方法。

Method: 使用token组表示：每个实例token捕获实体级身份，锚点token编码局部几何和外观，解码为3D高斯分布。通过可微渲染联合学习重建和分割，无需3D标注。

Result: 在类无关实例分割上超越逐场景优化基线，在新视角合成上保持竞争力。token组可直接实现实例级场景编辑和高效开放词汇3D实例检索。

Conclusion: 提出的token组表示将对象实例作为原生接口而非衍生产物，实现了紧凑的对象中心表示，支持重建、分割、编辑和检索等多种应用。

Abstract: A 3D scene is understood through its objects, not the primitives that compose them. Yet feed-forward reconstruction methods output dense, unstructured sets of points or Gaussians, leaving object-level structure to be recovered after the fact. We propose a feed-forward framework that decomposes a scene into instance-structured 3D token groups directly from unposed multi-view images -- compact object-centric units from which reconstruction, segmentation, and manipulation all follow. Each token group pairs an instance token capturing entity-level identity with anchor tokens that encode local geometry and appearance, which are decoded into a set of 3D Gaussians. This two-level factorization decouples object identity from local appearance, making object instances a native interface of the representation rather than a derived product. The token groups are learned through differentiable rendering with joint reconstruction and segmentation supervision, requiring no 3D annotations. Our feed-forward model surpasses per-scene optimization baselines in class-agnostic instance segmentation while remaining competitive in novel view synthesis. Beyond these metrics, the same token groups directly unlock instance-level scene editing -- removing, translating, or inserting objects by operating on their groups -- as well as efficient open-vocabulary 3D instance retrieval, where retrieval complexity scales with the number of instances rather than primitives.

</details>


### [119] [MotionAtlas: Detailed Region Captioning for Motion-Centric Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29531)
*Weisong Liu,Haochen Wang,Kuan Gao,Yuhao Wang,Yikang Zhou,Zhongwei Ren,Jacky Mai,Anna Wang,Yanwei Li,Jason Li,Zhaoxiang Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MotionAtlas是一个用于详细描述运动中心视频的系统，包含人工标注基准、可扩展高质量训练样本构建管道和强大的视频多模态大语言模型家族，专注于区域感知运动描述。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统全局运动描述数据集存在视觉混乱和运动纠缠问题，无法对运动进行可靠、可量化的评估。需要开发能够专注于特定区域运动描述的系统，以解决这些问题。

Method: 1)构建MotionAtlas-Bench基准，包含2,073个多项选择题，用于评估细粒度运动理解；2)设计严格可扩展的数据管道，通过自引导精炼抑制细粒度幻觉，生成159k高质量运动描述数据；3)设计定制训练数据组合策略，提升各种基线视频MLLM性能。

Result: MotionAtlas-4B模型在通用运动基准上平均超越Qwen3-VL-4B 5.2个百分点。系统在区域感知运动描述方面表现出色，缓解了视觉混乱和运动纠缠问题。

Conclusion: MotionAtlas为运动中心视频提供了有效的详细描述解决方案，通过区域感知方法、高质量数据构建和定制训练策略，显著提升了视频多模态大语言模型的运动理解能力。已发布基准、数据集和代码。

Abstract: We propose MotionAtlas, a system for detailed captioning of motion-centric videos, comprising (1) a dedicated human-annotated benchmark, (2) a scalable, high-quality pipeline to construct training samples, and (3) a family of powerful Video-MLLMs. Unlike conventional global motion captioning datasets, we focus on region-aware motion captioning: given a video and a spatiotemporal mask, the model generates precise descriptions of motion within the target region, thereby alleviating visual clutter and motion entanglement and enabling reliable, quantifiable evaluation. Concretely, we first build MotionAtlas-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 2,073 multiple-choice questions, meticulously annotated for a curated set of high-quality, motion-centric videos, to evaluate fine-grained motion understanding of the objects in question. Second, we design a rigorous and scalable data pipeline that leverages self-bootstrap refinement to suppress fine-grained hallucinations, yielding 159k high-quality motion captioning data. Third, we design a tailored training data composition strategy, which achieves consistent and substantial performance gains across diverse baseline Video-MLLMs, including Molmo2 and Qwen3-VL. For instance, MotionAtlas-4B surpasses Qwen3-VL-4B by an average of 5.2 percentage points across general motion benchmarks. The benchmark, dataset, and code have been released.

</details>


### [120] [GarmentZoom: Generating Zoomable Images from Garment Listings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29535)
*Renjie Zhao,Jingwei Ma,Huy Huynh Cao,Brian Curless,Steven M. Seitz,Ira Kemelmacher-Shlizerman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GarmentZoom：一种增强服装全视图照片细节的系统，使其达到特写照片的保真度，支持无缝缩放和平移浏览


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线服装产品展示通常包含全视图和特写照片，但两者无法兼顾，用户需要在不同视图间切换，破坏了浏览的连续性。需要一种能无缝展示细节的解决方案。

Method: 训练单一模型支持连续尺度范围（3-20倍）的细节增强，无需空间对齐或逐实例微调，直接合成细节

Result: 系统能够在不要求空间对齐的情况下合成细节，以少量训练成本达到逐实例方法的质量

Conclusion: GarmentZoom 提供了一种高效的服装细节增强方法，解决了在线服装浏览中视图切换的问题，支持连续缩放浏览体验

Abstract: Online product listings for garments often include an overview photo and a close-up to show garment details. However, each photo focuses on either field of view or garment detail, forcing users to alternate between views and breaking browsing continuity. We present GarmentZoom, a system that enhances the full-view photo to match the fidelity of its accompanying close-up, enabling seamless zoom-and-pan exploration. Unlike standard reference-based super-resolution, our setting involves close-up references that are spatially unaligned with the full view, and scale factors that vary substantially across garments 3-20$\times$. Prior work typically relies on alignment to transfer details or requires per-instance fine-tuning to memorize them. Instead, we train a single model that supports a continuous range of scales across diverse garments. Our approach synthesizes details without requiring spatial alignment and matches the quality of per-instance methods with a fraction of the training cost.

</details>


### [121] [Reliability-Prioritized Fine-Grained Generation in Multimodal Large](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29573)
*Xiaomeng Fan,Wu Wei,Yuwei Wu,Zhi Gao,Shiyu Luo,Mingyang Gao,Haoyu Zhao,Zhenxin Diao,Yuxuan Ba,Lijia Feng,Yunde Jia,Mehrtash Harandi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了GranFact基准和评估方法，用于解决多模态大语言模型在生成细粒度描述时的可靠性问题，并开发了基于DPO的优化方法以平衡描述的细粒度与可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在生成视觉内容的细粒度描述时存在可靠性挑战，即细粒度生成比粗粒度生成更容易出错。作者观察到这一现象并从理论上证明，模型应该生成最细但仍可靠的描述，而不是简单地产生更具体的输出。

Method: 1) 开发GranFact基准，包含专家验证的多对象图像和从粗到细的类别标注；2) 设计层次感知评估算法，评估模型预测是否视觉正确以及正确预测的特定程度；3) 提出基于直接偏好优化的可靠性优先偏好优化方法，惩罚不可靠的细粒度声明，同时奖励可靠的特定性。

Result: 在GranFact基准上的实验表明，该方法能够改进细粒度生成，同时保持可靠性。代码和数据已公开。

Conclusion: 多模态大语言模型的细粒度描述生成存在可靠性挑战，提出的GranFact基准和层次感知评估方法能够有效评估这一现象，而基于DPO的优化方法能够在保持可靠性的同时改进细粒度生成。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly expected to generate fine-grained descriptions of visual content. However, we observe and theoretically show that generating fine-grained responses poses a reliability challenge, \textit{i.e.}, fine-grained generation is more error-prone than coarse-grained generation. This phenomenon suggests that models should generate the finest description that remains reliable rather than simply produce more specific outputs. To investigate this problem, we develop \textsc{GranFact}, a granularity-aware benchmark consisting of expert-verified multi-object images with coarse-to-fine category annotations. Then, we design a hierarchy-aware evaluation algorithm, which assesses both whether model predictions are visually correct and how specific the correct predictions are. We also propose a reliability-prioritized preference optimization method based on Direct Preference Optimization, which penalizes unreliable fine-grained claims while rewarding reliable specificity. Experiments on \textsc{GranFact} show that our method improves fine-grained generation while preserving reliability. Code and data are available \href{https://github.com/WeiWu2025/GranFact}{here}.

</details>


### [122] [ReMAP-PET: Beyond Visual Understanding -- Learning Region-Guided Metabolic Alignment Semantics from Brain PET](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29577)
*Dasen Dai,Yanteng Zhang,Shuoqi Li,Yuxiang Wei,Hongjie Yu,Qingxin Zhang,Qizhen Lan,Jagath C. Rajapakse,Vince D. Calhoun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ReMAP-PET 是一个针对 PET 影像的新型框架，通过监督学习脑区域标准化摄取值比（SUVR）剖面，结合回归和对比目标，使编码器能学习 PET 模态的代谢语义，超越了传统将 PET 视为通用体数据的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 3D 脑部基础模型将 PET 视为通用的体数据，忽略了其结构化的区域代谢信息，而这些信息正是 PET 区别于结构神经影像的关键。为了充分利用 PET 在脑代谢和神经退行性疾病评估中的临床价值，需要开发能够捕捉代谢语义的专门模型。

Method: 提出 ReMAP-PET 框架，通过联合回归和对比目标，监督一个部分调优的 MedicalNet 3D ResNet-50 学习脑区域标准化摄取值比（SUVR）剖面。该方法将代谢嵌入与临床语言通过对比对齐（与冻结的 BioClinicalBERT）连接起来，并演示了通过 SUVR 约束的言语化实现端到端的 PET 到报告生成。

Result: 在 1015 个配对的 PET-SUVR 样本上，ReMAP-PET 实现了 0.070 SUVR 平均绝对误差和 77.8% 的 PET SUVR Recall@1，显著优于五个冻结的预训练基线。线性探测在诊断分类和认知回归任务上证实，嵌入保留了临床相关信息，无需任务特定的微调。

Conclusion: 将 PET 编码器基于区域代谢语义（而非将其视为通用体数据）能够产生结构化、可解释且与语言兼容的表征。这为代谢感知的 PET 理解指明了新方向，有助于更好地利用 PET 在神经退行性疾病评估中的临床价值。

Abstract: Positron Emission Tomography (PET) reveals brain metabolism and is clinically central to neurodegenerative disease assessment, yet existing 3D brain foundation models treat PET as generic volumetric data, missing the structured regional metabolic information that distinguishes it from structural neuroimaging. To address these limitations, we propose ReMAP-PET, a framework that moves beyond visual encoding by supervising a partially-tuned MedicalNet 3D ResNet-50 with brain regional standardized uptake value ratio (SUVR) profiles through joint regression and contrastive objectives, enabling the encoder to learn the metabolic semantics underlying PET modality. On 1015 paired PET--SUVR samples, ReMAP-PET achieves 0.070 SUVR MAE and 77.8% PET SUVR Recall@1, substantially outperforming five frozen pretrained baselines. We further connect the metabolic embedding to clinical language via contrastive alignment with frozen BioClinicalBERT and demonstrate end-to-end PET-to-report generation through SUVR-constrained verbalization. Linear probing on diagnostic classification and cognitive regression tasks confirms that the embeddings retain clinically relevant information without task-specific fine-tuning. Our results show that grounding PET encoders in regional metabolic semantics -- rather than treating PET as generic volumetric data -- yields representations that are structured, interpretable, and language-compatible, pointing to a new direction for metabolic-aware PET understanding.

</details>


### [123] [ScAle: Attention Head Scaling as a Minimal Adapter for Spatial Reasoning in Vision Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29579)
*Rahul Chowdhury,Timothy A Rupprecht,Xuan Shen,Pu Zhao,Yanzhi Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ScAle：一种超轻量级视觉语言模型适配方法，通过学习少量标量系数来调节冻结骨干网络中最后token的注意力和MLP激活，显著提升空间推理能力，仅需1K可训练参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 空间推理是视觉语言模型（VLMs）的持续挑战，改进通常需要大量参数微调。研究发现调整特定transformer层激活（不修改预训练权重）能显著影响下游性能。

Method: 提出ScAle方法，在完全冻结的骨干网络中学习一小组标量系数来调制最后token的注意力机制和MLP激活，实现超轻量级适配。

Result: 在SpatialEval空间推理基准和真实VQA数据集（COCOQA和VGQA）上评估，ScAle仅用1K可训练参数就能实现高达134.1%的相对准确率提升，恢复标准PEFT方法的大部分性能同时保持非空间VQA准确率。

Conclusion: 有界激活重加权为适应预训练VLMs提供了一种简单、架构无关且高度参数高效的替代方案，证明了通过极少量参数调整激活就能显著改善空间推理能力。

Abstract: Spatial reasoning remains a persistent challenge for many vision language models (VLMs), and improving it typically requires fine-tuning with substantial additional parameters. Our preliminary analysis reveals that rescaling activations in selected transformer layers-without modifying pretrained weights-can significantly influence downstream performance. Motivated by this observation, we propose ScAle, an ultra-lightweight adaptation method that learns a small set of scalar coefficients to modulate last-token attention and MLP activations in a fully frozen backbone. We evaluate our method on the synthetic spatial reasoning benchmark SpatialEval and on real-world VQA datasets (COCOQA and VGQA) across multiple model families. Our method, ScAle, achieves up to 134.1% relative accuracy gains using only 1K trainable parameters without requiring millions of trainable parameters as in standard PEFT methods such as LoRA. Despite its extreme compactness, our approach recovers a substantial fraction of standard PEFT performance while preserving strong non-spatial VQA accuracy. These results demonstrate that bounded activation reweighting provides a simple, architecture-agnostic, and highly parameter-efficient alternative for adapting pretrained VLMs.

</details>


### [124] [SonoCLIP: Mask-Guided Region-Aware Vision-Language Pretraining for Fetal Ultrasound Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29586)
*Hang Su,Chao Sun,Zhaofan Li,Wei Hu,Juhua Liu,Bo Du*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SonoCLIP 是首个百万规模区域可控的胎儿超声视觉-语言基础模型，通过分割掩码作为视觉提示实现联合全局-局部对比表示学习，在跨中心评估中展现出卓越的零样本迁移性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于CLIP的超声模型主要依赖全局图像-文本对齐，对临床关键局部结构的敏感性不足，而超声领域因斑点噪声、采集变异性和细微解剖边界导致高观察者间变异性，需要更精细的模型。

Method: 1. 在视觉编码器中集成分割掩码作为掩码通道视觉提示；2. 提出基于sigmoid的成对对比损失，提高大规模监督下的稳定性；3. 构建包含144万图像、24个标准平面的多模态胎儿超声数据集进行大规模预训练。

Result: 跨中心评估显示SonoCLIP在全局和掩码引导推理下均实现卓越的零样本迁移性能，建立了可控且临床导向的胎儿超声分析基础模型。

Conclusion: SonoCLIP通过整合分割掩码作为视觉提示和提出稳定的对比损失，成功创建了首个百万规模区域可控的胎儿超声视觉-语言基础模型，为超声分析提供了更精细、临床相关的解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-language foundation models have shown strong potential in medical image analysis. Although foundation models for ultrasound imaging have recently emerged, the domain remains particularly challenging due to severe speckle noise, acquisition variability, and subtle anatomical boundaries, leading to high inter-observer variability. Existing CLIP-based models rely primarily on global image-text alignment, limiting their sensitivity to clinically decisive local structures. We propose SonoCLIP, the first million-scale region-controllable fetal ultrasound vision-language foundation model that integrates segmentation masks as mask-channel visual prompts within the vision encoder, enabling joint global-local contrastive representation learning. To support scalable region-text alignment, we introduce a sigmoid-based pairwise contrastive loss that improves stability under large-scale supervision. We further curate a 1.44M-image multimodal fetal ultrasound dataset spanning 24 standard planes for large-scale pretraining. Extensive cross-center evaluations demonstrate that SonoCLIP achieves superior zero-shot transfer performance under both global and mask-guided inference, establishing a controllable and clinically oriented foundation model for fetal ultrasound analysis. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/Harrison-one/SonoCLIP.

</details>


### [125] [One Scene, Two Depths: Probing Geometric Ambiguity in Monocular Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29600)
*Xiaohao Xu,Feng Xue,Xiang Li,Haowei Li,Shusheng Yang,Tianyi Zhang,Matthew Johnson-Roberson,Xiaonan Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了MultiDepth-3k基准测试来评估深度估计模型在透明场景中的层偏好，发现不同模型对同一分层几何结构有不同的解析方式，并展示了Laplacian Visual Prompting可以改变模型的层选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统单目深度估计将复杂的分层几何结构简化为每个像素的单一深度值，这在透明场景中会丢失重要的几何信息。深度标注实际上是一种约定而非场景固有事实，不同模型会表现出不同的深度层偏好。

Method: 提出了MultiDepth-3k（MD-3k）基准测试，这是一个稀疏的两层序数基准，用于测量深度层偏好和多层空间关系准确性（ML-SRA）。同时引入了Laplacian Visual Prompting（LVP），一种无需训练的光谱输入变换方法。

Result: 在MD-3k上，领先的深度基础模型在标准RGB输入下表现出不同的层偏好。LVP可以显著改变某些冻结模型报告的层，最强的RGB/LVP组合（DAv2-L）达到了75.5%的ML-SRA。

Conclusion: 深度基础模型可能表达互补的几何假设，而标准RGB推理未能充分表达这些假设。需要重新思考深度监督和评估，采用考虑模糊性的视角，将多个有效的3D解释视为需要测量、保留和表达的几何结构。

Abstract: A faithful 3D world representation should account for layered geometry, where a single camera ray may contain multiple visible and geometrically valid surfaces. Monocular depth estimation, however, reduces this structure to one scalar depth per pixel. Transparent scenes make this ambiguity measurable: the same ray can pass through foreground glass and observe the background, turning the supervised target into a convention of annotation, data, and training rather than a scene-intrinsic truth. A learned predictor exposes this convention as its depth-layer preference. We introduce MultiDepth-3k (MD-3k), a sparse two-layer ordinal benchmark for measuring depth-layer preference and multi-layer spatial relationship accuracy (ML-SRA). On MD-3k, leading depth foundation models exhibit diverse layer preferences under standard RGB input, showing that the same layered geometry can be resolved differently across models. We further find that Laplacian Visual Prompting (LVP), a training-free spectral input transformation, can substantially change the reported layer for certain frozen models. The strongest RGB/LVP pair, DAv2-L, reaches 75.5% ML-SRA. These results suggest that depth foundation models may express complementary geometric hypotheses that standard RGB inference leaves unexpressed. We invite the community to rethink depth supervision and evaluation through an ambiguity-aware lens, where multiple valid 3D interpretations are treated as geometric structure to be measured, preserved, and expressed.

</details>


### [126] [Benchmarking Geospatial Foundation Models for Agriculture Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29664)
*Zhuocheng Shang,Sanmay Das,Ahmed Eldawy*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 当前地理空间基础模型在农业应用中的区域迁移能力存在严重不足，在未见过的区域表现大幅下降，只能预测常见作物而忽略稀有作物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然基于卫星影像预训练的地理空间基础模型承诺在遥感任务和区域间具有广泛泛化能力，但其地理迁移性尚未得到系统测试，特别是在农业应用中。

Method: 通过受控基准测试评估三种模型（Prithvi、SpectralGPT和SatMAE）在四个美国州（爱荷华、北卡罗来纳、加利福尼亚和明尼苏达）的多时相作物分割和变化检测任务。将训练、验证和测试集分配到不同区域，以测量模型在未见区域的表现。

Result: 所有三种模型在区域分布转移下表现急剧下降，只能预测最常见的作物而忽略稀有作物。同时发现将这些模型调整到共享输入格式会对每个模型产生不同影响，使直接架构比较复杂化。

Conclusion: 当前地理空间基础模型在农业应用中存在关键局限性，需要将区域感知评估作为必要标准。

Abstract: Geospatial foundation models pretrained on satellite imagery promise broad generalization across remote sensing tasks and regions, but their geographic transferability has not been systematically tested, especially in agriculture applications. This paper presents a controlled benchmark that evaluates three models, Prithvi, SpectralGPT, and SatMAE, on multi-temporal crop segmentation and change detection across four U.S. states, Iowa, North Carolina, California, and Minnesota. By assigning each train, validation, and test split to a separate region, we measure how well each model transfers to land it has not seen. All three degrade sharply under regional distribution shift, predicting only the most common crops while missing rare ones. We further find that fitting these models to a shared input format affects each one differently, which complicates direct architectural comparison. These results expose key limitations of current geospatial foundation models for agriculture and point to region aware evaluation as a necessary standard.

</details>


### [127] [Unlocking the Visual Record of Materials Science: A Large-Scale Multimodal Dataset from Scientific Literature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29667)
*Subham Ghosh,Shubham Tiwari,Mohammad Ibrahim,Abhishek Tewari*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MatMMExtract 是一个端到端开源流程，用于从材料科学文献的复合图中分解子面板并生成结构化标注，创建了包含39万多个面板级图像-文本对的 MatSciFig 数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 材料科学文献中数十年的实验知识以图表形式存在，但这些视觉记录无法被AI大规模访问。核心困难在于结构性问题：大多数科学图表是复合的，单个图注同时描述多个子面板，使得直接图像-文本配对不可靠。

Method: 开发了MatMMExtract端到端管道，通过分解复合图为单独子面板，使用大型语言模型在材料科学分类法指导下生成结构化、有依据的标注。还引入了MaterialScope数据集（2,811个手动标注的材料科学图表）用于训练YOLO12-m检测器实现准确面板定位。

Result: 应用于14,810篇开放获取文章，生成了MatSciFig数据集：包含391,606个面板级图像-文本对，来自180,571个图表，每个都有子图注、19个类别和100多个子类型的可视化分类、科学摘要。YOLO12-m检测器在MaterialScope上达到mAP_50 0.9227。Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite在标注生成中表现最佳（82%输出良好，幻觉率4.8%）。在MatSciFig上的双编码器检索基线比零样本CLIP的R@1提高了4.4倍。

Conclusion: MatMMExtract成功解决了材料科学文献中复合图的结构化标注问题，创建了大规模、高质量的视觉-语言数据集，为材料科学领域的AI研究提供了重要资源，所有资源已向社区开放。

Abstract: The materials science literature encodes decades of experimental knowledge in figures, yet this visual record remains locked away and inaccessible to AI at scale. The core difficulty is structural: most scientific figures are compound, with a single caption describing multiple sub-panels simultaneously, making direct image-text pairing unreliable. We present MatMMExtract, an end-to-end open-source pipeline that resolves this by decomposing compound figures into individual sub-panels and generating structured, grounded annotations using a large language model guided by a curated materials science taxonomy. Applied to 14,810 open-access articles, MatMMExtract produces MatSciFig; 391,606 panel-level image-text pairs from 180,571 figures, each annotated with a sub-caption, a two-level visualisation category spanning 19 classes and over 100 subtypes, and a scientific summary. To enable accurate panel localisation, we introduce MaterialScope, a domain-specific detection dataset of 2,811 manually annotated materials science figures, on which a fine-tuned YOLO12-m detector achieves mAP_50 of 0.9227. Among six benchmarked language models, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite delivers the best cost-quality trade-off for annotation generation, with 82% of outputs rated good and a hallucination rate of 4.8%. A dual-encoder retrieval baseline on MatSciFig achieves a 4.4 times improvement in R@1 over zero-shot CLIP, demonstrating the dataset's immediate utility for vision-language learning. All resources are released openly to the community.

</details>


### [128] [PoseShield: Neural Collision Fields for Human Self-Collision Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29686)
*Zhengyuan Li,Zeyun Deng,Yifan Shen,Liangyan Gui,Miaolan Xie,Joseph Campbell,Xifeng Gao,Kui Wu,Zherong Pan,Aniket Bera*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PoseShield 是一种在 SMPL 姿态空间中直接定义的神经碰撞约束方法，用于解决 SMPL 人体姿态估计和运动生成中的自碰撞问题，通过 Eikonal 正则化提高优化稳定性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SMPL 人体姿态估计和运动生成中，极端姿态或随机运动合成经常导致网格自穿透，产生物理上不真实的结果。现有方法在网格空间操作或依赖启发式惩罚，缺乏理论基础且效果有限。

Method: 将碰撞校正建模为约束优化问题，在 SMPL 姿态空间中定义神经碰撞约束，并与 Eikonal 方程关联。通过 Eikonal 正则化确保碰撞边界附近梯度不消失，提高优化过程的数值稳定性和鲁棒性。

Result: 在新构建的 SMPL 姿态基准测试中，该方法达到 95.8% 的成功率，优于现有最先进方法。该约束可扩展到人体运动序列，作为生成器无关的后处理碰撞校正器，无需重新训练底层运动模型。

Conclusion: PoseShield 在低维人体姿态空间中提供了理论基础的碰撞约束方法，有效解决 SMPL 模型中的自碰撞问题，提高了姿态估计和运动生成的物理真实性和稳定性。

Abstract: Self-collision remains a persistent challenge in SMPL-based human pose estimation and motion generation. Under extreme articulations or stochastic motion synthesis, generated meshes frequently exhibit self-penetrations, leading to physically implausible results. We propose PoseShield, a neural collision constraint defined directly in SMPL pose space. We formulate collision correction as a constrained optimization problem and connect the learned constraint with the Eikonal equation. Enforcing Eikonal regularization ensures non-vanishing gradients near the collision boundary, improving numerical stability and robustness of the optimization process. Unlike prior methods that operate in the mesh space or rely on heuristic penalties, our approach operates directly in the low-dimensional space of human poses and is theoretically grounded. The same learned constraint extends to human motion sequences, providing a generator-agnostic post-hoc collision corrector without retraining the underlying motion model. Experiments on a newly constructed SMPL pose benchmark show that our method achieves a 95.8% success rate and outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [129] [Progressive Self-Supervised Learning with Individualized Community Assignment for Brain Network Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29695)
*Hairui Chen,Yanwu Yang,Jianfeng Cao,Hanyang Peng,Chenfei Ye,Ting Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: BrainPICM：一种通过渐进式个体化社区感知掩码进行脑网络分析的自监督学习框架，能更好地捕捉个体特异性功能组织，在多个fMRI数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督学习方法通常忽视脑网络的模块化社区结构异质性，依赖通用掩码策略无法捕捉个体特异性功能组织，需要更精细的方法来学习稳定模块结构和个体变异。

Method: 提出BrainPICM框架，将ROI到社区映射建模为渐进式非平衡最优传输过程，生成软分配和置信度分数；基于置信度设计课程式掩码策略，逐步纳入低置信度（可能病理）区域；使用偏差感知聚合模块量化功能重组。

Result: 在ABIDE-I、ADHD-200和ADNI三个fMRI数据集上，BrainPICM在诊断准确性方面持续优于最先进的监督和自监督学习方法，表明显式注入模块化社区结构能产生更功能一致和可泛化的表示。

Conclusion: 将模块化社区结构显式注入掩码建模能产生更功能一致和可泛化的脑网络表示，BrainPICM框架在脑网络分析中表现出优越性能，为理解个体差异和病理变化提供了新视角。

Abstract: Brain networks exhibit a modular community structure that varies across individuals and neurological conditions. However, existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methods often overlook this heterogeneity, relying on generic masking strategies that fail to capture subject-specific functional organization. We propose BrainPICM, a self-supervised framework for brain network analysis via progressive individualized community aware masking. BrainPICM formulates ROI-to-community mapping as a progressive unbalanced optimal transport process, yielding soft assignments and per-ROI confidence scores. Guided by these confidence estimates, a curriculum-style masking strategy gradually incorporates low-confidence, potentially pathological regions into training, enabling the model to learn both stable modular structures and individual variations. Additionally, a deviation-aware aggregation module quantifies functional reorganization by measuring mass redistribution relative to a population template, enhancing interpretability and downstream prediction. Experiments on three fMRI datasets (ABIDE-I, ADHD-200, ADNI) show that BrainPICM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art supervised and SSL methods in diagnostic accuracy, indicating that explicitly injecting modular community structure into masked modeling yields more functionally consistent and generalizable representations. The source code for this approach will be released at https://github.com/Hrychen7/BrainPICM.

</details>


### [130] [Early Warning Signals for OpenVLA Failure under Visual Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29699)
*Dipesh Tharu Mahato,Rachel Ren*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究了OpenVLA视觉语言动作模型在视觉条件变化时内部激活是否包含可线性解码的任务失败信息。通过遮挡测试发现，第16层激活可高精度预测未来15步内的任务失败，优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言动作模型将感知、语言理解和控制集成在单一策略中，但其在视觉条件变化时的失败难以诊断。本文旨在探索OpenVLA模型的内部激活是否包含可线性解码的近期任务失败信息。

Method: 在LIBERO操作任务中固定策略，记录执行过程中的内部激活，收集数据后拟合轻量级监控器。主要使用遮挡作为受控压力测试，同时评估颜色偏移和相机抖动作为对照实验。通过逻辑探针在特定网络层解码任务失败信息。

Result: 遮挡使OpenVLA成功率从57%降至17%。在层16的逻辑探针达到AUROC 0.972和AUPRC 0.352，可预测未来15步内的任务失败，优于平均差异方向和动作不一致性基线。不同层的可解码性不均匀：层16最强，层8仍有信息，层10较弱。针对相机抖动的测试中，遮挡训练的监控器仍优于随机水平。

Conclusion: OpenVLA内部状态在受控感知变化下包含与任务失败相关的结构信息，但这些实验未建立因果机制、任务泛化能力或可部署的恢复系统，研究结果具有局限性。

Abstract: Vision Language Action models combine perception, language grounding, and control in a single policy, but their failures are hard to diagnose once visual conditions shift. We test whether OpenVLA feedforward activations contain linearly decodable information about near term task failure in LIBERO manipulation rollouts. The policy is fixed throughout. We log internal activations during execution and fit lightweight monitors after the rollouts are collected. Occlusion is the main controlled stress test. It reduces OpenVLA success from $57\%$ to $17\%$ over $100$ episodes per condition. Under this shift, a logistic probe at layer 16 reaches AUROC $0.972$ and AUPRC $0.352$ for predicting failure within a $15$ step horizon. It outperforms both a mean difference direction and an action disagreement baseline. A sparse layer sweep finds uneven decodability across depth: layer 16 is strongest among the tested layers, layer 8 remains informative, and layer 10 is weaker. To check whether the monitor is just an occlusion detector, we also evaluate color shift and camera jitter without refitting. Color shift produces no failures in this setting, so it is a benign control rather than a failure benchmark. Camera jitter does induce failures, and the occlusion trained monitor remains above random. The result is deliberately limited: OpenVLA internal states contain failure relevant structure under controlled perceptual shift, but these experiments do not establish a causal mechanism, task held out generalization, or a deployable recovery system.

</details>


### [131] [UniVAD v2: Unified Visual Anomaly Detection via Support-Conditioned Boundary Construction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29714)
*Zhaopeng Gu,Bingke Zhu,Zhaowen Li,Guibo Zhu,Yingying Chen,Ming Tang,Peng Su,Jinqiao Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UniVAD v2 是一个统一的视觉异常检测框架，通过两方面的边界构建方法改进少样本迁移性能，在正常侧使用最优传输关系建模和自适应协调机制，在异常侧利用少量异常参考进行边界调整。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有统一视觉异常检测方法在少样本迁移时，主要从正常侧证据推断边界，缺乏异常侧证据来适应部署特定的容忍度。在正常侧，现有方法难以同时捕捉局部对应关系和全局支持-查询关系，导致边界对未见异常的可靠性不足。

Method: UniVAD v2 基于 UniVAD 的组件-补丁分治框架，增强正常侧：1) 基于最优传输的关系建模模块(OTRM)，通过传输式分配补充检索；2) 检索与关系建模的自适应协调机制(ACRRM)，估计情景条件可靠性以融合两种证据。异常侧：少量异常参考模块(FAR)将可选异常参考转换为拒绝侧证据进行边界调整。

Result: 在涵盖工业、逻辑和医疗异常检测的六个数据集上展示强大的跨域泛化能力。在1N-shot协议下，UniVAD v2 将图像级平均AUC从83.0%提升到84.5%，在1N+1A-shot设置下达到85.7%。在MVTec-AD-SS上，达到96.2%图像级AUC和96.9%像素级AUC，显示异常参考可实现无需重新训练的可控边界定制。

Conclusion: UniVAD v2 通过正常侧的关系建模和自适应协调，以及异常侧的参考利用，显著提升了统一视觉异常检测在少样本迁移场景下的性能，实现了更好的跨域泛化和可控边界定制能力。

Abstract: Unified visual anomaly detection seeks to train a single detector that can be deployed across categories, domains, and application scenarios. In the few-shot transfer regime, the key challenge is to estimate an episode-specific boundary for an unseen target category from a small support set. Existing approaches mainly infer this boundary from normal-side evidence and provide limited abnormal-side evidence for deployment-specific tolerance. Within the normal side, they often struggle to jointly capture local correspondences and global support-query relations, making their boundaries less reliable for unseen anomalies. To address these issues, we propose UniVAD v2, a two-sided support-conditioned boundary construction framework for unified visual anomaly detection. Built on the component-patch divide-and-conquer framework of UniVAD, UniVAD v2 strengthens the normal side with an Optimal Transport-based Relational Modeling module (OTRM), which complements retrieval with support-query matching through transport-style allocation, and an Adaptive Coordination mechanism for Retrieval and Relational Modeling (ACRRM), which estimates episode-conditioned reliabilities to fuse the two sources of evidence. On the abnormal side, a Few-Shot Abnormal Reference module (FAR) converts optional abnormal references into rejection-side evidence for boundary adjustment. Experiments on six datasets spanning industrial, logical, and medical anomaly detection demonstrate strong cross-domain generalization. Under the 1N-shot protocol, UniVAD v2 improves the mean image-level AUC over UniVAD from 83.0\% to 84.5\%, and further reaches 85.7\% in the 1N+1A-shot setting. On the MVTec-AD Severity Split (MVTec-AD-SS), UniVAD v2 achieves 96.2\% image-level AUC and 96.9\% pixel-level AUC, showing that abnormal references enable controllable boundary customization without retraining.

</details>


### [132] [Accurate Recognition of Pneumonia and COVID-19 by Geometric Shape Normalization of Lung Region using Automatic Landmark Detection and Piecewise Affine Warping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29715)
*Salvador E. Ayala-Raggi,Rafael Alejandro Cruz-Ovando,Lauro Reyes-Cocoletzi,Aldrin Barreto-Flores*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于肺部几何归一化的胸部X光自动疾病识别系统，通过地标检测、几何归一化和分类器三个模块，在COVID-19、病毒性肺炎和正常病例的分类中取得了高准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 胸部X光图像中由于拍摄角度、患者体位等因素导致的解剖结构差异会影响疾病识别性能。论文旨在通过几何归一化方法消除这些差异，提供更可控、抗干扰的肺部表示，从而提高疾病分类的准确性和鲁棒性。

Method: 方法包含三个核心模块：1) 使用带坐标注意力的ResNet-18地标检测器预测15个肺轮廓地标；2) 基于广义Procrustes分析、Delaunay三角剖分和分段仿射变换的几何归一化器，将肺部区域映射到标准化形状；3) 使用迁移学习和SAHS对比度增强的ResNet-18分类器，对归一化后的图像进行COVID-19、病毒性肺炎和正常分类。

Result: 在COVID-19放射学数据库上，归一化图像分类器取得了98.60±0.26%的准确率和98.00%的F1-Macro分数。虽然原始图像的准确率略高，但Grad-CAM和裁剪实验表明这主要受采集伪影影响。在去除伪影的对比实验中，几何归一化图像在COVID-19数据库(98.60% vs. 96.24%)和包含儿科病例的混合数据集(94.67% vs. 94.17%)上均优于未对齐的掩码/裁剪图像。

Conclusion: 解剖结构对齐能够为肺部疾病识别提供更可控、抗伪影的表示方法。几何归一化不仅提高了分类性能，还减少了因采集伪影导致的偏差，在跨数据集和不同患者群体中表现出更好的鲁棒性。

Abstract: This paper presents an automatic system for recognizing pulmonary diseases in chest X-rays using geometric normalization of the lung region. The method combines three modules: (1) a ResNet-18 landmark detector with coordinate attention that predicts 15 lung-contour landmarks, achieving a mean localization error of 3.61 pixels through an ensemble of four models with test-time augmentation; (2) a geometric normalizer based on Generalized Procrustes Analysis, Delaunay triangulation, and piecewise affine warping to map each lung region to a standardized shape; and (3) a ResNet-18 classifier with transfer learning and SAHS contrast enhancement to classify images as COVID-19, Viral Pneumonia, or Normal. On the COVID-19 Radiography Database, the normalized-image classifier achieved 98.60+/-0.26% accuracy and 98.00% F1-Macro using five-fold cross-validation. Although original images produced slightly higher raw accuracy, Grad-CAM and cropping experiments suggest that this advantage is partly influenced by acquisition artifacts. In contrast, geometrically normalized images outperformed artifact-masked/cropped unaligned images on both the COVID-19 Radiography Database (98.60% vs. 96.24%) and a balanced adult-pediatric mixed dataset including pediatric cases from the Kermany dataset (94.67% vs. 94.17%). These results suggest that anatomical alignment can provide a more controlled and artifact-resistant representation for pulmonary disease recognition.

</details>


### [133] [AerialMetric: Benchmarking and Adapting UAV Monocular Metric Depth Estimation in the Real World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29716)
*Zhongqiang Song,Guanying Chen,Yuqi Zhang,Yin Zou,Chuanyu Fu,Zhiyuan Yuan,Chuan Huang,Shuguang Cui,Xiaochun Cao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了AerialMetric数据集，用于评估和促进无人机航拍视角下的单目度量深度估计，包含真实航拍、控制采集、合成场景和网络图像四个子集，共68K图像-深度对。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前数据驱动方法在街景和室内数据集上表现良好，但在无人机航拍视角下存在显著领域差距，需要专门的航拍深度估计数据集和基准。

Method: 构建AerialMetric数据集，包含四个互补子集：真实世界摄影测量数据、控制航拍采集设置、照片级真实合成场景、以及网络图像。基于该数据集对现有SOTA模型进行系统评估，并微调代表性模型建立基准。

Result: AerialMetric提供52K真实世界和16K合成图像-深度对；通过微调模型在数据集上，在多样航拍图像上实现了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: AerialMetric数据集填补了航拍深度估计的空白，为评估和适应航拍视角下的单目度量深度估计提供了全面基准，促进了该领域的发展。

Abstract: This paper addresses the problem of monocular metric depth estimation in aerial UAV imagery. Although recent data-driven methods have achieved remarkable progress in ground-level scenarios, models trained primarily on street-view and indoor datasets exhibit significant domain gaps when applied to aerial viewpoints. To tackle these challenges, we introduce AerialMetric, a benchmark dataset designed to evaluate and facilitate the adaptation of monocular metric depth estimation under UAV aerial viewpoints. The dataset consists of four complementary subsets collected from different sources, jointly covering real-world photogrammetry data, controlled aerial acquisition settings, photorealistic synthetic scenes, and in-the-wild Internet imagery. Totally, AerialMetric provides 52K real-world and 16K synthetic image-depth pairs with reliable metric ground truth. Based on this dataset, we conduct systematic evaluations of existing state-of-the-art models under aerial settings and investigate the impact of viewpoint, altitude, and camera parameters on metric depth prediction. In addition, by fine-tuning representative metric depth model on our dataset, we establish a comprehensive aerial benchmark and achieve state-of-the-art performance across diverse aerial imagery. Our dataset, code, and model weight are publicly available at https://kuieless.github.io/AerialMetric-ECCV2026-page/.

</details>


### [134] [HTC-SGA Former: A Hybrid Transformer-CNN Network with Self-Guided Attention and a New Boundary-Weighted Adaptive Loss for Coronary DSA Vessel Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29744)
*Rayan Merghani Ahmed,Marwa Omer Mohammed Omer,Mohamed Elmanna,Shijie Li,Bin Li,Shoujun Zhoua*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出HTC-SGA Former，一种轻量级混合Transformer-CNN框架，用于冠状动脉DSA血管分割，通过多尺度全局-局部注意力机制和自引导特征注意力提升弱血管分割性能，同时使用边界加权自适应复合损失优化边界定位。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冠状动脉DSA血管分割对计算机辅助诊断和治疗规划至关重要，但现有方法难以平衡全局上下文推理与弱血管、血管连续性和精细边界的保留，特别是面对细薄低对比度血管、背景干扰和严重的类别不平衡问题。

Method: 提出HTC-SGA Former框架：1) CNN编码器提取局部血管形态；2) Transformer解码器进行上下文特征建模；3) 多尺度全局-局部窗口注意力块(MS-GLWA)实现高效全局-局部上下文建模；4) 自引导特征注意力模块(SGFA)增强弱血管响应；5) 边界加权自适应复合损失(BWACL)强调细血管边界并自适应平衡血管恢复和边界细化。

Result: 在私有左右冠状动脉DSA数据集上的实验表明，HTC-SGA Former在仅0.81M参数的紧凑架构下，优于14种最先进的分割方法。BWACL损失在四种编码器-解码器架构上均比二元交叉熵和Dice损失表现更好，展示了强大的跨骨干网络适用性。

Conclusion: HTC-SGA Former通过互补的全局-局部上下文建模、血管聚焦的细化和自适应优化，改善了细血管恢复、血管连续性和边界定位，为未来计算机辅助心血管干预提供了可靠且计算高效的冠状动脉血管分析支持。

Abstract: Accurate coronary Digital Subtraction Angiography (DSA) vessel segmentation is essential for computer-aided diagnosis and treatment planning of coronary artery disease (CAD). However, thin low-contrast vessels, background interference, and severe vessel-background class imbalance make reliable segmentation of weak distal branches and vessel boundaries challenging. Existing methods struggle to balance global contextual reasoning with preservation of weak vessels, vessel continuity, and fine boundaries. To address these limitations, we propose HTC-SGA Former, a lightweight hybrid Transformer-CNN framework for coronary DSA vessel segmentation. It employs a CNN encoder for local vessel morphology extraction and a Transformer decoder for contextual feature modeling. A Multi-Scale Global-Local Window Attention (MS-GLWA) block performs efficient global-local contextual modeling, while a Self-Guided Feature Attention (SGFA) module enhances weak-vessel responses. In addition, a Boundary-Weighted Adaptive Compound Loss (BWACL) emphasizes thin-vessel boundaries and adaptively balances vessel recovery and boundary refinement. Experiments on private right and left coronary artery DSA subsets show that HTC-SGA Former outperforms 14 state-of-the-art segmentation methods while maintaining a compact architecture with only 0.81M parameters. BWACL also improves performance over binary cross-entropy and Dice losses across four encoder-decoder architectures, demonstrating strong cross-backbone applicability. HTC-SGA Former improves thin-vessel recovery, vessel continuity, and boundary localization through complementary global-local contextual modeling, vessel-focused refinement, and adaptive optimization, supporting reliable and computationally efficient coronary vessel analysis for future computer-assisted cardiovascular interventions.

</details>


### [135] [LEIQ-Assessor: Multi-dimensional Quality Assessment of Low-light Enhanced Images via Multi-task Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29752)
*Wei Sun,Yanwei Jiang,Dandan Zhu,Jinqiu Sang,Jikai Xu,Weixia Zhang,Guangtao Zhai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LEIQ-Assessor：基于多任务学习的低光图像增强质量评估模型，在QoMEX 2026挑战赛中获第二名


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低光图像增强算法在增强过程中常引入噪声放大、色彩偏移、结构损坏和过度曝光等伪影，降低感知质量。因此需要可靠的质量评估指标来指导算法开发和实际应用。

Method: 采用预训练的SigLIP2 Vision Transformer作为骨干网络，通过多任务学习同时预测整体平均意见得分（MOS）和六个感知子属性：亮度、色彩保真度、噪声水平、曝光质量、自然度和内容恢复。使用PLCC损失联合优化这些相关目标。

Result: 在MLE基准测试中显著优于现有的无参考IQA模型和手工质量描述符，在QoMEX 2026低光增强图像质量评估大挑战中获得第二名。

Conclusion: LEIQ-Assessor通过多任务学习捕获了丰富的质量感知特征，为低光图像增强质量评估提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Low-light image enhancement algorithms (LIEAs) aim to improve the visibility of images captured under poor illumination. However, the enhancement process often introduces artifacts such as noise amplification, color shift, structural damage, and over-exposure, which degrade the perceptual quality of the enhanced images. Therefore, a reliable image quality assessment (IQA) metric for evaluating enhancement effects is of great importance for both the development of LIEAs and their practical applications. In this paper, we present \textbf{LEIQ-Assessor}, a multi-dimensional quality assessment model for low-light image enhancement based on multi-task learning, developed for the QoMEX 2026 Grand Challenge on Low-light Enhanced Image Quality Assessment. Specifically, our method leverages a pre-trained SigLIP2 Vision Transformer as the backbone and simultaneously predicts the overall Mean Opinion Score (MOS) together with six perceptual sub-attributes: lightness, color fidelity, noise level, exposure quality, naturalness, and content recovery. By jointly optimizing these correlated objectives via the PLCC loss, the shared representation captures richer quality-aware features than its single-task counterpart. Experiments on the MLE benchmark demonstrate that LEIQ-Assessor significantly outperforms existing no-reference IQA models and hand-crafted quality descriptors. Our method achieved second place in the QoMEX 2026 Grand Challenge on Low-light Enhanced Image Quality Assessment. The code is available at https://github.com/sunwei925/LEIQ-Assessor.

</details>


### [136] [MR-IQA: A Unified Margin View of Regression and Ranking for Blind Image Quality Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29760)
*Yuan Li,Youyuan Lin,Zitang Sun,Yung-Hao Yang,Kiyofumi Miyoshi,Chenhui Chu,Shin'ya Nishida*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了MR-IQA框架，通过直接优化质量边界来统一回归和排序两种学习范式，为盲图像质量评估提供了新的理论见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前盲图像质量评估(BIQA)主要基于回归和排序两种学习范式，但两者之间的关系缺乏理论探索。作者发现质量边界是这两种范式的共同桥梁，希望通过直接优化质量边界来更显式地建模质量结构。

Method: 提出MR-IQA框架，基于强化学习直接优化质量边界。该框架采样质量分数，并将成对边界误差作为策略奖励进行优化。

Result: 在六个BIQA基准测试中表现出有竞争力的泛化性能，与回归或排序的RL方法相比，MR-IQA在平均PLCC/SRCC指标上取得了最强结果。

Conclusion: 研究为统一回归和排序提供了新的理论见解，为理解BIQA及其他领域的质量结构建模提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Blind image quality assessment (BIQA) is commonly built on two basic learning paradigms: regression and ranking. Regression calibrates absolute scores, whereas ranking recovers quality structure from ordinal relations. Although joint regression-ranking supervision often improves BIQA, the relation between the two paradigms remains largely empirical and underexplored. In this work, we revisit what underlies regression and ranking and identify pairwise relational distance, termed quality margin, as their common bridge. Our derivation shows that, at the objective-optimization level, both paradigms fit quality margins: regression fits margins induced by score endpoints, while ranking fits transformed or sign-level margins through preference probabilities. Motivated by this insight, we propose MR-IQA, a direct quality-margin optimization framework for reinforcement learning (RL)-based BIQA. MR-IQA samples quality scores and optimizes pairwise margin errors as policy rewards, thereby modeling quality structure more explicitly. Experiments on six BIQA benchmarks show competitive general performance, and controlled comparisons demonstrate that MR-IQA achieves the strongest average PLCC/SRCC over regression- or ranking-based RL methods. Our findings provide a new insight into unifying regression and ranking, offering a theoretical basis for understanding quality-structure modeling in BIQA and beyond.

</details>


### [137] [TopoAgent: An Agentic Framework for Automated Topology Learning in Medical Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29763)
*Guangyu Meng,Pengfei Gu,Xueyang Li,Yiyu Shi,Erin Wolf Chambers,Danny Z. Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TopoAgent是一个基于大语言模型的代理框架，通过感知-推理-行动-反思循环自动为医学图像分析选择最合适的拓扑描述符，无需任务特定训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统医学图像分析中，拓扑数据分析（TDA）特别是持久同调（PH）能捕捉几何结构特征，但现有方法通常只使用单一固定的拓扑描述符，忽略了拓扑表示的多样性，且缺乏自动选择最优描述符的框架。

Method: 提出TopoAgent框架，采用感知-推理-行动-反思循环，配备21个领域特定工具和双重记忆系统，通过分析输入图像及其拓扑特征，推理选择最合适的拓扑描述符及其配置。

Result: 框架基于对26个数据集和6个分类器上15种拓扑描述符的系统性评估，能够自动确定最优拓扑描述符并生成相应的拓扑特征向量，无需任务特定训练。

Conclusion: TopoAgent填补了现有方法的空白，为医学图像分析提供了首个基于LLM的代理框架，能自动化和优化拓扑特征学习过程。

Abstract: Topological data analysis (TDA), particularly persistent homology (PH), captures geometric structural properties in medical images (e.g., connected components, loops, shape characteristics), which conventional pixel-level deep learning approaches often neglect. While many topological descriptors are known for converting persistence diagrams (PDs) or raw images into topological feature vectors, existing methods mostly default to a single fixed descriptor (e.g., persistence images), leaving the diversity of topological representations largely unexplored. To the best of our knowledge, there is no known large language model (LLM)-based agentic framework that can automatically determine the most suitable topological descriptors for a given image dataset and produce the corresponding topological feature vectors for downstream tasks. To fill this gap, we propose \textbf{TopoAgent}, an LLM-based agentic framework that automates topology learning for medical image analysis.TopoAgent operates through a Perception--Reasoning--Action--Reflection loop supported by 21 domain-specific tools and dual memory that accumulates experience across runs. Its skill set is distilled from systematic evaluation of 15 topological descriptors across 26 datasets with six classifiers. TopoAgent analyzes input images and their topological characteristics, reasons about which topological descriptors best suit the input, and determines the optimal descriptor and its configuration, all without task-specific training.

</details>


### [138] [UrbanCDNet: Appearance-Robust and Boundary-Aware Bitemporal Change Detection for Korean Urban Building Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29781)
*Abdirashid Omar,Jonghyuk Park*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UrbanCDNet：针对韩国城市建筑变化检测的专用Siamese CNN，通过多线索比较、对齐感知差异、边界监督等方法，在稀疏变化和外观差异大的场景中显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 韩国城市建筑变化检测面临三大挑战：变化区域稀疏、不同采集时间的外观差异大、需要精细的建筑边界而非粗略斑块。现有通用方法在这些特定场景下效果有限。

Method: 提出UrbanCDNet，一个任务专用的Siamese CNN，包含：外观鲁棒的多线索比较、对齐感知的中尺度差异、轻量级上下文细化、场景校准和辅助边界监督。

Result: 在AIHub韩国基准测试中，UrbanCDNet获得0.7511 F1和0.6014 IoU，优于Siamese U-Net基线（0.7108 F1）和ChangeFormer-MIT-B0（0.7107 F1）。在稀疏变化（<5%变化区域）和高光度差异子集上提升尤其显著。

Conclusion: 在韩国城市建筑变化检测任务中，任务定制的时序比较和边界感知监督比通用模型规模更重要。UrbanCDNet针对特定挑战的设计取得了实质性改进。

Abstract: Urban building change detection from bi-temporal aerial imagery is important for redevelopment monitoring, infrastructure management, and unauthorized-construction screening, but Korean urban scenes remain difficult because changed regions are often sparse, appearance varies strongly between acquisition dates, and useful outputs must follow building footprints rather than coarse blobs. This paper presents UrbanCDNet, a task specific Siamese CNN that combines appearance-robust multi-cue comparison, alignment-aware middle-scale differencing, lightweight context refinement, scene calibration, and auxiliary boundary supervision. Experiments use a corrected AIHub-based Korean benchmark with 3,998 training, 503 validation, and 499 test pairs, and report changed-class precision, recall, F1, and IoU. On the locked test split, UrbanCDNet achieves 0.7335 precision, 0.7696 recall, 0.7511 F1, and 0.6014 IoU, outperforming a strong Siamese U-Net baseline (0.7108 F1, 0.5514 IoU) and the strongest external competitor, ChangeFormer-MIT-B0 (0.7107 F1, 0.5512 IoU). Additional diagnostic slicing shows that the gain is concentrated in the operating regimes that motivated the design: on the sparse-change subset with less than 5% changed area, F1 improves from 0.4765 to 0.6175, and on the high photometric-gap subset it improves from 0.6349 to 0.7285. Boundary F1 at 3-pixel tolerance rises from 0.3445 to 0.4447, while object F1 at IoU 0.3 rises from 0.0690 to 0.2258. These results indicate that, on this Korean benchmark, task-shaped temporal comparison and boundary-aware supervision matter more than generic model scale alone

</details>


### [139] [Graph-GSReg: Leveraging 3D Scene Graphs for Gaussian Splatting Registration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29782)
*Jaewon Lee,Mangyu Kong,Euntai Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于3D场景图的方法，用于将多个3D高斯泼溅场景合并为统一的表示，解决了现有方法的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 合并多个3D高斯泼溅场景对于大规模3D建图和长期地图管理至关重要，但现有方法存在局限性：基于学习的方法需要大量训练数据，基于图像优化的方法依赖粗略初始化且计算成本高。

Method: 1) 从3DGS及其渲染图像构建3D场景图，将3DGS配准重新定义为图配准问题；2) 引入自监督测试时优化，通过细化合并的高斯来消除遮挡伪影，保持原始场景与合并场景之间的视觉一致性。

Result: 在真实和合成基准测试中，该方法在配准精度和合并场景渲染质量方面表现出竞争力。

Conclusion: 通过3D场景图表示和自监督优化，该方法能够有效地合并多个3D高斯泼溅场景，为大规模3D建图提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Merging multiple 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes into a single unified Gaussian representation is essential for large-scale 3D mapping and long-term map management. Despite its importance, this area remains underexplored, and existing solutions exhibit several limitations. Learning-based methods attempt direct correspondence between Gaussian primitives and require training on large 3DGS datasets. Image-based optimization methods depend heavily on coarse initialization from generic foundation models and often incur expensive refinement. We present \ourmodel. Our method constructs a 3D scene graph from a 3DGS and its rendered images, \textit{reformulating 3DGS registration as a graph registration problem}. The proposed 3D scene graph represents each 3DGS at a higher-level representation, enabling a globally consistent understanding of semantic information and structural context for accurate registration. To further construct a seamless unified scene, we introduce a Self-Supervised Test-Time Optimization. Naively merging two 3D Gaussian scenes often suffers from occlusion artifacts such as hollows and floaters. To alleviate this issue, we refine the merged Gaussians to preserve visual consistency between the original scenes and the merged scene. We evaluate our method on real and synthetic benchmarks, demonstrating competitive registration accuracy and merged scene rendering quality.

</details>


### [140] [UniTriSplat: A Unified 3D Gaussian Splatting Framework with Uniform Spherical Rasterization for Universal Cameras](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29794)
*Yipeng Zhu,Huajian Huang,Tristan Braud,Sai-Kit Yeung*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UniTriSplat是一个统一的3D高斯泼溅框架，通过HEALPix离散化在单位球面上重新构建高斯泼溅，解决了不同相机模型（透视、鱼眼、全向）间的采样不一致问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅框架依赖相机特定的栅格化，存在采样不一致和在不同相机模型（如透视、鱼眼、全向相机）间性能下降的问题。

Method: 通过HEALPix离散化在单位球面上重新构建高斯泼溅，利用HEALPix的等面积特性构建与输入图像角分辨率对齐的球形采样网格，在球面弧度域中推导前向渲染和梯度传播，并引入HEALPix感知的SSIM损失来提升感知重建质量。

Result: 实验表明，UniTriSplat在不同相机模型上一致提升了跨相机泛化能力，同时保持了几何保真度和渲染质量。

Conclusion: UniTriSplat通过球形统一表示解决了3D高斯泼溅在不同相机模型间的采样不一致问题，实现了从窄视场图像到360度全景图的统一优化行为。

Abstract: Existing 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) frameworks rely on camera-specific rasterization, suffering from inconsistent solid-angle sampling and degraded performance across heterogeneous camera models (e.g., perspective, fisheye, omnidirectional). To address this limitation, we propose UniTriSplat, a unified 3DGS framework for universal cameras that reformulates Gaussian splatting on the unit sphere via HEALPix discretization. Leveraging the equal-area property of HEALPix, we construct a spherical sampling grid aligned with the angular resolution of input images. We derive the forward rendering and gradient propagation of Gaussians directly in the spherical radian domain, yielding uniform optimization behavior from narrow-FoV images to full 360-degree panoramas. To enhance perceptual reconstruction quality, we additionally introduce a HEALPix-aware SSIM loss that respects spherical neighborhood structure. Extensive experiments across diverse camera models demonstrate that UniTriSplat consistently improves cross-camera generalization while preserving geometric fidelity and rendering quality.

</details>


### [141] [Concept Removal Guidance: Evidence-Calibrated Negative Guidance for Safe Diffusion Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29801)
*Yoonseok Choi,Chaeyoung Oh,Hyunjun Choi,Seokin Seo,Kee-Eung Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CRG是一种无需训练的方法，通过估计每个扩散步骤中不需要概念的存在情况来自适应校准负向引导，在保证目标概念存在阈值的同时最小化对条件轨迹的扰动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型仍然容易受到对抗性提示的攻击，这些提示会引发不允许的内容，因此需要可靠的推理时控制。现有的负向引导方法存在安全性与保真度之间的权衡问题，要么过度应用导致伪影或提示漂移，要么应用不足导致攻击失败。

Method: 提出概念移除引导（CRG），这是一种无需训练的方法，通过从模型的噪声预测中估计每个扩散步骤中不需要概念的存在情况，并通过闭式约束更新自适应校准负向引导，在强制执行目标存在阈值的同时最小化对条件轨迹的扰动。

Result: 在红队测试基准上，CRG降低了攻击成功率，同时保持了良性保真度，并且无需微调或外部分类器即可扩展到额外的抑制目标，如艺术家风格和暴力内容。

Conclusion: CRG提供了一种有效且自适应的推理时控制方法，解决了现有负向引导方法在安全性与保真度之间的权衡问题，并能灵活扩展到多种不需要的概念抑制。

Abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models remain vulnerable to adversarial prompts that elicit disallowed content, motivating reliable inference-time controls. A popular approach is negative guidance, which subtracts a negative prompt direction with a fixed weight. However, it often forces a safety-fidelity trade-off, causing artifacts or prompt drift when over-applied and failing under attacks when under-applied. Dynamic variants reweight guidance using posterior-odds signals, which can be brittle for open-vocabulary compositional prompts, while lightweight similarity-based methods ignore the evolving image evidence along the denoising trajectory. We introduce Concept Removal Guidance (CRG), a training-free method that estimates unwanted-concept presence at each diffusion step from the model's noise predictions, and adaptively calibrates negative guidance via a closed-form constrained update enforcing a target presence threshold while minimally perturbing the conditional trajectory. Across red-teaming benchmarks, CRG reduces attack success rates while preserving benign fidelity, and extends to additional suppression targets such as artist style and violence without fine-tuning or external classifiers.

</details>


### [142] [Clearer Sight, Fewer Lies: Oriented Pickup Preference Optimization for Multimodal Hallucination Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29805)
*Xin Zou,Haolin Deng,Yibo Yan,Shuliang Liu,Zhiwei Jin,Chen Chen,Haonan Lu,Xuming Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OPPO是一种证据感知的对齐目标，通过对比不同证据强度下的忠实响应，学习对视觉证据强度的偏好，而不是仅关注响应质量，从而减少多模态大语言模型的幻觉问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型容易产生幻觉，因为其生成偏好未能充分校准到视觉证据，导致模型依赖语言先验而非忠实的基础。研究发现，当使用模型自身注意力明确增强查询相关视觉证据时，生成变得更加准确，这表明许多失败不仅源于感知缺失，还源于模型未能充分信任已关注的证据。

Method: 提出Oriented Pickup Preference Optimization (OPPO)，这是一种证据感知的对齐目标，学习对视觉证据强度的偏好，而非仅关注响应质量。具体来说，OPPO对比相同忠实响应在强、锚定、弱证据视角下的表现，将朴素的视觉偏好转化为有序的视觉证据对齐。该方法还结合细粒度的跨度级和标记级正则化来稳定训练。

Result: 理论分析表明，有序证据边际诱导了局部视觉敏感性的正下界。在幻觉和通用基准测试中的广泛评估显示，OPPO始终优于基线方法。

Conclusion: OPPO通过将视觉证据强度偏好纳入对齐目标，有效减少了多模态大语言模型的幻觉问题，提高了生成准确性。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are prone to hallucination as their generation preferences are insufficiently calibrated to visual evidence, causing them to fall back on linguistic priors, rather than faithful grounding. In this work, we start from an empirical observation: when query-relevant visual evidence is explicitly strengthened using the model's own attention, generation becomes more accurate, suggesting that many failures do not arise solely from missing perception, but from an insufficient tendency to trust the evidence the model has already attended to. Motivated by this finding, we propose Oriented Pickup Preference Optimization (\texttt{OPPO}), an evidence-aware alignment objective that learns preferences over the strength of visual evidence, rather than only response quality. Concretely, \texttt{OPPO} contrasts the same faithful response under stronger, anchored, weaker-evidence views, turning naive visual preference into ordered visual-evidence alignment. We further combine this objective with fine-grained span-level and token-level regularization to stabilize the training. Besides, we provide a theoretical analysis showing that ordered evidence margins induce a positive lower bound on local visual sensitivity. Extensive evaluations across hallucination and general-purpose benchmarks demonstrate that \texttt{OPPO} consistently outperforms baseline methods.

</details>


### [143] [Consistency as Inductive Bias: Learning Cross-View Invariance for Robust Multimodal Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29812)
*Xin Zou,Haolin Deng,Yibo Yan,Shuliang Liu,Kening Zheng,Zhiwei Jin,Chen Chen,Haonan Lu,Xuming Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ConsistRoll是一种在MLLMs强化学习训练中注入跨视图一致性的方法，通过将原始视图和语义不变变换视图放在同一生成组中，仅当配对的补全结果都正确且一致时才分配联合奖励，从而将一致性转化为在线信用分配信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前MLLMs中缺乏跨视图一致性这一重要归纳偏置，即同一实例的语义不变视图应该产生相同答案。标准RLVR目标对每个视觉输入分配点状奖励，即使使用数据增强，变换视图也通常被独立奖励，一旦视图内奖励饱和就提供很少信号。

Method: ConsistRoll方法重用GRPO的组采样机制，将原始视图和语义不变变换视图放在同一生成组中，仅当配对的补全结果都正确且一致时才分配联合奖励。这种方法将一致性转化为在线信用分配信号，无需额外生成开销和标注。

Result: 理论分析表明跨视图一致性是有效的归纳偏置，ConsistRoll引入了数据增强中缺少的跨视图校正项，惩罚视图依赖性并缓解优势崩溃。在数学、通用目的和幻觉领域的全面基准测试证实ConsistRoll在多模态推理中实现了稳健改进。

Conclusion: ConsistRoll是一种简单但有效的方法，通过在RLVR训练中注入跨视图一致性，将一致性转化为在线信用分配信号，无需额外生成开销和标注，在多模态推理任务中实现了稳健改进。

Abstract: Inductive biases steer learning toward generalizable solutions by encoding task structure. In this work, we identify a crucial missing bias in MLLMs: cross-view consistency, \textit{i.e.}, semantically invariant views of the same instance should lead to the same answer. Standard reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) objectives do not impose this constraint, but instead assign pointwise rewards to each visual input. Even with data augmentation (DA), transformed views are typically rewarded independently, providing little signal once within-view rewards saturate. We propose \textbf{ConsistRoll}, a simple but effective method that injects cross-view consistency into RLVR training by reusing the group-sampling mechanism of GRPO. Specifically, ConsistRoll places original and semantically invariant transformed views in the same generation group, and assigns a joint reward only when paired completions are both correct and consistent. In this way, ConsistRoll turns consistency into an online credit-assignment signal, \textbf{without extra generation overhead and annotations}. Theoretically, we show that cross-view consistency is a valid inductive bias, and ConsistRoll introduces a cross-view correction term absent from DA, penalizing view dependence and alleviating advantage collapse. Comprehensive benchmarks across math, general-purpose, hallucination domains confirm that ConsistRoll achieves robust improvements in multimodal reasoning.

</details>


### [144] [Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-Image: Advancing Masked Discrete Diffusion for High-Resolution Image Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29814)
*Shufan Li,Greg Heinrich,Hanrong Ye,Yonggan Fu,Aditya Grover,Jan Kautz,Pavlo Molchanov*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-Image是一种先进的掩码离散扩散模型，通过引入token编辑机制和分组交叉熵目标，解决了传统MDM缺乏自校正能力和大词汇量优化困难的问题，显著提升了高分辨率文本到图像合成的训练效率和图像质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统掩码离散扩散模型存在两个关键问题：1）缺乏自校正能力，一旦离散token被解掩码就无法修改；2）增大图像tokenizer词汇量虽能提高重建保真度，但会导致每个token的训练信号稀疏，增加生成建模的优化难度。

Method: 1）引入token编辑机制，允许模型在推理过程中动态修改已解掩码的token；2）提出分组交叉熵目标，为嵌入空间中接近真实token的相邻token分配正学习信号；3）实现自定义融合算子以降低大词汇量设置下的VRAM使用。

Result: 实验表明这些创新显著提升了掩码离散图像生成器的训练效率和图像保真度，在GenEval上获得0.90分，DPG上获得86.9分，HPSv3上获得10.76分。

Conclusion: Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-Image通过token编辑机制和分组交叉熵目标，有效解决了掩码离散扩散模型的关键挑战，为高分辨率文本到图像合成提供了高效且高质量的解决方案。

Abstract: We propose Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-Image, a state-of-the-art masked discrete diffusion model (MDM) for high-resolution text-to-image synthesis. Compared with prior work on masked image generation, Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-Image addresses two key challenges. First, unlike continuous diffusion models which progressively refine latent representations across the entire image, standard MDMs lack self-correcting capability because discrete tokens cannot be modified once they are unmasked. Second, although increasing the vocabulary size of discrete image tokenizers improves reconstruction fidelity, it introduces optimization difficulties for generative modeling as the per-token training signal becomes increasingly sparse. To address the first challenge, Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-Image incorporates a token-editing mechanism that enables the model to dynamically revise already-unmasked tokens during inference, similar to how a sculptor iteratively refines their work. To tackle the second challenge, we propose a Grouped Cross-Entropy (GCE) objective that assigns positive learning signals to tokens neighboring the ground truth in embedding space, thereby alleviating signal sparsity. To further improve training efficiency, we implement a custom fused operator for GCE that significantly reduces VRAM usage in large-vocabulary settings. Experimental results demonstrate that these innovations substantially improve both training efficiency and image fidelity of masked discrete image generators, achieving a score of 0.90 on GenEval, 86.9 on DPG and 10.76 of HPSv3.

</details>


### [145] [Learning Cross-view Correspondences for Geo-localization on Planetary Surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29821)
*Hong Minh Nguyen,Marcus Märtens,Tat-Jun Chin*

Main category: cs.CV
