TL;DR: 该研究提出了一个新的月球表面跨视角地理定位基准数据集，包含10438个精确匹配的地面全景图与俯视图像对，用于解决卫星定位不可用时行星表面探索的全局位置感知挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 行星表面探索面临卫星定位系统不可用、车载里程计随时间漂移的根本挑战。虽然轨道测绘产品提供全局上下文，但由于视角差异大、纹理少、地形重复、光照和地形变化导致外观差异显著，将其与地面观测对齐具有挑战性。

Method: 构建了一个基于物理渲染的跨视角地理定位基准数据集，包含从高分辨率月球地形模型生成的10438个地面360度全景图和匹配的俯视图像。数据集还提供重叠图块以研究离中心定位问题。研究了最先进的基于transformer的地理定位方法在该数据上的性能，从头开始训练并报告检索准确率。

Result: 研究结果表明，基于学习的跨视角定位方法可以成功应用于行星表面领域，为全球导航卫星系统提供了基于视觉的替代方案。

Conclusion: 该研究为行星表面探索中的跨视角地理定位问题提供了新的基准数据集和验证方法，证明了基于学习的视觉定位技术在卫星定位不可用环境下的可行性和潜力。

Abstract: Maintaining global position awareness is a fundamental challenge for planetary surface exploration, since satellite-based positioning systems are unavailable and onboard odometry drifts over time. Although orbital mapping products, such as overhead imagery and terrain-derived maps, provide global context, aligning them with surface observations is challenging due to large viewpoint differences, low texture, repetitive terrain, and drastic changes in appearance caused by varying illumination and topography. We introduce a new cross-view geo-localization benchmark built from physically rendered surface panoramas and overhead tiles derived from a high-resolution lunar terrain model. Our dataset contains 10438 ground views rendered as 360$^\circ$ surface panoramas with matching overhead images precisely centered at the same location. Additionally, a set of overlapping tiles is provided to study off-center localization with multiple plausible candidates per panorama. We study the performance of a state-of-the-art transformer-based geo-localization method on our data, by training it from scratch and reporting retrieval accuracy. Our results demonstrate that learning-based cross-view localization methods can be successfully applied to the domain of planetary surfaces, providing a vision-based alternative to global navigation satellite systems.

</details>


### [146] [HomeDiffusion: Zero-Shot Object Customization with Multi-View Representation Learning for Indoor Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29828)
*Guoqiu Li,Jin Song,Yiyun Fei*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HomeDiffusion：一种基于扩散模型的新方法，利用参考对象的多视角图像，在指定背景区域中生成视觉协调的对象姿态，同时保持对象细节


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本对象定制生成方法在细节保持和姿态协调方面存在不足：1）生成对象在图案、曲线等细节上与原参考对象差异大；2）对于不对称参考对象，缺乏完整多视角信息导致无法生成与背景场景协调的对象姿态。特别是在电子商务领域，用户希望看到家具在个人生活空间或服装在自身体上的视觉效果。

Method: 1）构建包含家具和室内场景多角度图像的新数据集；2）基于扩散模型提出HomeDiffusion，利用同一参考对象的多视角图像在背景场景指定区域准确生成视觉协调的对象姿态；3）在扩散过程中提取参考对象的高保真细节，与潜在空间中的噪声潜在进行交叉注意力，确保定制对象生成时的细节保留。

Result: 广泛的定性和定量实验表明，该方法在零样本和少样本对象定制方法中均表现出优越性能。

Conclusion: HomeDiffusion通过利用多视角参考图像和细节保持机制，有效解决了现有方法在对象细节保留和姿态协调方面的不足，为电子商务等领域的对象定制生成提供了更优解决方案。

Abstract: Recently, zero-shot object customization generation methods have rapidly developed and shown tremendous potential for applications. For instance, in the e-commerce domain, consumers can observe the visual effect of furniture placed within their personal living spaces or clothes worn on their own bodies. Many existing approaches perform object customization generation based on diffusion models and extracted reference object features. However, the generated object significantly diverges from the original reference object in details such as patterns and curves. Particularly for asymmetrical reference objects, the absence of comprehensive multi-viewpoint information prevents the generation of object poses that harmonize with the background scene. To address these shortcomings, we have constructed a novel dataset comprising multi-angle images of furniture and indoor scenes. Based on diffusion models, we introduce HomeDiffusion, which can leverage multi-viewpoint images of the same reference object to accurately generate visually harmonious object poses within specified areas of the background scene. During the diffusion process, we further extract high-fidelity details of the reference object and perform cross-attention with the noise latents in the latent space, thereby ensuring the preservation of details in the customized object generation. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over other existing zero-shot as well as few-shot object customization approaches.

</details>


### [147] [Robust Trajectory Distillation: Hybrid Reweighting Meets Teacher-Inspired Targets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29837)
*Kaifeng Chen,Lechao Cheng,Jiyang Li,Shengeng Tang,Fan Zhang,Yantao Pan,Yaxiong Wang,Tuanrui Hui,Zhun Zhong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于轨迹的数据集蒸馏框架，通过选择性指导重加权和教师启发辅助目标，在噪声监督下联合抑制噪声并保留可迁移知识，无需重新标注或干净子集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数据集蒸馏在噪声监督下会将损坏的关联与有用信号一起浓缩，降低鲁棒性。现有的噪声标签补救方法（样本选择、损失加权、标签校正）通常将噪声估计与模型优化紧密耦合，需要干净锚点，且可能放大确认偏差，这与数据集蒸馏追求紧凑、即插即用监督的目标不一致。

Method: 提出包含两个互补组件的轨迹式数据集蒸馏框架：1) 选择性指导重加权(SGR)：融合全局遗忘模式（第二分割遗忘）与局部邻域一致性，形成渐进重加权方案，沿教师轨迹优先处理干净监督；2) 教师启发辅助目标(TIAT)：从中间教师动态中提取辅助残差指导，增强信息信号同时保持内部一致性。

Result: 该框架在对称、不对称和真实世界噪声下，相比最先进的数据集蒸馏基线方法均取得一致增益，产生更干净、表征更丰富的蒸馏数据集。

Conclusion: 提出的轨迹式数据集蒸馏框架具有鲁棒性、标签保持性、计算轻量级和广泛适用性，能够在噪声监督下有效抑制噪声并保留可迁移知识，无需重新标注或干净子集。

Abstract: Dataset distillation (DD) condenses large corpora into compact, information-rich subsets for efficient training and reuse. However, under noisy supervision, DD risks condensing corrupted associations together with useful signals, degrading robustness. Conventional noisy-label remedies (sample selection, loss weighting, label correction) tightly couple noise estimation with model optimization, often require clean anchors, and can amplify confirmation bias-assumptions that are misaligned with DD's goal of compact, plug-and-play supervision. We therefore propose a trajectory-based DD framework that jointly suppresses noise and preserves transferable knowledge without relabeling or clean subsets. It comprises two complementary components: Selective Guidance Reweighting (SGR), which fuses global forgetting patterns (second-split forgetting) with local neighborhood consistency into a progressive reweighting scheme that prioritizes clean supervision along the teacher trajectory; and Teacher-Inspired Auxiliary Targets (TIAT), which inject auxiliary residual guidance distilled from intermediate teacher dynamics to reinforce informative signals while remaining internally consistent. Together, SGR and TIAT produce distilled datasets with cleaner and richer representations under noisy supervision. The framework is robust, label-preserving, computationally lightweight, and broadly applicable, yielding consistent gains over state-of-the-art DD baselines across symmetric, asymmetric, and real-world noise.

</details>


### [148] [Bricker to BRACE: A Bracket Exposure RAW Dataset and Restoration Model for Flicker-Banding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29845)
*Zihan Zhou,Libo Zhu,Jue Gong,Zhiyi Zhou,Jiezhang Cao,Yong Guo,Yulun Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于多帧RAW图像修复的方法BRACE，用于消除屏幕拍摄中的闪烁条带伪影，并构建了合成-真实数据集Bricker进行评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单帧方法使用简化的参数条纹模型无法可靠区分闪烁条带伪影与真实纹理，且这些伪影形态随曝光设置变化显著，需要多帧RAW修复方法。

Method: 提出BRACE多帧修复模型，利用频率感知条带先验和多尺度空间交叉注意力调制器进行跨曝光空间融合，并引入条纹频率一致性度量进行评估。

Result: 实验表明该方法在合成和真实基准测试中达到最先进性能，构建的Bricker数据集和代码已开源。

Conclusion: 通过多帧RAW修复方法有效解决了闪烁条带伪影问题，提出的BRACE模型和评估方法为屏幕拍摄图像质量提升提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Flicker-banding (FB), arises from temporal aliasing between a camera's rolling shutter and a display's brightness modulation, degrading screen-captured image readability with color shifts and jagged patterns. Existing single-frame methods with simplified parametric stripe models cannot reliably distinguish these artifacts from genuine texture. To address this, we conduct a systematic analysis of complex FB morphologies and reveal their significant variation across exposure settings, motivating a multi-frame bracketed RAW restoration paradigm. We construct Bricker, a synthetic-real bracketed RAW dataset built via ray-tracing-based physical simulation and automated multi-exposure capture tool. We further propose BRACE: Bracketed RAW Flicker-Banding Removal, a multi-frame restoration model that utilizes frequency-aware banding prior and a multi-scale spatial cross-attention modulator (MSCAM) for cross-exposure spatial fusion. We also introduce the Stripe Frequency Consistency (SFC) metric to evaluate banding removal. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic and real benchmarks. Our dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/ZZH-qwq/BRACE.

</details>


### [149] [See Only When Needed: Context-Aware Attention Intervention for Mitigating Hallucinations in LVLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29847)
*Yuqing Lei,Wenbo Lyu,Yingjun Du,Xiantong Zhen,Cees G. M. Snoek,Ling Shao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CAI是一种无需训练、推理时干预的注意力机制，通过"只在需要时查看"的原则，在深层网络中对不确定性高的token进行选择性视觉注意力调整，减少幻觉同时保持语言流畅性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型存在对象幻觉问题，传统方法均匀增强视觉信号可能放大无关区域并引入虚假证据，损害语言流畅性。

Method: 提出上下文感知注意力干预(CAI)：1)基于早期层表示计算token特定的视觉相关性来定位语义对齐区域；2)在深层网络中对不确定性激增的token应用保守的、基于熵和深度门控的注意力倾斜，保持自信token和无关区域基本不变。

Result: 在多个LVLM骨干网络和基准测试中，CAI实现了最先进的幻觉缓解效果，且分析表明CAI是一种KL最小化的注意力重新加权方法，在非活动门或小倾斜下具有有限干扰。

Conclusion: CAI通过选择性视觉注意力干预有效减少对象幻觉，同时保持语言流畅性，无需训练即可在推理时应用，对比解码可作为辅助偏置抑制模块可选使用。

Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) excel at multimodal tasks but remain prone to object hallucinations. Prior training-free remedies often uniformly strengthen visual signals, which may also amplify irrelevant regions and introduce spurious evidence, harming fluency. We propose Context-aware Attention Intervention (CAI), a training-free inference-time mechanism that enforces a see only when needed principle via two-axis selectivity: where to look and when to intervene. At each decoding step, CAI derives token-specific visual relevance from early-layer representations to localize semantically aligned regions, and applies a conservative, entropy- and depth-gated attention tilt only for uncertainty-spiking tokens in deeper layers where visual grounding degrades, leaving confident tokens and irrelevant regions largely unchanged. This targeted intervention strengthens visual grounding while preserving linguistic fluency, and it yields consistent improvements even without contrastive decoding, which remains optional as an auxiliary bias-suppression module. Extensive experiments across multiple LVLM backbones and benchmarks show that CAI achieves state-of-the-art hallucination mitigation, and our analysis characterizes CAI as a KL-minimal attention reweighting with bounded interference under inactive gates or small tilts. Code is available at https://github.com/Iris1946/CAI.

</details>


### [150] [Efficient Visual Pointing for Embodied AI:Agent-Driven Data Synthesis, Cross-Block Attention, and Iterative Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29850)
*Zijian Hong,Qi Lv,Yuxiang Xie,Jianming Xing,Xiang Deng,Weili Guan,Liqiang Nie*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PointArena 2026视觉指向解决方案，通过三方面改进实现77.2%整体准确率：1）代理驱动合成构建大规模候选池；2）确定性可操控数据管道创建验证数据集；3）两个模型模块（AttnRes和ABC校正）处理互补错误


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉指向是将语言指令映射到像素坐标的核心技能，对具身AI至关重要。现有方法存在多种失败模式需要解决，包括数据质量、模型可控性和坐标定位精度等问题。

Method: 1）代理驱动合成构建包含55,372个处理输出的大规模语义和锚点相对候选池；2）确定性可操控数据管道使用掩码、模板和路径验证创建10,000个样本的主数据集；3）模型端采用AttnRes模块（门控跨块注意力增强可控性）和ABC校正模块（用视觉特征编码扰动坐标提升坐标定位）；4）类别感知路由结合多个专家模型

Result: 整体准确率达到77.2%，在基准测试中排名第二。各子任务表现：可操作性93.9%、空间关系82.6%、推理78.2%、计数70.4%、可控性63.0%。服务器库存包含53,772个去重样本ID和37,574个可训练完成或接受行

Conclusion: 该解决方案通过系统性的三方面改进有效提升了视觉指向任务的性能，特别是通过大规模数据合成、确定性数据管道和互补模型模块的组合方法，在多个子任务上取得了显著进展

Abstract: Visual pointing maps a language instruction to pixel co ordinates, a core skill for embodied AI. We describe our PointArena 2026 solution, which achieves 77.2% overall accuracy and ranks second on the benchmark. The ap proach targets three failure modes. First, agent-driven syn thesis builds large semantic and anchor-relative candidate pools; the server inventory contains 55,372 processed out puts, 53,772 de-duplicated sample IDs, and 37,574 train able completed or accepted rows. Second, a determinis tic steerable-data pipeline creates a verified 10,000-sample main set, plus reserve samples, using masks, templates, and path verification. Third, two model-side modules address complementary errors: AttnRes adds gated cross-block at tention for steerability, while ABC correction encodes per turbed coordinates with visual features for general coordi nate grounding. Category-aware routing combines comple mentary specialists; local validation used to select experts records 93.9% Affordance, 82.6% Spatial Relation, 78.2% Reasoning, 70.4% Counting, and 63.0% Steerability.

</details>


### [151] [RainODE: Continuous-Time Precipitation Forecasting with Latent Neural ODEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29855)
*Yeeun Seong,Doyi Kim,Minseok Seo,Changick Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RainODE 将降水预报建模为连续时间动力系统，使用神经ODE捕捉平流运动，并引入布朗桥随机源建模来细化强度变化，实现任意时间推理和锐利预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 降水预报不仅需要准确性，时间分辨率也很关键。但提高时间分辨率受到观测限制和密集离散建模计算成本的制约。现有方法难以同时处理平流运动和非平流强度变化。

Method: 1) 将降水预报重新表述为连续时间动力系统，提出RainODE框架，在潜在空间中使用神经ODE建模降水演化；2) 引入基于布朗桥公式的随机源建模模块，细化残余强度变化并恢复细粒度结构，同时保持平流一致性。

Result: 在SEVIR和新引入的RAPID数据集上的实验表明，RainODE在多个时间间隔和降水机制下都取得了持续改进，能够实现任意时间推理并保持锐利预测。

Conclusion: RainODE通过结合确定性连续动力学和随机细化，克服了传统方法的局限性，为降水预报提供了一种灵活且有效的框架，能够同时处理平流运动和非平流强度变化。

Abstract: In precipitation forecasting, not only accuracy but also temporal resolution is critical. However, increasing temporal resolution is constrained by observational limitations and the computational cost of dense discrete modeling. To overcome this limitation, we reformulate precipitation forecasting as a continuous-time dynamical system and propose RainODE, a framework that models precipitation evolution in latent space using a Neural ODE. This formulation enables derivative-consistent temporal dynamics and captures the dominant large-scale advective motion of precipitation systems. Nevertheless, a purely deterministic ODE struggles to represent non-advective intensity changes such as localized growth, decay, and sub-grid variability, often leading to over-smoothed predictions. To address this issue, we introduce a stochastic source modeling module based on a Brownian Bridge formulation, which refines residual intensity variations and restores fine-grained structures while preserving advective consistency. By combining deterministic continuous dynamics with stochastic refinement, RainODE enables arbitrary-time inference while maintaining sharp predictions. Experiments on SEVIR and the newly introduced Radar-based Precipitation Integrated Dataset (RAPID) demonstrate consistent improvements across multiple temporal intervals and precipitation regimes. The code is available at https://github.com/SeongYE/RainODE.

</details>


### [152] [SUMO: Segment and Track Any Motion with Nonlinear State Space Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29861)
*Kexin Tian,Sixu Li,Keshu Wu,Yang Zhou,Zhengzhong Tu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SUMO是一个零样本、无需训练的统一框架，通过整合非线性动力学与基于视觉的分割技术，在VOT和MOS任务中实现准确且一致的跟踪与分割。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视觉对象跟踪和移动对象分割方法主要依赖视觉线索，在现实世界中物体运动复杂且非线性的场景下常常失效，需要一种能够处理复杂非线性动态的方法。

Method: 提出SUMO框架：1）开发受机器人学启发的非线性状态空间模型捕捉复杂物体动态；2）提出选择性无迹滤波器进行准确状态估计，包含联合评分机制和动态融合多源预测；3）应用记忆选择机制评估记忆帧的可靠性。

Result: 广泛的实验结果表明，SUMO在视觉对象跟踪和移动对象分割任务上都达到了最先进的性能水平。

Conclusion: SUMO通过整合非线性动力学与视觉分割，为VOT和MOS任务提供了一个有效的零样本、无需训练的统一解决方案，能够处理现实世界中复杂的非线性物体运动。

Abstract: Visual Object Tracking (VOT) and Moving Object Segmentation (MOS) are two fundamental tasks in computer vision that involve both spatial and temporal object dynamics. Existing methods rely predominantly on visual cues and thus often falter in real-world scenarios where object motions are inherently complex and nonlinear. To address this limitation, we propose SUMO, a zero-shot, training-free, unified framework integrating nonlinear dynamics with vision-based segmentation for accurate and consistent VOT and MOS. Specifically, we develop a nonlinear State Space Model (SSM) inspired by robotics principles to capture the complex object dynamics. Building on this model, we propose a Selective Unscented Filter (SUF) for accurate state estimation, which features a joint scoring mechanism and dynamically fuses multi-source predictions to identify the most plausible object state over time. Furthermore, we apply a memory selection mechanism to evaluate the reliability of memory frames. Our extensive experimental results show that SUMO achieves state-of-the-art performance on both VOT and MOS tasks.

</details>


### [153] [LWDrive: Layer-Wise World-Model-Guided Vision-Language Model Planning for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29879)
*Chen Yang,Yuhao Wei,Ze Xu,Ziheng Zou,Shuang Liang,Delin Ouyang,Lingfeng Qi,Jie Li,Guofa Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LWDrive是一个基于视觉语言模型的端到端自动驾驶规划框架，通过分层世界模型引导来细化粗粒度轨迹，实现了几何准确、前瞻性和多视角感知的规划


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型生成的轨迹仅编码粗粒度的驾驶意图，缺乏几何精度、未来感知和多视角基础。为了克服这些限制，需要开发能够进行精细化轨迹规划的框架。

Method: 提出LWDrive框架：将VLM输出作为意图感知的粗粒度计划，在其周围扩展多样化候选轨迹，通过前瞻级联规划器（FCP）进行分层细化。引入未来帧生成监督来学习前瞻性场景表示，并整合多层VLM特征、历史时间状态、动作查询表示和当前帧多视角BEV特征。

Result: 在NAVSIM基准测试中获得92.0分，在NAVSIM-v2中获得89.6分，表现优异。代码和模型将公开提供。

Conclusion: LWDrive通过分层世界模型引导，成功实现了从粗粒度驾驶意图到几何精确轨迹的渐进式细化，在保持大模型高级驾驶意图的同时整合了多视角场景线索和预测动态，显著提升了端到端自动驾驶规划的性能。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) provide powerful semantic understanding and commonsense reasoning for End-to-End Autonomous Driving (E2E-AD) planning. However, trajectories directly generated by VLMs often encode only coarse driving intentions and remain insufficient for geometrically accurate, future-aware, and multi-view-grounded planning. To address these limitations, we develop the Layer-Wise World-Model-Guided Driving framework (LWDrive). LWDrive is a VLM planning framework that refines coarse trajectories through layer-wise world-model guidance. Instead of treating the VLM output as the final trajectory, LWDrive uses it as an intent-aware coarse plan, expands a diverse candidate space around it, and progressively refines the candidates through a Foresight Cascade Planner (FCP). Specifically, we introduce future-frame generation supervision to encourage the VLM to learn forward-looking scene representations, thereby injecting planning-relevant predictive dynamics into its internal hidden states. Built upon these world-model-supervised representations, FCP exploits VLM features across multiple layers and integrates historical temporal states, Action-Query representations, and current-frame multi-view Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) features to refine candidate trajectories in a coarse-to-fine manner. This design enables progressive correction of spatial positions and motion trends while grounding trajectory refinement with multi-view scene cues and preserving the high-level driving intention produced by the large model. Finally, a score head evaluates the refined candidates and selects the best trajectory as the final planning output. Experiments show that LWDrive achieves a score of 92.0 on the NAVSIM benchmark and 89.6 on NAVSIM-v2. Code and models will be made publicly available.

</details>


### [154] [IREU: Identity-Related Encoder-Only Unlearning for Customized Portrait Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29880)
*Chaoyi Shi,Shanshan Zhang,Jian Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了CPG（定制肖像生成）技术中的身份遗忘问题，并开发了IREU方法，通过定位和扰动身份相关特征来实现目标身份的遗忘，同时保持其他身份的生成保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CPG技术虽然能生成高保真人物图像，但存在传播虚假视觉信息的隐私风险。需要让公共生成器能够在被请求时抑制对特定人物的生成能力，因此研究CPG中的身份遗忘问题。

Method: 提出IREU方法：1）离线定位身份相关特征；2）仅对这些特征进行扰动。与简单基线（在特征空间中最小化目标身份相似度、最大化保留身份相似度）相比，IREU避免了全局扰动对其他身份保真度的损害。

Result: 实验结果表明IREU方法在目标身份遗忘方面表现更好，同时为其他保留身份保持高保真度。此外，经过遗忘处理的图像编码器可在不同生成器之间泛化，无需微调，便于实际部署。

Conclusion: IREU方法有效解决了CPG中的身份遗忘问题，既能成功遗忘目标身份，又能保持其他身份的生成质量，且具有实际部署的友好性。

Abstract: Customized Portrait Generation (CPG) technologies have been widely used to generate high-fidelity person images given an input image indicating the identity and a text prompt indicating the required edits. Yet these methods pose significant privacy risks by spreading fake visual information. Against such risks, each public generator should be able to suppress its generation ability for a particular person when requested. Therefore, in this work we investigate the identity unlearning problem for CPG. Since there are no previous methods in this field, we propose a simple baseline that updates the image encoder by minimizing identity similarity between generated and input images for target identities to be unlearned, while maximizing it for identities to be retained. However, we find such a global perturbation in the feature space harms the fidelity of generated images for other identities to be retained. To solve this problem, we propose a novel method IREU, which first locates identity-related features in an offline manner and then only performs feature perturbations on them. The experimental results show that our proposed method IREU achieves better identity unlearning performance for target identities to be unlearned, and also keeps high fidelity for other identities to be retained. In addition, our unlearned image encoder is generalizable across different generators with the same encoder without fine-tuning, which is friendly for deployment in practice.

</details>


### [155] [Building artificial intelligence virtual tissue (AIVT) for tissue state representation, feature prediction, and dynamic simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29883)
*Qiqi Lu,Qianjin Feng,Shaoqun Zeng,Shenghua Cheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AI虚拟组织（AIVT）是一个基于空间多模态数据的AI框架，用于在健康和疾病状态下建模组织状态及其转变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统计算方法无法充分捕捉组织作为空间组织化、多尺度生物系统的复杂性，而AI在表示复杂系统方面展现出卓越能力，为表征组织状态及其转变创造了新机遇。

Method: 提出AI虚拟组织（AIVT）概念框架，基于空间多模态数据学习统一、空间分辨、动态可操作的组织状态表示，支持组织状态表示分析、分子和形态特征预测、以及时空组织动力学模拟。

Result: 提出了AIVT的理论框架，包括基本假设、核心能力、架构组件以及数据和算法基础，为AI驱动的组织建模提供了系统化方法。

Conclusion: AIVT为理解和模拟组织在健康和疾病状态下的复杂行为提供了一个有前景的AI驱动框架，有望推动组织生物学研究的发展。

Abstract: Modeling tissue states and their transitions is essential for understanding tissue homeostasis in health and pathological remodeling in disease. However, conventional computational modeling approaches are inadequate to capture the complexity of tissues as spatially organized, multiscale biological systems. Artificial intelligence (AI) has shown a remarkable ability for representing intricate systems, creating new opportunities to characterize tissue states and their transitions. Here, we propose the concept of AI virtual tissue (AIVT), an AI framework grounded in spatial multimodal data for modeling tissues in health and disease. AIVT is designed to learn unified, spatially resolved, and dynamically manipulatable representations of tissue state, enabling tissue state representation and analysis, molecular and morphological feature prediction, and simulation of spatiotemporal tissue dynamics. We outline the fundamental assumptions, core capabilities, architectural components, as well as data and algorithm foundations of AIVT as a framework for AI-driven tissue modeling.

</details>


### [156] [LLM-based Multimodal Personality Recognition via Facial Action Unit-Text Semantic Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29900)
*Tianyi Zhang,Wei Shan,Yuan Zong,Tianhua Qi,Wenming Zheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于LLM的面部动作单元与文本响应融合框架，用于异步视频面试中的人格识别，通过将AU序列转换为可解释的文本描述并与面试者文本响应融合，实现更准确的人格评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的人格识别方法存在局限性：单模态方法（如仅依赖LLM分析文本）会忽略面部线索等非语言信息；多模态方法使用全脸图像或稀疏采样帧会丢失精细的时间动态信息，这些信息对准确的人格评估至关重要。需要一种能融合细粒度面部动态与文本信息的方法。

Method: 提出基于LLM的AU-文本融合框架：1) 将面部动作单元序列转换为可解释的文本描述；2) 将这些AU文本描述与参与者的文本响应通过LLM进行语义融合；3) 使用轻量级回归头将生成的嵌入转换为连续人格分数，而不破坏底层的语义空间。

Result: 在AVI-6基准测试中，相比大多数基线方法取得了持续改进：预测误差更低，与人工评分的人格特质相关性更强。分析表明AU衍生的语义表示能为文本响应提供互补的非语言线索。将语义理解与回归预测解耦也带来了更大的训练稳定性和更清晰的解释性。

Conclusion: AU-文本融合为异步视频面试中的人格识别提供了一个心理基础扎实且计算高效的框架。该方法通过融合细粒度面部动态与文本信息，克服了现有方法的局限性，实现了更准确、稳定和可解释的人格评估。

Abstract: Personality recognition in asynchronous video interviews (AVIs) has become increasingly important due to their widespread adoption in modern recruitment. Existing approaches often rely on large language models (LLMs) to analyze textual responses of interviewees in AVI. However, unimodel methods often suffer from information loss (e.g., ignore facial cues). In contrast, multimodal methods that employ full-face images or sparsely sampled frames can discard fine-grained temporal dynamics critical for accurate personality assessment. To overcome these limitations, we propose an LLM-based framework that semantically fuse facial action units (AUs) with textual responses of AVI. AU sequences are first converted into interpretable textual descriptions, which are then fused with participants' textual responses through an LLM. A lightweight regression head transforms the resulting embeddings into continuous personality scores without disrupting the underlying semantic space. Experiments on the AVI-6 benchmark demonstrate consistent improvements over most baselines, with lower prediction errors and stronger correlations with human-rated scores across multiple traits. Further analysis reveals that AU-derived semantic representations offer complementary non-verbal cues to textual responses. Decoupling semantic understanding from regression prediction within the LLM also leads to greater training stability and clearer interpretability. Overall, these findings demonstrate that AU-text fusion provides a psychologically grounded and computationally efficient framework for personality recognition in AVIs.

</details>


### [157] [StrucTab: A Structured Optimization Framework for Table Parsing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29905)
*Gengluo Li,Shangpin Peng,Chengquan Zhang,Binghong Wu,Hao Feng,Weinong Wang,Pengyuan Lyu,Huawen Shen,Xingyu Wan,Zhuotao Tian,Han Hu,Can Ma,Yu Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: StrucTab是一个通过中间结构监督和奖励分解学习的表格解析模型，将解析过程分解为行-列计数和合并单元格分析等子任务，通过统一的强化学习框架进行优化，并在新的TableVerse-5K基准上取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于视觉语言模型的表格解析方法通常直接监督最终输出，忽略了理解复杂表格结构所需的中间推理过程。同时，强化学习优化常因不稳定或模糊的奖励设计而受限。

Method: StrucTab将表格解析分解为类似人类认知的子任务（行-列计数、合并单元格分析等），采用顺序推理策略统一这些子任务。优化层面提出Uni-TabRL框架，使用分解的奖励（有效性、结构、内容）提供稳定信息化的优化信号。

Result: 在所有评估的公共基准上达到最先进的性能，在TableVerse-5K基准上取得显著改进，验证了显式结构建模和分解奖励优化的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过中间结构监督和分解奖励优化，StrucTab在表格解析任务中实现了更好的性能，证明了显式建模复杂表格结构和稳定强化学习优化的重要性。

Abstract: Table parsing aims to convert table images into structured, machine-readable representations, a task requiring the joint perception of complex spatial layouts and textual content. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) enable end-to-end parsing, they typically rely on direct supervision of the final output, thereby bypassing the explicit intermediate reasoning that is crucial for understanding complex table structures. Furthermore, attempts to optimize these models using reinforcement learning (RL) are often hindered by unstable or ambiguous reward designs, limiting potential performance gains. To address these limitations, we propose StrucTab, a table parsing model learned through intermediate structural supervision and reward decomposition. At the modeling level, by decomposing the parsing process into human-inspired subtasks, such as row-column counting and merged-cell analysis, StrucTab progressively unifies them through a sequential reasoning strategy. At the optimization level, we introduce Uni-TabRL, a unified RL framework that leverages decomposed rewards (validity, structure, and content) to provide stable and informative optimization signals. Finally, at the evaluation level, we present TableVerse-5K, a large-scale, challenging benchmark encompassing diverse, real-world table scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of StrucTab across all evaluated public benchmarks and significant improvements on TableVerse-5K, validating the effectiveness of explicit structural modeling and decomposed reward optimization. Code and benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/VirtualLUOUCAS/StrucTab.

</details>


### [158] [Traffic-CBM: A Structurally Interpretable Multimodal Framework for Encrypted Traffic Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29909)
*Honglei Jin,Wenshuo Chen,Shaofeng Liang,Haozhe Jia,Menshuo Zhao,Shuxu Jin,Songning Lai,Yutao Yue*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Traffic-CBM：一个结构可解释的多模态加密流量分类框架，通过将异构流量证据组织到统一层次概念空间，提供比传统黑盒模型更清晰的解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前加密流量分类方法虽然性能强大，但决策过程难以解释。现有方法通常将流量统计、数据包序列和字节级表示融合成不透明的潜在特征，不清楚哪种证据真正驱动预测。

Method: 提出Traffic-CBM框架，将异构流量信号组织到统一层次概念空间：分组流量统计映射到统计概念，专用时间编码器从不相交特征子空间学习时间概念，字节级证据进一步组织为数据包级和跨数据包概念。

Result: 在多个加密流量基准测试上评估显示，Traffic-CBM实现了竞争性且平衡的分类性能，同时提供比传统端到端融合模型更清晰的结构解释接口。

Conclusion: Traffic-CBM通过显式概念表示将异构流量证据转化为更易分析的形式，学习到的概念空间在预测过程中被主动使用，为多模态流量证据提供了更清晰的结构解释。

Abstract: Encrypted traffic classification has achieved strong performance, but its decision process remains difficult to interpret. Existing methods usually combine flow statistics, packet sequences, and byte-level representations into opaque latent features, making it unclear which type of evidence actually drives the prediction. In this paper, we propose Traffic-CBM, a structurally interpretable multimodal framework for encrypted traffic classification. Instead of directly fusing heterogeneous traffic signals into a black-box representation, Traffic-CBM organizes them into a unified hierarchical concept space. These concepts are not manually annotated semantic attributes; rather, they are scalar evidence summaries constrained by predefined traffic evidence groups. More specifically, grouped flow statistics are mapped to statistical concepts, dedicated temporal encoders learn temporal concepts from disjoint feature subspaces, and byte-level evidence is further organized into packet-level and cross-packet concepts. This design turns heterogeneous traffic evidence into an explicit concept representation and makes different levels of traffic evidence easier to analyze. We evaluate Traffic-CBM on multiple encrypted traffic benchmarks. Results show that it achieves competitive and balanced classification performance while providing a clearer structural interpretation interface than conventional end-to-end fusion models. Further analyses suggest that the learned concept space is actively used in the prediction process and provides a clearer structural explanation of multimodal traffic evidence.

</details>


### [159] [H-GRPO: Permutation-Invariant Reinforcement Learning for Grounded Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29915)
*Eric Peh,Debaditya Roy,Basura Fernando*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种通过分解式证据落地来提升视觉语言模型性能和可解释性的框架，将全局查询分解为原子子问题，每个都需要明确的子答案和局部证据边界框，构建结构化推理路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型虽然在基准测试中表现良好，但仍然是"黑盒"系统，容易产生幻觉或依赖表面捷径，缺乏可解释性和可靠性。

Method: 采用分解式证据落地框架，将全局查询分解为一系列原子子问题，每个子问题需要明确的子答案和局部证据边界框，通过将中间逻辑步骤（如识别容器、分析液体属性、评估环境上下文）与特定视觉区域关联，构建结构化推理路径。

Result: 最终答案作为已验证视觉事实的逻辑结果出现，而不是统计猜测，从而提高了模型的性能和可解释性。

Conclusion: 通过分解式证据落地框架，可以增强视觉语言模型的性能和可解释性，使模型能够像人类一样进行推理，减少幻觉和表面捷径的依赖。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) often achieve high performance on benchmarks while remaining "black boxes", yet they remain prone to hallucination or rely on superficial shortcuts. In this work, we propose a framework designed to enhance both performance and interpretability through De-compositional Evidence Grounding. Unlike monolithic inference approaches, our approach forces the model to decompose a global query into a sequence of atomic sub-questions, each requiring an explicit sub-answer and critically a localized evidence bounding box. By grounding intermediate logical steps (e.g. identifying a container, analyzing liquid properties, and assessing environmental context) in specific visual regions, we construct a structured reasoning path that mirrors human-like deduction. This allows the final answer to emerge as a logical consequence of verified visual facts rather than a statistical guess.

</details>


### [160] [DCGrasp: Distance-aware Controllable Grasp Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29924)
*Hiroyasu Akada,Jesús Pérez,Emre Aksan,Vasileios Choutas,Cristian Romero,Alberto Garcia-Garcia,Vladislav Golyanik,Christian Theobalt,Thabo Beeler*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DCGrasp是一个基于距离感知可控抓取生成系统，通过新颖的抓取能量项和距离剖面生成，实现高质量、物理合理的3D手-物体交互生成，具有灵活的用户控制和强泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成3D手-物体交互对于机器人、XR和合成数据生成应用至关重要，需要灵活的可控性和对多样化物体几何的强泛化能力。现有方法很少满足这些要求，限制了实际应用。

Method: 提出DCGrasp系统，基于新颖的抓取能量项计算距离剖面（每个手顶点到最近物体点的有符号距离），结合距离感知加权。使用扩散变换器生成距离剖面和候选手姿态，然后通过优化细化候选姿态，确保优化手姿态与生成距离剖面在近接触区域的一致性。

Result: 实验表明DCGrasp能生成高质量、物理合理的抓取，具有灵活的用户控制，能泛化到多样化的物体和手形状及尺度。

Conclusion: DCGrasp为可控3D手-物体交互合成建立了一个稳健且多功能的流程，解决了现有方法在可控性和泛化性方面的限制。

Abstract: Generating 3D hand-object interactions is essential for applications in robotics, XR, and synthetic data generation, where flexible controllability and strong generalization to diverse object geometries are required. However, existing methods rarely satisfy these requirements, limiting their practical applicability. We present DCGrasp, a distance-aware controllable grasp generation system built on a novel grasp energy term. This term computes Distance Profile, a signed distance from each hand vertex to the nearest object point, coupled with distance-aware weighting, effectively capturing the semantically similar hand-object interaction in near-contact regions while remaining invariant to object and hand identity. Given various controllable signals, DCGrasp first generates a Distance Profile based on a Diffusion Transformer, together with a corresponding candidate hand pose. We then refine the candidate pose through optimization, enforcing consistency between the optimized hand pose and the generated Distance Profile in near-contact regions. Our experiments show that DCGrasp produces high-quality, physically plausible grasps with flexible user control, generalizing to diverse object and hand shapes and scales. Our work establishes a robust and versatile pipeline for the synthesis of controllable 3D hand-object interactions.

</details>


### [161] [Latent-CURE for Breast Cancer Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29928)
*Weiyi Zhao,Xiaoyu Tan,Lu Gan,Liang Liu,Xihe Qiu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Latent-CURE是一个基于隐空间推理的乳腺超声诊断框架，采用非对称加权思维链方法，通过强制模型顺序推断标准化的BI-RADS形态描述符来提高诊断透明度和准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态大模型在乳腺超声诊断中采用不透明的端到端范式，过于关注全局统计相关性而忽视结构化临床推理，容易受到极端流行病学不平衡的影响，可能忽略罕见但关键的恶性指标而偏向常见的良性模式。

Method: 提出Latent-CURE框架，采用基于隐空间推理的非对称加权思维链方法，强制模型顺序推断标准化的BI-RADS形态描述符，然后做出最终诊断。同时采用双非对称优化策略，通过动态调整边界和权重来保护高特异性恶性描述符不被常见良性先验所掩盖。

Result: 综合评估表明，该知识注入方法在提供透明临床证据的同时，在不平衡医学队列中实现了稳健、准确的诊断性能。

Conclusion: Latent-CURE通过隐空间推理和非对称加权思维链方法，解决了现有乳腺超声诊断模型中的不透明性和对流行病学不平衡的脆弱性问题，实现了更透明、更稳健的诊断。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Models have significantly advanced automated breast ultrasound diagnosis. However, most existing frameworks utilize opaque, end-to-end paradigms prioritizing global statistical correlations over structured clinical reasoning. Consequently, these models remain susceptible to shortcut learning amid extreme real-world epidemiological imbalances, often bypassing rare but decisive malignant indicators for dominant benign patterns. To address this disconnect, we propose Latent-CURE, a novel diagnostic framework driven by asymmetric weighted chain-of-thought methodology grounded in latent space reasoning. Unlike traditional approaches, our framework constructs an implicit reasoning trajectory forcing the model to sequentially infer standardized BI-RADS morphological descriptors before converging on a final diagnosis. Furthermore, to combat the extreme scarcity of critical malignant features, we couple this architecture with a dual-asymmetric optimization strategy. By dynamically adjusting margins and weights, this strategy safeguards high-specificity malignant descriptors from being overshadowed by common benign priors. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that our knowledge-injected approach provides transparent clinical evidence while achieving robust, accurate diagnostic performance in imbalanced medical cohorts.

</details>


### [162] [Scene-aware Prediction of Diverse Human Movement Goals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29942)
*Qiaoyue Yang,Amadeus Weber,Magnus Jung,Ayoub AI-Hamadi,Sven Wachsmuth*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于条件变分自编码器(CVAE)的多目标预测方法，利用RGB场景和人体姿态预测人类多样化的未来运动目标，解决人类运动的随机性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类行为预测对自主系统的主动规划至关重要。人类行为因目标不同而具有随机性，环境上下文和社会线索对推断人类运动意图都很重要。现有方法要么需要场景语义知识，要么只处理与物体的交互。

Method: 提出新颖的多目标预测方法，使用生成模型处理人类运动的随机性。基于条件变分自编码器(CVAE)，利用当前RGB场景和人体姿态，通过在CVAE潜在空间中进行采样来预测多样化的未来运动目标。

Result: 方法能够在场景中生成多个运动目标，在GTA-IM数据集和PROX数据集上展现出跨场景的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 提出的基于CVAE的多目标预测方法能够有效处理人类运动的随机性，生成多样化的未来运动目标，并在不同场景中具有泛化能力。

Abstract: Anticipation of human behaviours facilitates autonomous systems in proactive planning. Human behaviour could be stochastic due to varying goals. Human goals typically guide their own movement and could therefore help to predict the human trajectory and human motion in the long-term. To infer the human movement intentions, the environmental context plays a significant role, in addition to the social cues expressed by the individual. Previous works on human goals prediction either require semantic knowledge of the scene, or only tackle interactions with objects. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-goal prediction method using the generative model to address the stochasticity of human movement. It leverages the current RGB scene and the human pose to predict diverse potential future goals of human movement based on the Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE). Our results demonstrate that our approach is capable of generating multiple movement goals in the scene via samplings in latent space of the CVAE and exhibits generalization capability across scenarios in GTA-IM dataset and PROX dataset. Code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/Q-Y-Yang/DiverseGoalsPrediction.git}{\texttt{https://github.com/Q-Y-Yang/DiverseGoalsPrediction}}.

</details>


### [163] [Explainability-Aware Frustum Attack: Exposing Structural Vulnerabilities in LiDAR-Based 3D Object Detectors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29963)
*Chengzeng You,Binbin Xu,Soteris Demetriou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于可解释性引导的对抗分析方法，用于研究LiDAR点云3D目标检测器的结构脆弱性。通过SALL方法生成通用显著性图，并设计EFA攻击策略，相比现有方法以更少的扰动实现更有效的检测失效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对点云3D目标检测器的结构脆弱性理解不足。现有研究要么在孤立的3D物体模型上研究对抗鲁棒性，要么主要关注LiDAR欺骗攻击的物理可实现性，而忽略了理解检测器行为或攻击效率。本研究旨在探究LiDAR检测器在复杂场景中如何依赖空间证据，以及这些依赖模式是否可以被利用来更高效地诱导检测失败。

Method: 提出可解释性引导的对抗分析方法。首先提出Saliency-LiDAR（SALL）方法，通过聚合跨场景的Integrated Gradient归因来生成LiDAR 3D目标检测器的通用显著性图。基于这些显著性图，设计Explainability-aware Frustum Attack（EFA）攻击策略，选择性地扰动最具影响力的frustum（锥体区域），而不是均匀攻击整个物体区域。

Result: 在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上，对PointPillars和SECOND等检测器的实验表明：EFA攻击将检测召回率降低了超过15个百分点，同时相比现有非显著性感知基线方法，所需的扰动frustum数量减少了25-50%。

Conclusion: 研究发现现代3D检测器将判别性证据集中在少数空间区域，这暴露了当前LiDAR感知系统的结构鲁棒性脆弱性。所提出的方法有效揭示并利用了这种脆弱性，为理解3D目标检测器的安全性提供了新视角。

Abstract: The structural vulnerabilities of point cloud-based 3D object detectors remain poorly understood. Prior work has studied adversarial robustness primarily on isolated 3D object models, while recent LiDAR spoofing attacks target richer and more realistic driving scenes but focus mainly on physical realizability rather than understanding detector behavior or attack efficiency. In this work, we investigate how LiDAR-based detectors rely on spatial evidence in complex scenes and whether these reliance patterns can be exploited to induce failures more efficiently. To this end, we propose an explainability-guided adversarial analysis methodology. We introduce the Saliency-LiDAR (SALL) method, which aggregates Integrated Gradient attributions across scenes to produce universal saliency maps for LiDAR-based 3D object detectors. Guided by these maps, we design the Explainability-aware Frustum Attack (EFA), which selectively perturbs only the most influential frustums rather than uniformly attacking entire object regions. Experiments on KITTI and nuScenes, across detectors such as PointPillars and SECOND, show that EFA reduces detection recall by more than 15 percentage points while requiring 25-50% fewer perturbed frustums than the state-of-the-art non-saliency-aware baseline. These findings reveal that modern 3D detectors concentrate discriminative evidence in a small subset of spatial regions, exposing a structural robustness vulnerability in current LiDAR perception systems. Our code is released at https://github.com/SecMindLab/Saliency_LiDAR.

</details>


### [164] [Variance Reduction on the Camera Axis: Multi-View Score Distillation for 3D](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29964)
*Marian Lupascu,Mihai Sorin Stupariu,Ionut Mironica*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MV-SDI通过多视角梯度聚合改进3D生成中的分数蒸馏，无需重新训练扩散先验或多视角数据，显著提升形状一致性和生成质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统分数蒸馏方法使用单视角梯度估计，存在高方差和全局形状不一致问题。现有方法通过重新训练多视角扩散先验来解决，但这将采样贡献与先验质量混在一起。本文旨在分离采样轴，通过多视角梯度聚合来降低方差，同时保持2D先验冻结

Method: 提出多视角聚合分数蒸馏（MV-SDI），在每步优化中聚合K个视角的梯度，通过梯度累积保持峰值内存不变。使用反义对极对采样视角，确保平衡的角覆盖。该方法与基于梯度的分数蒸馏流程兼容，包括通过反演的分数蒸馏

Result: 在固定10,000次UNet调用预算下，K=2将CLIP R-Precision从74.8%提升至83.8%，CLIP分数从0.297提升至0.312，在HPSv2和ImageReward上也有稳定提升，43提示基准上的发散率为0.0%。K=4实现四倍步数减少，R-Precision达86.9%，CLIP分数0.307，均显著高于单视角基线

Conclusion: MV-SDI通过多视角梯度聚合有效解决了分数蒸馏中的高方差问题，显著提升3D生成的一致性和质量，无需重新训练扩散先验或多视角数据，具有很好的兼容性和实用性

Abstract: Score distillation turns a pretrained 2D diffusion model into a 3D generator, but the per-step gradient is estimated from a single randomly chosen view: it is high-variance and blind to global shape consistency. Prior work addresses this by retraining the diffusion prior on multi-view data; this improves consistency but makes the sampling contribution inseparable from prior quality. We instead isolate the sampling axis. The per-step gradient is one noisy sample of an expectation over views; aggregating K samples per step at a fixed total UNet budget reduces variance without touching the prior. We introduce Multi-View Aggregated Score Distillation (MV-SDI), which aggregates gradients from K views per step via gradient accumulation, keeping peak memory unchanged and the 2D prior frozen, and draws views as antithetic antipodal pairs, a prior-independent geometric property, for balanced angular coverage. At a fixed 10,000-UNet-call budget, K=2 raises CLIP R-Precision from 74.8% to 83.8% and CLIP score from 0.297 to 0.312, with consistent gains on HPSv2 and ImageReward and a 0.0% divergence rate on the 43-prompt benchmark; optimization steps halve as a consequence. K=4 gives a fourfold step reduction at R-Precision 86.9% and CLIP 0.307, still well above the single-view baseline on every alignment metric. MV-SDI is compatible with gradient-based score-distillation pipelines, including Score Distillation via Inversion, and requires no retraining and no multi-view data.

</details>


### [165] [Learning Efficient 4D Gaussian Representations from Monocular Videos with Flow Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29976)
*Shengjun Zhang,Jinzhao Li,Xin Fei,Yueqi Duan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Flow Splatting 提出了一种新的动态3D场景重建方法，通过构建速度场并利用传统splatting技术渲染光流，从单目视频中学习动态信息，相比现有方法在效率、质量和渲染速度上都有显著提升


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从单目视频重建动态3D场景具有挑战性，现有方法将3D高斯扩展到4D领域（变形场、轨迹或时空4D体积）存在训练时间长、渲染速度慢或内存消耗高的问题，未能充分利用密集动态信息

Method: 提出Flow Splatting方法，构建速度场并利用传统splatting技术渲染光流来监督动态学习过程。扩展4D体积具有时变均值和协方差表示复杂动态，自然构建和近似速度场，并扩展体积渲染策略来splat速度场，考虑相机运动的影响

Result: 在各种基准测试中，相比最先进的方法，Flow Splatting在图像质量、时间消耗和渲染速度方面表现更好，实现了更高的效率和更好的效果

Conclusion: Flow Splatting通过构建速度场并利用splatting技术渲染光流来监督动态学习，有效地从单目视频中学习动态信息，在动态3D场景重建方面取得了显著改进

Abstract: Reconstructing dynamic 3D scenes from monocular videos is challenging due to scene complexity and temporal dynamics. With the advancement of 3D Gaussian Splatting in novel view synthesis, existing methods extend 3D Gaussians to 4D domain with deformation fields, trajectories or spatiotemporal 4D volumes to model scene element deformation. However, these methods suffer from long training time, low rendering speed or high memory consumption for per-frame reconstruction of 4D volumes, without fully exploiting dense dynamic information. To address this issue, we propose Flow Splatting, which constructs the velocity field and enables the conventional splatting technique to render optical flow from the velocity field to supervise dynamics learning process from monocular videos. Specifically, we extend 4D volumes with time varying means and covariance to represent complex dynamics. Then, we construct and approximate the velocity field naturally based on this representations. While conventional volume rendering techniques support to render color fields, we extend the volume rendering strategy to splat the velocity field by considering the influence of camera motions. We conduct experiments on various benchmarks to demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our method. Compared to the state-of-the-art methods, our model achieves better image quality with less time consumption and higher rendering speed.

</details>


### [166] [Rigel: Self-Distilled Score Adaptation for Image and Video Captioning Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29997)
*Shuitsu Koyama,Kazuki Matsuda,Yuiga Wada,Shinnosuke Hirano,Daichi Yashima,Komei Sugiura*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Rigel是一个基于自蒸馏分数适配的图像和视频描述自动评估指标，通过任务对齐的评分头和改进的LLM骨干网络，解决了传统评估指标与人类判断不一致的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前图像和视频描述自动评估指标与人类判断对齐有限，现有LLM-as-a-Judge方法存在大词汇语言建模与小标签集评估不匹配的问题。

Method: 提出Rigel评估指标，采用自蒸馏分数适配方法：1）从冻结的LLM中蒸馏出评估专用的评分头，在任务对齐空间捕获判断信号；2）使用人类判断数据精炼LLM骨干网络；3）构建Vid-Lepus数据集（3,338个视频片段，33,380个参考描述，5,637个候选描述）进行训练。

Result: Rigel在多个基准测试中优于最先进的评估指标，在无参考设置下在ActivityNet-Fact上实现了超过10分的改进。

Conclusion: Rigel通过自蒸馏分数适配有效解决了图像和视频描述评估中LLM评估方法的问题，显著提升了与人类判断的对齐度。

Abstract: Automatic evaluation of image and video captioning is essential for benchmarking multimodal systems, although standard evaluation metrics show limited alignment with human judgments. Recent approaches using large language models (LLMs), commonly referred to as LLM-as-a-Judge, have improved alignment with human judgments but still suffer from a mismatch between large-vocabulary language modeling and evaluation over a small label set. To address this, we propose Rigel, an automatic evaluation metric for image and video captioning, based on self-distilled score adaptation. The metric employs an evaluation-specific scoring head distilled from a frozen LLM, which captures judgment signals in a task-aligned space without relying on large-vocabulary token sets. We then refine the LLM backbone with human judgment data. To train Rigel, we constructed the Vid-Lepus dataset, which contains 3,338 video clips, 33,380 reference captions, and 5,637 candidate captions. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that Rigel outperforms state-of-the-art metrics, achieving over 10-point improvements on ActivityNet-Fact in the reference-free setting.

</details>


### [167] [SICAGE: Speaker-Independent Culture-Aware Gesture Generation using TED4C-L Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30001)
*Ariel Gjaci,Antonio Sgorbissa,Vittorio Murino*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SICAGE框架通过提取与说话人无关的文化表征，实现了文化感知的协同手势生成，解决了现有方法忽略文化差异和说话人风格混淆的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有协同手势生成方法忽视文化差异，限制了人机交互效果；文化条件模型很少在说话人分离的数据分割下评估，导致"文化"行为可能与说话人特定手势风格相混淆。

Method: 提出SICAGE模块化框架，学习与说话人无关的文化表征：将每个说话人视为独立域，同时强制跨说话人不变性；使用对抗学习和Fishr正则化两种域泛化方法；引入ALaDiT实时扩散手势生成器；构建TED4C-L数据集（106小时，764位演讲者，4个文化群体）。

Result: SICAGE在运动真实性、多样性、节拍同步、语义相关性和文化一致性方面均有提升。

Conclusion: SICAGE框架能够生成文化适宜的协同手势，有效解决文化差异和说话人风格混淆问题，为人机交互提供更自然的文化感知手势生成。

Abstract: Recent co-speech gesture generation methods often overlook cultural differences, limiting their effectiveness in human-agent interaction. Moreover, culture-conditioned models are rarely evaluated under speaker-disjoint splits, so apparent "cultural" behavior may be confounded with speaker-specific gesturing style. We introduce SICAGE, a modular framework for culture-aware co-speech gesture generation that conditions motion synthesis models on speaker-independent cultural representations. SICAGE learns these representations from audio and text by treating each speaker as a separate domain while imposing invariance across speakers. This encourages representations to remain culture-discriminative while reducing dependence on speaker identity. The resulting cultural embeddings condition a multimodal generator to produce culturally appropriate gestures. We instantiate this idea with two domain generalization approaches: adversarial learning and Fishr regularization. We further introduce ALaDiT, a real-time diffusion-based gesture generator designed to efficiently incorporate the learned cultural embeddings. To validate our method, we built TED4C-L, a 106-hour multimodal dataset of 764 TED speakers from four cultural groups. Experiments show that SICAGE improves motion realism, diversity, beat synchronization, semantic relevance, and cultural consistency.

</details>


### [168] [GeoEdit: Geometry-Aware Object Editing via Dual-Branch Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30003)
*Yi He,Jiangming Wang,Xinyu Wang,Mark Fong,Songchun Zhang,Yuxuan Xue,Hai-Tao Zheng,Yue Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GeoEdit 是一个无需训练的扩散模型编辑框架，通过 Lift-Manipulate-Render-Denoise 流程实现对单张照片中物体的精确3D操控（平移、旋转、缩放），同时保持几何一致性和背景质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于扩散模型的2D编辑方法缺乏空间感知能力，会产生透视违规问题。将结构代理强制注入潜在空间会破坏方差同质性，导致自注意力泄漏，产生重影和背景模糊。核心难点在于不对称性：重新定位的物体必须遵循刚性几何，而背景需要自由合成合理内容。

Method: 提出训练免费的 Lift-Manipulate-Render-Denoise 流程：1) 在3D中解耦场景和物体，通过点对应对齐；2) 渲染带有结构深度图的几何对齐代理；3) 双分支去噪阶段：视频扩散主干保持物体身份，3D约束在匹配噪声方差（方差同质注入）的窄去噪窗口内注入前景，背景自由去噪。由于注入信号与原生潜在统计匹配，自注意力保持不受干扰。

Result: 实验证明在几何精度、身份保真度和背景质量方面获得一致提升。还提出了 GeoEditBench，这是一个包含物体平移、旋转和相机移动的姿势感知基准测试，带有姿势感知评估指标。

Conclusion: GeoEdit 成功解决了扩散模型编辑中的几何约束问题，通过解耦3D操作和方差同质注入，实现了对单张照片中物体的精确3D操控，同时保持背景质量。

Abstract: Precisely manipulating objects in a single photograph (translation, rotation, scaling) while obeying 3D physical constraints remains unsolved for diffusion-based editors. Current 2D methods lack spatial awareness and produce perspective violations. Forcing structural proxies into the latent space also disrupts variance homogeneity, and the resulting self-attention leakage leads to ghosting and background blur. The core difficulty is asymmetric: the relocated object must follow a rigid geometry, yet the uncovered background needs freedom to synthesize plausible content. We present GeoEdit, a training-free Lift-Manipulate-Render-Denoise pipeline that satisfies both constraints. We decouple scene and object in 3D, align them through point correspondence, and render a geometry-aligned proxy with a structural depth map. A Dual-Branch Denoising stage then refines this proxy: a video diffusion backbone preserves object identity, while 3D constraints are injected into the foreground within a narrow denoising window at matching noise variance (variance-homogeneous injection). The background denoises freely. Because the injected signal matches the native latent statistics, self-attention stays undisturbed. We also introduce GeoEditBench, a pose-aware benchmark covering object translation, object rotation, and camera movement with pose-aware evaluation metrics. Experiments confirm consistent gains in geometric accuracy, identity fidelity, and background quality. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Heey731/GeoEdit.

</details>


### [169] [SkelEM: Training-Signal Decoupling of Skeleton and Diffusion for Self-supervised Axial Super-Resolution in Volume Microscopy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30012)
*Bohao Chen,Yanchao Zhang,Yanan Lv,Chenxun Deng,Hua Han,Xi Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SkelEM是一种自监督轴向超分辨率框架，通过解耦拓扑网络和扩散细化器，在≤5步内实现高保真细节恢复，解决了现有方法在平滑纹理、结构幻觉和推理延迟之间的三难困境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 体积显微镜存在严重的各向异性分辨率问题，现有自监督轴向超分辨率方法面临三难困境：过度平滑的回归纹理、纯扩散模型的结构幻觉以及过高的推理延迟。

Method: 提出SkelEM框架，将训练信号级解耦：冻结拓扑网络和扩散细化器通过不同目标优化，分离低频拓扑形成和高频细节增强。基于确定性骨架，利用输入稀疏切片的统一循环一致性机制提取真实域残差先验并双向对齐扩散细化器，消除跨平面伪影。通过物理先验截断反向扩散过程。

Result: SkelEM在≤5步内实现高保真细节恢复，在自监督方法中达到最佳保真度与感知权衡平衡，具有最先进的下游膜分割性能，并在不同模态间实现稳健的零样本泛化。

Conclusion: SkelEM通过解耦训练信号和利用物理先验，有效解决了体积显微镜轴向超分辨率的三难困境，在保持高保真度的同时显著降低推理延迟，具有强大的跨仪器泛化能力。

Abstract: Volume microscopy, including electron and light microscopy, suffers from severe anisotropic resolution due to physical axial sectioning. Existing self-supervised axial super-resolution (ASR) methods face a trilemma bounded by overly smoothed regression textures, structural hallucinations of pure diffusion models, and prohibitive inference latency. In this paper, we propose Skeleton-refinE Microscopy (SkelEM), a self-supervised framework that decouples ASR at the training-signal level: a frozen topological network and a diffusion refiner are optimized by disjoint objectives, separating low-frequency topology formulation from high-frequency detail enhancement. Building on this deterministic skeleton, we exploit a unified cycle-consistent mechanism on input sparse slices to simultaneously extract a real-domain residual prior and bidirectionally align the diffusion refiner, washing away cross-plane artifacts without synthetic bias. By truncating the reverse diffusion process with this physical prior, SkelEM achieves high-fidelity detail restoration in merely $\le 5$ steps. To rigorously assess cross-instrument generalization, we further introduce BRAVE-ASR, a new benchmark of co-aligned anisotropic and isotropic volumes acquired on a Plasma-FIB instrument. Across public benchmarks, SkelEM achieves the most favorable balance across the fidelity-perception trade-off among self-supervised methods, with state-of-the-art downstream membrane segmentation performance and robust zero-shot generalization across distinct modalities.

</details>


### [170] [Shell-Supervised Gaussian Splatting for Urban Real-to-Sim Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30014)
*Yuan Yang,Peijun Lu,Fangzhou Lu,Sai Fan,Siqi Yan,Chenyuan Zhang,Haobo Liang,Yichen Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于外壳监督的高斯溅射方法，用于近距离城市立面视频到3D重建，通过外部立面结构外壳提供几何监督，改善表面几何稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实体AI需要适用于碰撞推理、导航和智能体-环境交互的几何结构，而不仅仅是逼真的新视角合成。然而，近距离城市立面重建面临玻璃、反射、重复窗户和弱纹理等挑战，这些因素可能导致视觉上合理的渲染但几何不稳定的问题。

Method: 提出外壳监督的高斯溅射框架，使用外部立面结构外壳作为轻量级几何监督。方法将外壳对齐到视频重建帧，渲染每视角深度、相机空间法线和有效掩码图，并通过掩码门控损失在高斯优化过程中应用这些线索。

Result: 在匿名化近距离城市立面场景上的实验表明，相比仅使用照片、单目线索和面向表面的高斯基线方法，该方法改善了立面朝向和可见表面点云一致性，同时保持了相当的保持渲染质量。

Conclusion: 外壳监督的高斯溅射方法通过结合外部几何外壳监督，在保持渲染质量的同时，显著改善了城市立面重建的几何稳定性，为实体AI应用提供了更可靠的几何结构。

Abstract: Real-to-sim reconstruction for embodied AI requires geometry that is useful for collision reasoning, navigation, and agent-environment interaction, not only photorealistic novel-view synthesis. However, close-range urban facades are difficult for video-to-3D reconstruction: glass, reflections, repeated windows, and weak texture can produce visually plausible renderings with unstable surface geometry. We introduce shell-supervised Gaussian Splatting, a reconstruction-stage framework that uses an external facade structural shell as lightweight geometric supervision for video-driven Gaussian reconstruction. The method aligns an exterior shell to the video reconstruction frame, renders per-view depth, camera-space normal, and valid-mask maps, and applies these cues through mask-gated losses during Gaussian optimization. This design preserves RGB-driven appearance while regularizing only visible shell-supported facade regions. Experiments on anonymized close-range urban facade scenes show improved facade orientation and visible-surface point-cloud consistency over photo-only, monocular-cue, and surface-oriented Gaussian baselines, while maintaining comparable held-out rendering quality.

</details>


### [171] [Monte Carlo Energy Aggregation for Mobile 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30017)
*Xiaobiao Du,YuAn Wang,Hao Li,Bosheng Wang,Xun Sun,Xin Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Flux-GS是一种用于移动平台的实时3D高斯泼溅方法，通过压缩球谐函数表示和优化高斯分布，在显著减少参数的同时保持高质量渲染。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅方法在移动平台上存在推理和存储开销大的问题，主要瓶颈在于高阶球谐函数（SH）的高计算和存储需求。

Method: 1. 提出蒙特卡洛镜面能量聚合器，采样三阶辐射残差并将镜面能量聚合到紧凑的潜在空间；2. 引入属性条件化SH增强模块，基于高斯属性预测偏移量来增强一阶SH表示；3. 提出多视角Alpha密度化和剪枝策略，利用多视角指导确保结构一致性并去除冗余基元。

Result: Flux-GS实现了显著的参数减少，同时保持了有竞争力的视觉质量，为移动平台实时渲染提供了鲁棒且可扩展的解决方案。

Conclusion: 该方法通过创新的压缩和增强技术，有效解决了3D高斯泼溅在移动平台上的资源限制问题，为实时高质量渲染提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting have demonstrated unprecedented success in novel view synthesis. However, the substantial inference and storage overhead driven by high-order Spherical Harmonics (SH) are primary bottlenecks for mobile platforms. In this paper, we present Flux-GS, a real-time Gaussian Splatting method designed to achieve high-fidelity rendering with significantly reduced overhead for resource-constrained mobile platforms. We first propose a Monte Carlo Specular Energy Aggregator, sampling third-order radiance residuals and aggregating specular energy into a compact latent space. In this way, our method effectively preserves visually salient lighting features in lower-order bands without expensive distillation or pre-training. To mitigate the high-frequency details lost during compression, we introduce an Attribute-Conditioned SH Enhancement module. This module predicts Gaussian-aware offsets based on intrinsic Gaussian attributes, which enhance the first-order SH representation prior to inference, without extra inference costs. Furthermore, the original single-view gradient-based densification is prone to producing excessive Gaussians and overfitting to a certain view. We address these limitations by proposing a Multi-view Alpha-based Densification and Pruning strategy. By leveraging multi-view guidance, we ensure multi-view structure consistency and the precise removal of redundant primitives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Flux-GS achieves substantial parameter reduction while maintaining competitive visual quality, offering a robust and scalable solution for real-time mobile rendering. Code: \textcolor{magenta}{\href{https://xiaobiaodu.github.io/flux-gs-project/}{https://xiaobiaodu.github.io/flux-gs-project/}}.

</details>


### [172] [OmniDance: Multimodal Driven Dance Video Generation with Large-scale Internet Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30019)
*Kaixing Yang,Jiashu Zhu,Xulong Tang,Ziqiao Peng,Xiangyue Zhang,Chubin Chen,Puwei Wang,Jiahong Wu,Xiangxiang Chu,Hongyan Liu,Jun He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CIPE-Dance是最大的舞蹈视频数据集，OmniDance框架将音乐作为补充条件信号集成到视频生成基础模型中，实现统一的TI2V、MI2V和MTI2V生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音乐驱动舞蹈视频生成方法面临两个关键限制：缺乏大规模高质量舞蹈视频数据集，以及缺乏将音乐作为补充条件信号集成到视频生成基础模型中的原则框架。

Method: 提出CIPE-Dance数据集（300k高质量剪辑，400小时）和OmniDance框架，通过深度感知专业化架构、锚定易到难课程学习策略和模态专业化时间依赖CFG策略，实现统一的TI2V、MI2V和MTI2V生成。

Result: 在CIPE-Dance数据集上的广泛实验表明，OmniDance在所有三个任务上都达到了最先进的性能，并展现出强大的多模态集成能力。

Conclusion: CIPE-Dance数据集和OmniDance框架解决了现有舞蹈视频生成的限制，通过将音乐作为高频率时间动态与文本低频率语义互补，实现了高质量的多模态舞蹈视频生成。

Abstract: Music-driven dance video generation aims to synthesize expressive human motion that is temporally aligned with music while maintaining high visual fidelity. Despite recent progress, existing methods still face two key limitations: the lack of large-scale, high-quality dance video datasets, and the absence of principled frameworks for integrating music as a complementary conditioning signal into Video Generation Foundation Models. To address these limitations, we introduce CIPE-Dance, a large-scale Internet-sourced dance video dataset with choreography-informed text annotations, constructed via a progressive expert pipeline. To the best of our knowledge, CIPE-Dance is the largest dataset for dance video generation to date, comprising 300k high-quality clips over 400 hours and covering diverse dancers, environments, and dance genres. We further propose OmniDance, a framework-level recipe for integrating music into a TI2V foundation model without sacrificing its original controllability or visual fidelity. Motivated by the complementary roles of text as low-frequency semantics and music as high-frequency temporal dynamics, OmniDance co-designs a depth-aware specialization architecture, an anchored easy-to-hard curriculum learning strategy, and a modality-specialized time-dependent CFG strategy, enabling unified TI2V, MI2V, and MTI2V generation. Extensive experiments on CIPE-Dance demonstrate that OmniDance achieves state-of-the-art performance across all three tasks and exhibits robust multimodal integration capability. Project is available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/OmniDance.

</details>


### [173] [Uncertainty Estimation in Pathology Foundation Models via Deep Mutual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30020)
*Gbègninougbo Aurel Davy Tchokponhoue,Sevda Öğüt,Ali Idri,Dorina Thanou,Pascal Frossard*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DICE是一个用于病理基础模型的即插即用框架，通过集成多个冻结模型来估计不确定性，提高临床可信度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 病理基础模型在WSI分析中具有通用性，但缺乏可靠置信度估计，且没有单一模型在所有任务中表现最佳，这限制了其在临床环境中的可信度

Method: 提出DICE框架，集成K个冻结的病理基础模型，通过深度互学习对齐集成成员，将模型间的分歧作为不确定性估计的代理

Result: 在三个具有挑战性的WSI基准测试中，DICE提供可靠的不确定性估计，能准确标记失败风险案例，在分类、校准和定位方面匹配或优于现有最佳方法

Conclusion: DICE是向将PFMs转化为不确定性感知决策支持系统迈出的关键一步，提高了病理基础模型在临床环境中的可信度和实用性

Abstract: Pathology foundation models (PFMs) offer generalizable representations for whole-slide image (WSI) analysis, yet their clinical adoption remains limited. Specifically, their predictions lack reliable confidence estimates, and no single PFM is universally best across tasks, which severely undermines trust in medical settings. To overcome this, we propose $\mathtt{DICE}$, a plug-and-play framework that ensembles $K$ frozen PFMs and models their disagreement as a proxy for uncertainty estimation. To ensure this proxy yields meaningful estimates, we align the ensemble members via deep mutual learning, and theoretically show that this objective upper-bounds the model uncertainty. Additionally, we demonstrate that the ensemble's consensus localizes abnormalities at the patch level without any explicit supervision. We evaluate $\mathtt{DICE}$ on three challenging WSI benchmarks. Notably, our framework provides reliable uncertainty estimates that accurately flag failure-prone cases under in- and out-of-distribution settings, while matching or outperforming SOTA baselines in classification, calibration, and localization. Overall, $\mathtt{DICE}$ takes a crucial step toward translating PFMs into uncertainty-aware decision-support systems.

</details>


### [174] [IBRSteG: Learning a Generalizable Steganography Framework for 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30024)
*Fanye Kong,Hongyu Xia,Yu Zheng,Boyang Gong,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: IBRSteG是一个用于3D高斯溅射（3DGS）的通用隐写框架，通过前馈3D高斯嵌入过程在不同3DGS场景间实现泛化，无需逐场景微调即可隐藏秘密3D场景内容。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管深度学习在隐写信息隐藏方面取得进展，但为3D高斯溅射设计可泛化的隐写方法仍具挑战性，现有方法参数生成与特定场景紧密耦合，缺乏通用性。

Method: 提出GAS（高斯属性隐写器）网络，学习场景无关的嵌入函数，将秘密3D高斯点属性注入覆盖场景，直接重建隐写场景而无需逐场景优化。将3D高斯转换为结构化属性，兼容2D学习范式并利用其结构化特性。

Result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，IBRSteG能有效隐藏不同场景并保持高视觉质量，在容量和安全性方面表现优越。

Conclusion: IBRSteG为3DGS隐写提供了通用解决方案，通过前馈嵌入过程实现跨场景泛化，在保持视觉质量的同时提供高容量和安全性。

Abstract: Recent advances in deep learning have notably improved steganographic message hiding. However, designing a generalizable steganographic approach for 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) that can embed meaningful 3D scene content remains challenging. In this paper, we propose IBRSteG, a generalizable framework for 3DGS steganography that enables undetectable concealment of secret scenes within a steganographic scene. Unlike existing approaches whose parameter generation is rigidly coupled with the specific scene, we formulate 3D steganography as a feed-forward 3D Gaussian embedding process that generalizes across different 3DGS scenes. To realize this, we introduce GAS (Gaussian Attributes Steganographer), a network that learns a scene-independent embedding function by injecting the attributes of secret 3D Gaussian points into a cover scene, thereby directly reconstructing the steganographic scenes without per-scene finetuning or optimization. By transforming 3D Gaussian into these structured attributes, these attributes are compatible with 2D learning paradigms and benefit from their structured nature, thereby enhancing generalization to unseen 3DGS scenes. Extensive experiments on established datasets demonstrate that IBRSteG can effectively conceal different scenes with high visual quality, and achieves superior capacity and security. Code is available at https://github.com/LingXiang2023/IBRSteG.

</details>


### [175] [MuseBench: Benchmarking Intent-Level Audiovisual Arts Understanding in MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30026)
*Yuxuan Fan,Gyusik Seo,Jing Hao,Jaemin Cho,Mohit Bansal,Jaehong Yoon*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Musebench是一个评估多模态大语言模型在艺术理解方面能力的基准，包含4016个问题，涵盖电影、视觉艺术、舞台表演和游戏艺术，结果显示当前最佳模型准确率仅为48.29%，远低于人类专家的87.18%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM基准主要关注感知识别，而忽略了艺术理解的核心——对创作意图的推理。艺术理解需要超越"是什么"的表层识别，达到"为什么"的创作选择分析，但这一关键方面在现有研究中尚未得到充分探索。

Method: 通过四阶段迭代流程构建Musebench基准：1)从超过1万条专业视频论文中提取问题；2)结合单选择和可变选项多选择问题；3)采用捷径过滤、对抗性干扰项和专家验证；4)涵盖电影艺术、静态视觉艺术、舞台表演艺术和游戏艺术四大领域。

Result: 对28个最先进的MLLM进行零样本评估，最佳模型准确率仅为48.29%，而人类专家准确率达到87.18%，显示出当前模型在创造性领域专业知识方面存在显著差距。

Conclusion: MLLM在艺术理解方面仍存在重大不足，特别是在推理创作意图方面。Musebench基准为评估和改进模型在艺术领域的理解能力提供了重要工具，揭示了现有模型与人类专家在创造性思维方面的巨大差距。

Abstract: Audiovisual arts encompass diverse creative disciplines, including cinema, visual arts, stage performance, and game design, where artistic meaning arises from deliberate combinations of visual, auditory, and narrative elements (e.g., fear amplified through claustrophobic framing, or grief conveyed through silence and lingering close-ups). True artistic understanding extends beyond recognizing what is depicted to reasoning about why it is expressed through particular creative choices. Despite the strong progress of multimodal large language models (MLLMs), this critical aspect of artistic understanding remains underexplored, as existing benchmarks largely measure perceptual recognition while overlooking reasoning about creative intent. To address this gap, we introduce Musebench, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate MLLMs on nuanced artistic understanding. It comprises 4,016 questions spanning cinematic arts, static visual arts, stage performing arts, and game arts, distilled from over 10K candidate video essays that pair professional commentary with visual demonstration. To capture the open-ended nature of artistic analysis at scale, the benchmark combines single-select and variable-option multi-select questions. All questions are generated and refined through a four-phase iterative pipeline combining shortcut filtering, adversarial distractors, and expert validation. Comprehensive zero-shot evaluation of 28 state-of-the-art MLLMs reveals that even the best-performing model achieves only 48.29% accuracy, substantially below human expert performance of 87.18%, exposing a significant gap in current models' creative domain expertise.

</details>


### [176] [Cross-Modal Iteration Distillation for Robust IHD Screening: The IDNet Framework and A New Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30027)
*Yongchang Gao,Junjie Pang,Shuaiyu Yang,Yusheng Yang,Xichao Jia,Shaojie Li,Hongfei Zhang,Jia Mu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: IDNet是一个多模态框架，通过跨模态蒸馏聚合器（CDA）整合左右眼视网膜图像和临床特征，用于缺血性心脏病筛查，并在新构建的UK Biobank基准上取得优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 彩色眼底摄影（CFP）为缺血性心脏病（IHD）筛查提供了一种低成本、非侵入性的途径，但目前研究受限于公共基准稀缺以及视网膜图像与稀疏临床变量融合效果不佳的问题。

Method: 提出IDNet多模态框架，包含跨模态蒸馏聚合器（CDA），使用可学习查询序列化整合左眼、右眼和临床特征，缓解高维视觉特征与低维表格输入之间的不平衡。同时构建了可复现的UK Biobank基准，包含25,205名受试者的50,410张图像。

Result: 在该基准上，IDNet优于仅使用图像、仅使用临床数据以及多个多模态基线方法，CDA作为即插即用融合模块能持续改进多种视觉编码器。

Conclusion: IDNet通过有效的多模态融合方法解决了视网膜图像与临床数据融合的挑战，为缺血性心脏病筛查提供了更有效的解决方案，并建立了可复现的公开基准推动该领域发展。

Abstract: Color Fundus Photography (CFP) offers a low-cost and non-invasive route for ischemic heart disease (IHD) screening, but current studies are limited by scarce public benchmarks and ineffective fusion of retinal images with sparse clinical variables. We propose IDNet, a multimodal framework with a Cross-Modal Distillation Aggregator (CDA) that uses learnable queries to sequentially integrate left-eye, right-eye, and clinical features, mitigating the imbalance between high-dimensional visual features and low-dimensional tabular inputs. We also construct a reproducible UK Biobank benchmark with open-source curation and quality-control pipelines, yielding 50,410 images from 25,205 subjects. On this benchmark, IDNet outperforms image-only, clinical-only, and several multimodal baselines, and CDA consistently improves multiple visual encoders as a plug-in fusion module.

</details>


### [177] [CogSENet: Blind Image Deblurring with Blur-Conditioned Semantic Routing and Explicit Frequency Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30030)
*Pan Wang,Yihao Hu,Xiujin Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CogSENet是一个受鹰视觉系统启发的动态语义对齐重建框架，通过语义驱动状态空间模块、双频融合模块和连续模糊场估计，在盲图像去模糊任务上实现了更好的视觉质量和结构保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前盲图像去模糊方法难以处理真实世界中空间变化的退化，缺乏语义感知能力来可靠区分有效纹理和伪影。需要一种能够理解语义并适应空间非均匀模糊的方法。

Method: 1) SDSSM模块模仿鹰的主动扫视扫描，通过可微分路由实现语义感知的token重组，支持提示条件的长距离依赖建模；2) BFFB模块通过小波变换将特征分解为高低频率，模仿鹰视网膜的功能分化；3) 从模糊图像估计连续模糊场，与CLIP语义先验融合来调制最深层的潜在特征，实现自适应恢复。

Result: CogSENet在视觉质量和结构保真度方面优于最先进的去模糊方法，且参数量更少。在去雾、去雨和去噪等任务上也表现良好。

Conclusion: CogSENet通过模仿鹰视觉系统的动态语义对齐机制，成功解决了盲图像去模糊中的语义感知和空间非均匀退化问题，为图像恢复任务提供了新的生物启发框架。

Abstract: Blind image deblurring demands the recovery of high-fidelity details and coherent structures from complex, unknown degradations. Current blind image deblurring methods struggle with real-world, spatially varying degradations, and lack the semantic awareness necessary to reliably differentiate valid textures from artifacts. To bridge this gap, we propose CogSENet, a dynamic, semantic-aligned reconstruction framework inspired by the eagle's visual system. By mimicking the eagle's active saccadic scanning, we devise a Semantic-Driven State Space Module (SDSSM) with semantic-aware token regrouping via differentiable routing, enabling prompt-conditioned long-range dependency modeling. To ensure physically interpretable recovery of textures and structures, a BiFreqFusionBlock (BFFB) mirrors functional differentiation of the eagle's retina by decomposing features into high and low frequencies using wavelet transforms. Finally, we estimate a continuous Blur Field (CBF) from blur image and fuse it with CLIP semantic priors to modulate the deepest latent features, emulating focal adaptation and enabling adaptive restoration under spatially non-uniform blur. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CogSENetoutperforms state-of-the-art deblurring methods in both visual quality and structural fidelity with fewer parameters, while also performing favorably on dehazing, deraining, and denoising tasks.

</details>


### [178] [Consensus Clustering of Free-Viewing Gaze Data: New Insights into Human-Information Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30035)
*Beryl Gnanaraj,Jaya Sreevalsan-Nair,Saqib Alam Ansari,Maanasa Rajaraman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为EnsembleGaze的无监督集成学习系统，用于共识聚类自由观看眼动数据，以分析用户行为和刺激类型特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管自由观看眼动数据提供了丰富的视觉注意信息，但其人机交互模式研究不足。现有分析方法主要关注注视点和兴趣区域，缺乏对用户行为模式和刺激特征的综合分析。

Method: 1. 基于注视分布统计描述符的特征工程；2. 集成多种聚类方法进行共识投票，计算共关联矩阵；3. 提出两种高维聚类策略：共识子空间聚类和谱双聚类，用于联合分析用户和图像特征。

Result: 图像刺激分组在不同方法中高度一致，反映了环境vs焦点观看模式的稳健区别；用户分组则依赖于图像上下文，只有双聚类和两步条件方法能够恢复这种结构。公开数据集测试显示了特定于数据集的模式。

Conclusion: EnsembleGaze为场景感知研究中的注视行为分析提供了可复现的无监督分析方法。不同聚类策略提供了互补的见解，系统能够捕捉用户行为和刺激类型之间的复杂交互模式。

Abstract: Free-viewing gaze data provides a rich, task-free window into human visual attention. Conventional exploratory data analysis of the data provides user attention patterns through fixations and areas of interest. However, despite the richness of this gaze data, its human-information interaction (HII) patterns are understudied. We address this gap using consensus clustering of gaze data with respect to users and stimulus characteristics. We present a novel end-to-end unsupervised ensemble learning system for consensus clustering of free-viewing gaze datasets, EnsembleGaze. With a goal of characterizing the user behavior and stimulus type, we propose a feature engineering step based on statistical descriptors of fixation-based distributions. EnsembleGaze involves consensus voting of selected clustering methods implemented on the feature vector to compute the co-association matrix. Using the separate consensus clustering of users and stimuli as a baseline, we further propose two high-dimensional clustering strategies for determining gaze clusters based on joint user and image characterization. They are consensus subspace clustering and spectral biclustering. Clustering performance is evaluated using selected standard metrics and is further interpreted through image-level properties. Our system provides a replicable method for the unsupervised analysis of fixation behavior in scene perception research. Our results show that image stimuli groupings are highly consistent across methods, reflecting a robust ambient-versus-focal viewing mode distinction, whereas user groupings are image-context-dependent, a structure that only biclustering and the two-step conditional approaches are architecturally capable of recovering. Testing on the publicly available datasets revealed dataset-specific patterns, with each offering complementary insights through distinct clustering strategies.

</details>


### [179] [Walking in the Implicit: Interactive World Exploration via Neural Scene Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30045)
*Zhiqi Li,Chengrui Dong,Zhenhua Du,Hangning Zhou,Cong Qiu,Hailong Qin,Mu Yang,Dongxu Wei,Peidong Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的交互式视频生成范式，将帧生成分解为场景状态转换和相机姿态渲染，通过神经隐式场景（NIS）实现长期一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的交互式视频生成系统将状态转换与高频观测合成耦合在一起，导致生成过程复杂且效率低下。需要一种能够分离场景状态和相机渲染的方法。

Method: 提出Walking in the Implicit范式，将滚动变量从帧潜变量改为固定长度的可渲染隐式状态（NIS）。具体实现为NeuWorld：使用Transformer VAE从稀疏姿态帧学习局部锚定NIS，用扩散Transformer根据未来相机轨迹和几何感知检索历史来演化NIS。

Result: NeuWorld在公开的姿态视图数据上从头训练，无需预训练视频骨干或辅助3D重建器，实现了强大的长期一致性和良好的推理效率。

Conclusion: 通过将交互式生成分解为场景状态转换和姿态条件渲染，该范式显著提高了视频生成的长期一致性和效率。

Abstract: Interactive video generation systems for camera-controlled world exploration roll out growing sequences of latent video frames, entangling state transition with high-frequency observation synthesis. We propose Walking in the Implicit, a scene-centric paradigm that changes the rollout variable from frame latents to a fixed-length, renderable implicit state, termed Neural Implicit Scene (NIS). This factorizes interactive generation into stochastic transition of a compact scene state and deterministic pose-conditioned rendering given the sampled state. We instantiate this paradigm as NeuWorld: a transformer VAE learns locally anchored NIS from sparse posed frames, and a diffusion transformer evolves NIS conditioned on future camera trajectories and geometry-aware retrieved history. By reusing the VAE encoder as a unified conditioner, NeuWorld maps camera, reference-image, and history cues into the same NIS modality, avoiding external heterogeneous encoders. Trained from scratch on public posed-view data without pretrained video backbones or auxiliary 3D reconstructors, NeuWorld achieves strong long-horizon consistency with favorable inference efficiency.

</details>


### [180] [Argus: Metric Panoramic 3D Reconstruction for Indoor Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30047)
*Xi Li,Linyuan Li,Yan Wu,Tong Rao,Kai Zhang,Xinchen Hui,Cihui Pan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Realsee3D是一个包含1万室内场景（1000真实+9000合成）的大规模全景RGB-D数据集，Argus是基于该数据集训练的前馈网络，用于度量全景3D重建，通过学习的共视模块选择最优参考视图锚定世界坐标系，并采用多步监督和联合约束提高几何一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前度量前馈3D重建在全景数据上研究不足，主要原因是缺乏大规模全景RGB-D训练数据。为了解决这个问题，需要构建大规模全景数据集并开发相应的重建方法。

Method: 1. 构建Realsee3D混合数据集（10K室内场景，299K全景视点）；2. 提出Argus前馈网络，包含学习的共视模块选择最优参考视图锚定世界坐标系；3. 将双向像素到世界映射分解为可解释的子步骤，采用每步监督和跨坐标联合约束来增强几何一致性。

Result: 在Realsee3D基准测试中，Argus在相机姿态估计、深度估计和点云重建方面实现了最先进的度量性能。

Conclusion: Realsee3D数据集和Argus网络为度量全景3D重建提供了有效的解决方案，通过大规模数据和精心设计的网络架构解决了坐标锚定和几何一致性问题。

Abstract: Metric feed-forward 3D reconstruction for panoramic data remains under-explored due to the lack of large-scale panoramic RGB-D training data.
  We present Realsee3D, a hybrid dataset of 10K indoor scenes (1K real, 9K synthetic) with 299K panoramic viewpoints and precise metric annotations,
  and Argus, a feed-forward network trained on it for metric panoramic 3D reconstruction.
  In the sparse unordered capture setting of Realsee3D,
  a poorly chosen coordinate anchor can cause global pose drift.
  Argus addresses this with a learned covisibility module that selects the geometrically optimal reference view to anchor the metric world frame.
  To further improve multi-task learning,
  we decompose the bidirectional pixel-to-world mapping into interpretable sub-steps with per-step supervision and cross-coordinate joint constraints,
  reinforcing geometric consistency across prediction branches.
  On the Realsee3D benchmark,
  Argus achieves state-of-the-art metric performance in camera pose estimation, depth estimation, and point cloud reconstruction.
  Project page: https://argus-paper.realsee.ai.

</details>


### [181] [Bridging the Gap Between Image Restoration and Navigational Safety in Hazy Conditions: A New Visibility Estimation Metric for Maritime Surveillance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30049)
*Wentao Feng,Guobei Peng,Wengang Mao,Ryan Wen Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一个面向可见度的评估框架，将去雾性能与可见距离估计联系起来，通过构建海事模拟可见度数据集和基于目标检测精度的评估指标，实现可解释的去雾效果评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统图像质量评估指标（如PSNR、SSIM等）无法在去雾恢复质量与实用可见度阈值之间建立物理可解释的关系，这限制了去雾方法在航海安全应用中的有效评估。

Method: 1. 使用Unity3D构建海事模拟可见度数据集（MSVD），模拟分级可见度条件下的海事交通场景；2. 开发基于目标检测精度的去雾可见度评估指标，建立可见距离与检测性能之间的映射关系。

Result: MSVD为不同可见度级别的去雾性能评估提供了可靠基准，提出的评估指标能够实现可解释且可靠的可见距离估计，支持航海安全和操作效率的评估。

Conclusion: 该研究提出的可见度导向评估框架填补了传统图像质量指标在去雾应用中的不足，通过物理可解释的可见距离估计，为航海安全应用提供了更有效的去雾方法评估工具。

Abstract: Visibility distance is critical to maritime navigational safety because it determines the effective observation range of shipborne and shore-based monitoring systems. Under hazy conditions, degraded visual information shortens observable distance and increases navigational risks and economic losses. Although numerous image dehazing methods have been developed, conventional image quality assessment metrics, such as PSNR, SSIM, FSIM, FADE, and NIQE, cannot establish a physically interpretable relationship between restoration quality and practical visibility thresholds. To address this limitation, this work proposes a visibility-oriented evaluation framework that links dehazing performance with visible-distance estimation. First, a Maritime Simulated Visibility Dataset (MSVD) is constructed using Unity3D to simulate maritime traffic scenes under graded visibility conditions. The dataset provides paired hazy and clear images with precise visibility annotations, enabling quantitative analysis of visibility restoration. Second, a dehazing visibility evaluation metric is developed by using object detection accuracy as an intermediate indicator. By establishing a mapping between visibility distance and detection performance, the proposed metric converts image restoration improvements into measurable visibility gains. Six representative dehazing methods are evaluated using both conventional image quality metrics and the proposed visibility metric.
